description: Deskripsi Pekerjaan :Melaksanakan analisa laboratorium untuk sampel produksi (blending) dan permintaan khusus secara akurat serta tepat waktu.Melakukan pengembangan dan optimasi formulasi lab blend sesuai spesifikasi produk.Menjamin keakuratan, konsistensi, dan ketertelusuran data hasil analisa.Meng...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan :

  • Melaksanakan analisa laboratorium untuk sampel produksi (blending) dan permintaan khusus secara akurat serta tepat waktu.

  • Melakukan pengembangan dan optimasi formulasi lab blend sesuai spesifikasi produk.

  • Menjamin keakuratan, konsistensi, dan ketertelusuran data hasil analisa.

  • Mengidentifikasi penyimpangan serta melakukan investigasi awal (analisa penyebab).

  • Menjaga keandalan instrumen melalui perawatan rutin dan troubleshooting dasar.

  • Berkontribusi dalam program peningkatan berkelanjutan (continuous improvement) di laboratorium. 

Kualifikasi : 

  • Pendidikan minimal D3 Kimia atau bidang terkait

  • Pengalaman 1 – 3 tahun di laboratorium (fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar)

  • Memahami spesifikasi material dan produk

  • Mampu mengoperasikan instrumen dan metode pengujian laboratorium

  • Memahami standar ISO 17025 dan ISO 9001:2015

  • Mampu membaca dan memahami dokumen teknis berbahasa Inggris

  • Menguasai penggunaan MS Office (minimal Excel)

  • Teliti, analitis, dan memiliki integritas tinggi

  • Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan dan memenuhi target waktu

  • Bersedia ditempatkan di area Cilegon - Banten 

Nilai Tambah: 

  • Pengalaman di industri pelumas / kimia

  • Familiar dengan sistem QC / QA

  • Pernah terlibat dalam audit laboratorium atau sistem kalibrasi 

Benefit/Facility :

  • BPJSTK & BPJS Kesehatan

  • THR

  • Reimbursement Medical

  • Bantuan makan ( catering )
title: Analyst Laboratory

description: Role and Responsibilities:Tackle real industry challenges by applying analytics, machine learning, and optimization solutions to copper mining operations.Use research and analytical expertise to test ideas, validate hypotheses, and uncover insights that drive resource-efficient mining.Build and scal...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Role and Responsibilities:

  • Tackle real industry challenges by applying analytics, machine learning, and optimization solutions to copper mining operations.

  • Use research and analytical expertise to test ideas, validate hypotheses, and uncover insights that drive resource-efficient mining.

  • Build and scale solutions in cloud environment to deliver clear, actionable insights for leadership and operations teams.

  • Design, implement, and maintain data-driven tools that solve complex business problems with advanced statistical and analytical methods.

Requirements:

  • Willingness to travel if required (up to 30%, primarily to mining site)

  • Strong proficiency in English, both written and verbal.

  • Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, Physics, or a related field (more advanced degree is a plus).

  • More than 3 years' experience working as a Data Scientist is mandatory. Proficient in Data Analysis.

  • Hands-on expertise in predictive modeling (e.g., Regression, Random Forest, Gradient Boosting), time series analysis, NLP, anomaly detection, or survival analysis.

  • Proficiency in Python and its data science stack for data analysis, visualization, and modeling.

  • Solid knowledge of SQL and experience with big-data platforms (Snowflake experience is a plus).

  • Experience with cloud-based ML tools (Azure a big plus).

  • Proven ability to mentor, collaborate, and grow a high-performing data science team.

  • Strategic thinker with a proven track record of transforming data into actionable insights that drive decision-making.

Why join Us?

  • We offer very attractive salary and outstanding benefits.

  • Most of our clients are multinational company which you will be exposed to a large IT environment and valuable experience in international scale projects.

  • You will always learn new things as our projects always adopt latest technology and best practice available in the market.

  • Last but not least, we offer a supportive and encouraging environment that puts the emphasis on teamwork. Here, your soft skill (professional relationships, character, attitude) will grow as fast as your technical skill
title: Data Scientist

description: Job Descriptions:Perform data exploration, data cleaning, data imputation, and feature engineering on unstructured and structured data.Design, Develop and maintain report used for daily operation, management and analyticsBuild the infrastructure for optimal extraction, transformation, and loading (E...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Descriptions:

  • Perform data exploration, data cleaning, data imputation, and feature engineering on unstructured and structured data.

  • Design, Develop and maintain report used for daily operation, management and analytics

  • Build the infrastructure for optimal extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) of data from a wide variety of data sources.

  • Develop and maintain all data flows and prepare all ETL processes according to business requirements and incorporate all business requirements into all design specifications

  • Identifying, designing and implementing internal process improvements including re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability, optimizing data delivery, and automating manual processes 

  • Build analytics tools that utilize the data pipeline to provide actionable insights

  • Explore ways to enhance data quality and reliability Explore ways to enhance data quality and reliability

  • Document all test procedures for systems and processes              


Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree from computer science or related fields, or equivalent software engineering experience.

  • Advanced SQL knowledge and experience working with relational databases, query authoring (SQL). Preferably on MS SQL

  • Advanced Knowledge in reporting service tools. Preferably Microsoft SSRS

  • Advanced Knowledge in ETL / data pipeline applications. Preferably Microsoft SSIS.

  • Experienced in performing root cause analysis on internal and external data and processes to answer specific business questions and identify opportunities for improvement.

  • Have an understanding and experience regarding the reporting dashboard and data warehouse concepts

  • Experienced in object-oriented/object function scripting languages: Python, Java, C#,C++, 

  • Proficiency in source control i.e. Git.

  • Got 2+ years of experience in Data Engineering role.

  • Familiar with Azure ETL product like Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse, Azure Datalake, Azure Devops would be a great addition.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Data Annotation Staff (Anotasi Suara) for Artificial Intelligence

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

  • Melakukan proses anotasi, pelabelan, dan validasi data suara sesuai dengan pedoman yang telah ditentukan.

  • Mendengarkan rekaman audio dan menginput data secara akurat ke dalam sistem.

  • Mengikuti instruksi serta standar kualitas yang diberikan oleh tim supervisor.

  • Memastikan hasil kerja memenuhi target kuantitas dan kualitas harian.

  • Melaporkan kendala teknis atau ketidaksesuaian data kepada tim terkait.

Kualifikasi

  • Mampu mengoperasikan komputer/laptop dengan lancar (termasuk penggunaan browser, Microsoft Office/Google Docs, dan sistem berbasis web).

  • Memiliki kemampuan mengikuti instruksi dengan teliti dan detail.

  • Mampu bekerja secara disiplin, fokus, dan konsisten dalam pekerjaan yang bersifat repetitif.

  • Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan serta memenuhi target waktu yang ditetapkan.

  • Memiliki ketelitian dan konsentrasi yang baik dalam mendengarkan audio.

  • Bersedia bekerja sesuai jadwal yang ditentukan (kontrak 1 bulan, WFO Senin–Jumat 08.30–17.30).

Informasi Tambahan

  • Lokasi kerja: Menara Matahari – Karawaci

  • Uang saku: Rp200.000 / hari

title: Business Analyst (Qualitative Research)

description: Growth opportunities: progression path from 7×24 Asset Administrator → 5×8 Asset Administrator → Asset Manager.Job Responsibilities:Assist in managing data center warehouse assets, including inbound and outbound inventory handling.Maintain accurate asset records, ensure timely updates of stock data,...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Growth opportunities: progression path from 7×24 Asset Administrator → 5×8 Asset Administrator → Asset Manager.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Assist in managing data center warehouse assets, including inbound and outbound inventory handling.

  • Maintain accurate asset records, ensure timely updates of stock data, and support audit requirements.

  • Handle basic hardware equipment (e.g. servers, network devices) — asset tagging, inspection, and reporting.

  • Coordinate with internal teams on asset movement, delivery, and return processes.

  • Support the asset manager in daily warehouse operations and documentation.

  • Participate in 24/7 shift rotation and on-call support schedule as required.

  • Participate in continuous learning and skill development related to IT hardware and asset management.

Basic Job Requirement:

  • 1-3 years of related industry experience and at least 3 years of work experience

  • Familiar with common data center equipment (switches, servers), components and consumables (optical modules, boards, fibers); warehouse management experience; familiar with warehouse environmental requirements and dust/moisture prevention measures; good at proactively identifying and solving problems; conceptual understanding of IDC asset lifecycle from warehousing to decommissioning.

  • Responsible and detail-oriented, with strong organizational skills.

  • Diverse educational backgrounds are welcome — IT-related majors are preferred.

  • Must have Chinese Language Proficiency
title: Data Center Warehouse Executive

description: About The Role!We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Data Processing Staff to support our sales operations and regulatory processes. This role plays a critical part in ensuring data accuracy, smooth administrative coordination, and providing insights through market and performance analy...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About The Role!

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Data Processing Staff to support our sales operations and regulatory processes. This role plays a critical part in ensuring data accuracy, smooth administrative coordination, and providing insights through market and performance analysis.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Prepare and maintain accurate daily, weekly, and monthly reports to support business operations

  • Process, validate, and manage sales data to ensure accuracy and completeness

  • Provide administrative and data support to the Sales Team

  • Monitor and analyze market trends, sales performance, and business data

  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth data flow and reporting

  • Assist in preparing presentations and reports for internal stakeholders

  • Ensure proper documentation and compliance with internal procedures

  • Identify data discrepancies and proactively resolve issues

Qualifications:

  • Minimum Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in any major

  • At least 1 year of experience as Data Processing Staff or Sales Analyst

  • Strong analytical thinking with attention to detail

  • Experience in handling sales data and reporting is preferred

  • Strong sense of responsibility and commitment to deadlines

  • Fresh graduates with strong Excel skills are welcome to apply
title: Data Processing Staff

description: Responsibilities:Execute the duties of the Tridharma.Champion the accreditation process.Teach Information Systems courses with a specific focus on Data Engineering and Data Science.Develop and deliver curriculum for Information Systems subjects.Provide faith-based mentoring and academic guidance to ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Execute the duties of the Tridharma.

  • Champion the accreditation process.

  • Teach Information Systems courses with a specific focus on Data Engineering and Data Science.

  • Develop and deliver curriculum for Information Systems subjects.

  • Provide faith-based mentoring and academic guidance to students.

  • Participate in academic and administrative activities.

  • Serve as an advisor for the campus Information System.

  • Collaborate on projects, primarily at the international level.

  • Conduct research and publish in reputable journals.

Minimum Qualifications:

  • Master’s degree in Information System, Data Science, Computer Science, Industrial Engineering, or related fields. 

  • Demonstrated ability to teach and communicate effectively in English, as the medium of instruction at JIU is 100% English.

  • Knowledge of or prior experience with academic accreditation processes.

  • Strong knowledge or practical experience in Data Engineering and Data Science.

  • Strong knowledge or practical experience in Cloud (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure)

  • Experience in working in a diverse, multicultural environment. 

  • Proficiency in using Google Workspace and/or other productivity tools. 

  • Proficiency in Python and Java programming.

  • Proficiency in Tensorflow and Keras.

Preferred qualifications:

  • Professional-level Cloud Certification (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, or others).

  • Ph.D. degree in Information Systems, Data Science, Computer Science, Operations Research, Industrial Engineering, or related fields.

  • Experience in working as a Head of Department (Ka Prodi/Kepala Program Studi) or Dean.

  • Experience and proficiency in any of the fields below: 

    • Data Pipeline products (Beam, Spark, HDFS, Airflow, Kafka, etc.).

    • Distributed systems and Kubernetes (Docker, GKE, Knative, Istio, etc.).

    • ERP systems (SAP).

    • Optimization theory (Linear Programming, Mix-integer Programming). 

    • Cloud Architecture and/or Data Pipelining. 

    • Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence.

description: Job Description:Analyze data and generate insightful reports to support business decision-making.Collaborate with cross-functional departments to gather, validate, and interpret data.Track and monitor project progress, identifying risks, delays, and improvement opportunities.Provide data-driven reco...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

  • Analyze data and generate insightful reports to support business decision-making.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional departments to gather, validate, and interpret data.

  • Track and monitor project progress, identifying risks, delays, and improvement opportunities.

  • Provide data-driven recommendations to improve business processes and operational performance.

  • Maintain and organize data records to ensure accuracy, consistency, and accessibility.

  • Support the Manager in data analysis, reporting, and project coordination activities.

  • Assist in developing dashboards, reports, and data visualization for management review.

  • Collect, clean, and interpret data to identify trends, issues, and actionable insights.

Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Mathematic, Information Technology, Business Administration, or related fields.

  • Minimum 1–2 years of experience in data analysis or related field.

  • Proficient in English (written and spoken).

  • Strong skills in data collection, analysis, and interpretation.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office / Microsoft 365.

  • Familiarity with data analysis tools (e.g., SQL, Python coding, or Power BI data visualization tools) is a plus.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Good interpersonal and communication skills.

  • Good understanding of business processes.

  • Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills.
title: Data Analyst

description: Job DescriptionSupport data analysis and predictive modeling for forecasting and operational optimization.Develop analytical models and reports to support data-driven business decisions.Utilize business planning and analytics tools to generate insights and scenario simulations.Assist in integrating ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

  • Support data analysis and predictive modeling for forecasting and operational optimization.

  • Develop analytical models and reports to support data-driven business decisions.

  • Utilize business planning and analytics tools to generate insights and scenario simulations.

  • Assist in integrating business planning tools with ERP systems and databases to enable seamless data flow.

  • Perform data cleaning, transformation, and validation to ensure data accuracy and reliability.

  • Use Python, R, or SQL for data analysis.

  • Create interactive dashboards and visual reports through developed models.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate data insights into actionable strategies.

  • Communicate technical findings and insights clearly to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Manage multiple tasks effectively while maintaining strong attention to detail and meeting project deadlines.

Qualifications & Skills

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field.

  • 2–3 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or data science.

  • Basic proficiency in Python, R, or SQL for data processing and analysis.

  • Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.

  • Familiarity with business planning and analytics tools.

  • Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights.

  • Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with forecasting, scenario modeling, or data-driven decision-making.

  • Familiarity with business planning, supply chain, or production analytics.

  • Exposure to ERP systems, IoT data integration, or cloud platforms such as Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, or Microsoft Azure.

  • Experience with data visualization tools such as Microsoft Power BI, Qlik Sense, Tableau, or Microsoft Excel.
title: IT Model Builder

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

  • Support data analysis and predictive modeling for forecasting and operational optimization.

  • Develop analytical models and reports to support data-driven business decisions.

  • Utilize business planning and analytics tools to generate insights and scenario simulations.

  • Assist in integrating business planning tools with ERP systems and databases to enable seamless data flow.

  • Perform data cleaning, transformation, and validation to ensure data accuracy and reliability.

  • Use Python, R, or SQL for data analysis.

  • Create interactive dashboards and visual reports through developed models.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate data insights into actionable strategies.

  • Communicate technical findings and insights clearly to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Manage multiple tasks effectively while maintaining strong attention to detail and meeting project deadlines.

Qualifications & Skills

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field.

  • 2–3 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or data science.

  • Basic proficiency in Python, R, or SQL for data processing and analysis.

  • Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.

  • Familiarity with business planning and analytics tools.

  • Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights.

  • Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with forecasting, scenario modeling, or data-driven decision-making.

  • Familiarity with business planning, supply chain, or production analytics.

  • Exposure to ERP systems, IoT data integration, or cloud platforms such as Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, or Microsoft Azure.

  • Experience with data visualization tools such as Microsoft Power BI, Qlik Sense, Tableau, or Microsoft Excel.

About the Job

We are looking for a meticulous and detail-oriented Data Analyst to join our team ei.embeauty. In this role, you will play a crucial part in processing data into insights that can be used to support business decision-making, particularly in the areas of sales, customers, and marketing.

What you’ll be doing

1. Manage end-to-end data processes: data collection, cleaning, validation, and transformation

2. Sales, customers, and marketing.

3. Analyze sales trends, consumer behavior, and product performance to identify business opportunities.

4. Monitor KPIs, campaign performance, and business targets regularly.

5. Evaluate the effectiveness of marketing campaigns, promotions, and pricing strategies

6. Maintain data quality, consistency, and accuracy.

7. Provide data-driven insights and reports to support strategic decision-making.

What we’re looking for

1. Minimum Bachelor's degree in Mathematics or Statistics

2. At least 1 year of experience in data analysis or similar roles

3. Proficient in using tools such as Excel and Python (e.g., Pandas)

4. Good understanding of basic statistics and data analysis

5. Meticulous, detail-oriented, and possessing good analytical and problem-solving skills.

description: Deskripsi Perusahaan PT  Waschen Alora Indonesia (Alora Group) adalah sebuah entitas induk perusahan yang memiliki core business di bidang jasa kebersihan, seperti: Laundry rumah sakit (Healtcare Laundry), Penyewaan linen rumah sakit (Linen Rental), Laundry untuk Perusahaan (Corporate Laundry), Laun...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Perusahaan 

PT  Waschen Alora Indonesia (Alora Group) adalah sebuah entitas induk perusahan yang memiliki core business di bidang jasa kebersihan, seperti: Laundry rumah sakit (Healtcare Laundry), Penyewaan linen rumah sakit (Linen Rental), Laundry untuk Perusahaan (Corporate Laundry), Laundry Retail (residence), Jasa kebersihan rumah (Home Care) dan Jasa Kebersihan Kantor (Office Care). 

Kami mengundang talenta terbaik yang memiliki dedikasi, berpikiran terbuka (growth mindset) dan loyalitas untuk pengembangan karir dan pengembangan bisnis demi kemajuan bersama di masa depan. Kami tidak mencari sekadar analis data. Kami mencari “arsitek pertumbuhan”, seseorang yang mampu mengubah data menjadi strategi, dan strategi menjadi dampak nyata.  Kami mencari “problem solver berbasis data”, seseorang yang mampu melihat pola di balik angka, memahami bisnis secara mendalam, dan mengubah insight menjadi keputusan strategis.

Di peran ini, Anda akan berada di jantung pengambilan keputusan memahami apa yang benar-benar bekerja, apa yang tidak, dan ke mana kita harus melangkah berikutnya.

Tanggung Jawab (Job Description)

  1. Turn Data Into Strategic Insight

Melakukan analisis data dan riset pasar untuk memahami tren industri, kebutuhan pelanggan, posisi kompetitif perusahaan serta peluang dan area yang perlu ditingkatkan dalam operasional bisnis.

Melakukan riset dan analisis mendalam (in-depth analysis) terhadap customer, marketing metrics, competitor landscape, serta tren marketing terbaru untuk mengidentifikasi peluang dan menutup gap pada produk maupun funnel.

Menggali data operasional, data pelanggan, data pasar untuk menemukan pola, peluang, dan risiko yang tidak terlihat oleh orang lain. 

  1. Drive Decision-Making

Menyajikan insight yang tajam dan relevan untuk membantu manajemen mengambil keputusan berbasis data, bukan asumsi.

Bertanggung jawab atas fungsi analitik dengan merancang strategi pelacakan (tracking), membangun kerangka pengukuran (measurement framework), serta memberikan insight yang jelas terkait aktivitas operasional dan marketing.

Berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas fungsi untuk memberikan insight yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis.

  1. Solve Real Business Problems

Mengidentifikasi bottleneck, inefficiency, dan peluang growth dalam proses bisnis, lalu memberikan solusi yang actionable.

Mendukung pelaksanaan A/B testing dan desain eksperimen, memastikan setiap project dapat diukur dengan baik dan hasilnya valid secara statistik. 

  1. Build Data-Driven System

Mengembangkan dashboard, model analitik, dan framework pengukuran yang menjadi fondasi pengambilan keputusan perusahaan.

  1. Collaborate Across Functions

Bekerja lintas tim (Operations, Marketing, Finance, Product) untuk memastikan setiap strategi didukung oleh data yang solid.

Kualifikasi (Requirements)

  • Pendidikan minimal Diploma/Sarjana di bidang terkait (relevan).

  • Memiliki pengalaman bekerja minimal 1 s.d. 5 tahun dibidang data analyst dan business analyst (lebih diutamakan yang menguasai market research dan marketing analysis).

  • Mampu berpikir kritis dan sistematis serta mampu menghubungkan data dengan konteks bisnis.

  • Pengalaman dalam menggunakan alat analisis data (Google Analytics, Power BI, SQL, Python dan tools sejenisnya), termasuk kemampuan mengolah big data secara efisien.

  • Berpengalaman membuat dashboard menggunakan tools visualisasi data (Metabase, Tableau, Looker, Power BI atau sejenisnya).

  • Memahami berbagai channel digital marketing (iklan berbayar, SEO, referral, pertumbuhan organik, kampanye CRM).

  • Memahami statistik, analisis tren, dan machine learning dasar.

  • Kemampuan untuk bekerja dengan data besar dan kompleks. 

  • Berpikir analitis, detail-oriented, serta mampu menyajikan data secara logis.

  • Komunikatif & kolaboratif, bisa bekerja sama dengan tim marketing, sales, dan operasional.

  • Lancar berbahasa Inggris.

Kompensani dan Benefit

  • Gaji dan tunjangan yang kompetitif dengan insentif (bonus) kinerja.

  • BPJS (Asuransi kesehatan).

  • Exposure langsung ke decision-making level.

  • Lingkungan kerja yang mendorong thinking, ownership, dan impact.

  • Kesempatan berkembang menjadi future leader di bidang data, business & strategy.

We focus on holistic student success, leveraging AI-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. We're looking for individuals who sha...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kinobi AI is a Singapore-based company dedicated to transforming higher education by helping universities go beyond just academics. We focus on holistic student success, leveraging AI-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. We're looking for individuals who share our vision and want to make a meaningful impact in the future of education.

Our purpose is to:

  • Empower institutions to guide their beneficiaries toward meaningful employment opportunities through AI-driven solutions

  • Demonstrate to the world that a global AI-powered B2B SaaS enterprise can be successfully built from Southeast Asia

About the Role
As a Business Analyst, you will play a key role in designing and shaping end-to-end SaaS solutions for Kinobi’s clients. This role bridges business requirements and technical execution — ensuring proposed solutions are commercially viable, functionally clear, and technically feasible.
You will work closely with Sales, Product, Engineering, and Implementation teams across pre-sales and early delivery phases. While grounded in strong business analysis fundamentals, this role also involves contributing to high-level solution architecture and supporting technical solution decisions.
This position is ideal for candidates with Business Analyst, Pre-Sales, or Technical Consulting backgrounds who want to deepen their exposure to solution architecture in a SaaS environment.

Responsibilities

Solution Architecture & Technical Ownership

  • Design and define high-level solution architectures, including system components, integrations, data flows, and deployment models.

  • Gather, analyze, and validate client business, functional, and technical requirements, including non-functional requirements such as scalability, security, performance, and reliability.

  • Assess technical feasibility, risks, and constraints of proposed solutions, and recommend architectural approaches and mitigation strategies.

  • Act as the technical authority during pre-sales and solutioning, ensuring solutions align with product capabilities and implementation realities.

Functional Solutioning & Delivery Readiness

  • Translate solution architectures into clear functional scopes, assumptions, and constraints to support smooth handover from pre-sales to implementation

  • Guide proof-of-concepts (POCs) and demos, ensuring functional workflows and technical designs accurately reflect real-world use cases.

  • Collaborate closely with Product Managers and Implementation teams to ensure solutions are deliverable, scalable, and operationally sound.

  • Support audit and compliance requirements (e.g., ISO 27001, IMDA) by aligning solution designs with required security and regulatory standards.

Commercial & Operational Support

  • Support proposal development and RFP responses by contributing architectural inputs, functional solution narratives, and technical justifications.

  • Maintain clear and structured solution documentation to support internal alignment and execution.

  • Provide insights and feedback to improve solution effectiveness, proposal success, and client satisfaction.

  • Conduct structured follow-ups and engagements with potential clients to clarify business, functional, and technical requirements, validate solution assumptions, and refine solution scope throughout the pre-sales and solutioning process.

Requirements

  • 1-3 years of experience in SaaS, solution architecture, pre-sales engineering, technical consulting, or solution-focused roles.

  • Strong understanding of SaaS platforms, system architecture concepts, and integration patterns.

  • Experience gathering and translating business, functional, and technical requirements into viable solution designs.

  • Ability to reason about non-functional requirements such as scalability, security, performance, and reliability.

  • Comfortable balancing technical design with functional and operational considerations.

  • Strong English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Comfortable working closely with cross-functional teams (Sales, Product, Implementation).

  • Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple solution streams in parallel.

  • Familiarity with AI-enabled solutions, data platforms, or process automation is a plus.

  • Exposure to RFPs, client-facing solutioning, or enterprise delivery environments preferred.

  • Self-driven, proactive, and motivated to grow in both technical depth and operational impact.

Why Join Us?

  • Work on a meaningful AI-powered product that’s transforming the future of education and impacting millions of students across Southeast Asia and beyond.

  • Be part of a fast-growing company with founders who deeply care about your professional and personal growth — and who are committed to building with purpose and intelligence.

  • Get ownership and flexibility to shape how the tech + AI team grows and scales — from roadmap to architectural decisions.

Additional Information:

  • All interviews and communication will be conducted in English.

  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
title: Business Analyst

description: Deskripsi Perusahaan PT  Waschen Alora Indonesia (Alora Group) adalah sebuah entitas induk perusahan yang memiliki core business di bidang jasa kebersihan, seperti: Laundry rumah sakit (Healtcare Laundry), Penyewaan linen rumah sakit (Linen Rental), Laundry untuk Perusahaan (Corporate Laundry), Laun...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Perusahaan 

PT  Waschen Alora Indonesia (Alora Group) adalah sebuah entitas induk perusahan yang memiliki core business di bidang jasa kebersihan, seperti: Laundry rumah sakit (Healtcare Laundry), Penyewaan linen rumah sakit (Linen Rental), Laundry untuk Perusahaan (Corporate Laundry), Laundry Retail (residence), Jasa kebersihan rumah (Home Care) dan Jasa Kebersihan Kantor (Office Care). 

Kami mengundang talenta terbaik yang memiliki dedikasi, berpikiran terbuka (growth mindset) dan loyalitas untuk pengembangan karir dan pengembangan bisnis demi kemajuan bersama di masa depan. Kami tidak mencari sekadar analis data. Kami mencari “arsitek pertumbuhan”, seseorang yang mampu mengubah data menjadi strategi, dan strategi menjadi dampak nyata.  Kami mencari “problem solver berbasis data”, seseorang yang mampu melihat pola di balik angka, memahami bisnis secara mendalam, dan mengubah insight menjadi keputusan strategis.

Di peran ini, Anda akan berada di jantung pengambilan keputusan memahami apa yang benar-benar bekerja, apa yang tidak, dan ke mana kita harus melangkah berikutnya.

Tanggung Jawab (Job Description)

  1. Turn Data Into Strategic Insight

Melakukan analisis data dan riset pasar untuk memahami tren industri, kebutuhan pelanggan, posisi kompetitif perusahaan serta peluang dan area yang perlu ditingkatkan dalam operasional bisnis.

Melakukan riset dan analisis mendalam (in-depth analysis) terhadap customer, marketing metrics, competitor landscape, serta tren marketing terbaru untuk mengidentifikasi peluang dan menutup gap pada produk maupun funnel.

Menggali data operasional, data pelanggan, data pasar untuk menemukan pola, peluang, dan risiko yang tidak terlihat oleh orang lain. 

  1. Drive Decision-Making

Menyajikan insight yang tajam dan relevan untuk membantu manajemen mengambil keputusan berbasis data, bukan asumsi.

Bertanggung jawab atas fungsi analitik dengan merancang strategi pelacakan (tracking), membangun kerangka pengukuran (measurement framework), serta memberikan insight yang jelas terkait aktivitas operasional dan marketing.

Berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas fungsi untuk memberikan insight yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis.

  1. Solve Real Business Problems

Mengidentifikasi bottleneck, inefficiency, dan peluang growth dalam proses bisnis, lalu memberikan solusi yang actionable.

Mendukung pelaksanaan A/B testing dan desain eksperimen, memastikan setiap project dapat diukur dengan baik dan hasilnya valid secara statistik. 

  1. Build Data-Driven System

Mengembangkan dashboard, model analitik, dan framework pengukuran yang menjadi fondasi pengambilan keputusan perusahaan.

  1. Collaborate Across Functions

Bekerja lintas tim (Operations, Marketing, Finance, Product) untuk memastikan setiap strategi didukung oleh data yang solid.

Kualifikasi (Requirements)

  • Pendidikan minimal Diploma/Sarjana di bidang terkait (relevan).

  • Memiliki pengalaman bekerja minimal 1 s.d. 5 tahun dibidang data analyst dan business analyst (lebih diutamakan yang menguasai market research dan marketing analysis).

  • Mampu berpikir kritis dan sistematis serta mampu menghubungkan data dengan konteks bisnis.

  • Pengalaman dalam menggunakan alat analisis data (Google Analytics, Power BI, SQL, Python dan tools sejenisnya), termasuk kemampuan mengolah big data secara efisien.

  • Berpengalaman membuat dashboard menggunakan tools visualisasi data (Metabase, Tableau, Looker, Power BI atau sejenisnya).

  • Memahami berbagai channel digital marketing (iklan berbayar, SEO, referral, pertumbuhan organik, kampanye CRM).

  • Memahami statistik, analisis tren, dan machine learning dasar.

  • Kemampuan untuk bekerja dengan data besar dan kompleks. 

  • Berpikir analitis, detail-oriented, serta mampu menyajikan data secara logis.

  • Komunikatif & kolaboratif, bisa bekerja sama dengan tim marketing, sales, dan operasional.

  • Lancar berbahasa Inggris.

Kompensani dan Benefit

  • Gaji dan tunjangan yang kompetitif dengan insentif (bonus) kinerja.

  • BPJS (Asuransi kesehatan).

  • Exposure langsung ke decision-making level.

  • Lingkungan kerja yang mendorong thinking, ownership, dan impact.

  • Kesempatan berkembang menjadi future leader di bidang data, business & strategy.
title: Business Intelligence & Strategic Data Analyst

description: Kinobi AI is a Singapore-based company dedicated to transforming higher education by helping universities go beyond just academics. We focus on holistic student success, leveraging AI-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. We're looking for individuals who sha...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kinobi AI is a Singapore-based company dedicated to transforming higher education by helping universities go beyond just academics. We focus on holistic student success, leveraging AI-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. We're looking for individuals who share our vision and want to make a meaningful impact in the future of education.

Our purpose is to:

  • Empower institutions to guide their beneficiaries toward meaningful employment opportunities through AI-driven solutions

  • Demonstrate to the world that a global AI-powered B2B SaaS enterprise can be successfully built from Southeast Asia

About the Role
As a Business Analyst, you will play a key role in designing and shaping end-to-end SaaS solutions for Kinobi’s clients. This role bridges business requirements and technical execution — ensuring proposed solutions are commercially viable, functionally clear, and technically feasible.
You will work closely with Sales, Product, Engineering, and Implementation teams across pre-sales and early delivery phases. While grounded in strong business analysis fundamentals, this role also involves contributing to high-level solution architecture and supporting technical solution decisions.
This position is ideal for candidates with Business Analyst, Pre-Sales, or Technical Consulting backgrounds who want to deepen their exposure to solution architecture in a SaaS environment.

Responsibilities

Solution Architecture & Technical Ownership

  • Design and define high-level solution architectures, including system components, integrations, data flows, and deployment models.

  • Gather, analyze, and validate client business, functional, and technical requirements, including non-functional requirements such as scalability, security, performance, and reliability.

  • Assess technical feasibility, risks, and constraints of proposed solutions, and recommend architectural approaches and mitigation strategies.

  • Act as the technical authority during pre-sales and solutioning, ensuring solutions align with product capabilities and implementation realities.

Functional Solutioning & Delivery Readiness

  • Translate solution architectures into clear functional scopes, assumptions, and constraints to support smooth handover from pre-sales to implementation

  • Guide proof-of-concepts (POCs) and demos, ensuring functional workflows and technical designs accurately reflect real-world use cases.

  • Collaborate closely with Product Managers and Implementation teams to ensure solutions are deliverable, scalable, and operationally sound.

  • Support audit and compliance requirements (e.g., ISO 27001, IMDA) by aligning solution designs with required security and regulatory standards.

Commercial & Operational Support

  • Support proposal development and RFP responses by contributing architectural inputs, functional solution narratives, and technical justifications.

  • Maintain clear and structured solution documentation to support internal alignment and execution.

  • Provide insights and feedback to improve solution effectiveness, proposal success, and client satisfaction.

  • Conduct structured follow-ups and engagements with potential clients to clarify business, functional, and technical requirements, validate solution assumptions, and refine solution scope throughout the pre-sales and solutioning process.

Requirements

  • 1-3 years of experience in SaaS, solution architecture, pre-sales engineering, technical consulting, or solution-focused roles.

  • Strong understanding of SaaS platforms, system architecture concepts, and integration patterns.

  • Experience gathering and translating business, functional, and technical requirements into viable solution designs.

  • Ability to reason about non-functional requirements such as scalability, security, performance, and reliability.

  • Comfortable balancing technical design with functional and operational considerations.

  • Strong English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Comfortable working closely with cross-functional teams (Sales, Product, Implementation).

  • Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple solution streams in parallel.

  • Familiarity with AI-enabled solutions, data platforms, or process automation is a plus.

  • Exposure to RFPs, client-facing solutioning, or enterprise delivery environments preferred.

  • Self-driven, proactive, and motivated to grow in both technical depth and operational impact.

Why Join Us?

  • Work on a meaningful AI-powered product that’s transforming the future of education and impacting millions of students across Southeast Asia and beyond.

  • Be part of a fast-growing company with founders who deeply care about your professional and personal growth — and who are committed to building with purpose and intelligence.

  • Get ownership and flexibility to shape how the tech + AI team grows and scales — from roadmap to architectural decisions.

Additional Information:

  • All interviews and communication will be conducted in English.

  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Job Description:

  1. Collect, clean, and process data related to collection activities (loan aging, DPD, recovery rate, bucket movement).

  3. Analyze the effectiveness of collection strategies (call center, reminder SMS, field collection, restructuring).

  7.  Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with OJK/BI regulations.

  2. 1–2 years of experience as a Data Analyst (preferably in fintech, banking, or multifinance).

  3.  Proficient in SQL and Excel (advanced formulas, pivot tables, lookups).

  4. Skilled in data visualization tools (Power BI, Tableau, or similar).

  5. Basic knowledge of statistics (regression, segmentation, distribution).

  6. Understanding of collection processes and risk/collection KPIs is a strong plus.

  7. Good communication skills with the ability to explain insights to non-technical stakeholders.

  8. High integrity and ability to work in a fast-paced fintech environment.

As a contract position, you will be responsible for providing strategic insights and analytical support to drive the company's risk management and operational effi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking a skilled Risk Analytics & MIS professional to join our dynamic team at PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia. As a contract position, you will be responsible for providing strategic insights and analytical support to drive the company's risk management and operational efficiency. This is an excellent opportunity to contribute to the growth and success of our fintech organisation.

What you'll be doing

  1. Conduct in-depth risk analysis and develop tailored risk models to identify, assess, and mitigate potential risks

  2. Gather, analyse, and interpret complex data to generate comprehensive management information systems (MIS) reports

  3. Analyze and monitor month-to-month data trends from multiple data sources (SLIK, FDC, CBI, multiplatform, telco, KYC, etc.) to generate actionable insights and drive data-driven decisions in credit risk management

  4. Develop and test new feature engineering strategies for credit scoring models, focusing on improving predictive accuracy and model performance

  5. Conduct comprehensive evaluation and backtesting of features to ensure robustness, scalability, and alignment with business objectives in underwriting processes.

  6. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance decision-making processes and improve operational performance

  7. Develop and maintain advanced analytical tools and dashboards to provide real-time visibility into key business metrics using tools like Looker and BigQuery

  8. Stay abreast of industry trends, regulations, and best practices to ensure compliance and continuous improvement

  9. Provide strategic guidance and recommendations to senior management on risk management and operational strategies

What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 2 years of experience in risk analytics, financial analysis, or a related field

  2. Strong proficiency in data analysis, modelling with clean, readable coding style, and visualization tools (such as Python, SQL Power BI, Tableau)

  3. Strong knowledge of data science tools: Numpy, Pandas, or SciPy; expertise in at least one backend framework: Flask, Django, or Jupyter Notebook

  4. Proficiency in mainstream databases: MySQL, MongoDB, Hive SQL, or similar technologies

  5. Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and decision-making skills

  6. Proven track record of delivering impactful insights and driving operational improvements

  7. Working knowledge of financial regulations, risk management principles, and industry best practices

  8. Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Statistics, Mathematic or a related quantitative field

What we offer

At PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia, we are committed to providing a rewarding and supportive work environment. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer opportunities for professional development, collaborative work environment, and a range of benefits to promote work-life balance.

About us

PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia is a leading fintech company dedicated to driving innovation in the banking and financial services industry. With a focus on digital transformation and customer-centric solutions, we are revolutionising the way people and businesses access and manage their finances. Join our dynamic team and be a part of our exciting journey.

Apply now to become our next Risk Analytics & MIS professional!
title: Risk Analytics & MIS

description: Responsibilities:Analyze customer and transaction data to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities to improve repeat order ratio and customer engagement through critical thinking and analytical skills to challenge assumptions and provide meaningful business recommendationsMonitor and evaluate CR...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Analyze customer and transaction data to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities to improve repeat order ratio and customer engagement through critical thinking and analytical skills to challenge assumptions and provide meaningful business recommendations

  • Monitor and evaluate CRM campaign performance, providing data-driven insights and actionable recommendations to enhance business outcomes, translate complex data into clear insights and strategic recommendations for stakeholders and management

  • Conduct deep-dive analysis on customer behavior, lifecycle stages, and purchase patterns to support customer retention and repeat order growth

  • Develop and maintain performance dashboards and analytical reports to track CRM initiatives, customer experience metrics, ensure data accuracy and consistency by performing thorough validation and maintaining high attention to detail in all analyses

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Marketing, Sales, Operations, and Product) to design data-backed CRM strategies and improvement initiatives, also identify key drivers and pain points in the customer journey to improve overall customer experience and satisfaction

  • Prepare clear and compelling PowerPoint presentations to communicate analytical findings, insights, recommendations to stakeholders, and present analysis results and strategic insights in meetings with business teams and management


Qualifications:

  • Bachelor degree in any major

  • Minimum 5 years experience in Customer Relation Management (CRM) Analytics, marketing analytics, or any relevant field

  • Excellent communication and coordination capabilities including an excellent command of English & Indonesian language.

  • Strong hands-on experience with Ms. Office, CRM tools, PowerBI, Tableau, or MySQL

  • Strong analytical thinking, structured thinking, basic business & customer understanding, and agile with the flow process
title: CRM Analytics Manager

description: Unlock insights that drive business success—join our team as a Data Analyst and transform raw data into strategic decisions!What you will do:Analyze comprehensive data to support business decision-making and identify trends.Manage and process data from various sources, ensuring accuracy and complete...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Unlock insights that drive business success—join our team as a Data Analyst and transform raw data into strategic decisions!


What you will do:

  • Analyze comprehensive data to support business decision-making and identify trends.

  • Manage and process data from various sources, ensuring accuracy and completeness.

  • Develop data reports and analysis for marketing needs, providing actionable recommendations.

  • Track and monitor data quality using analysis history to enable continuous improvement


We are looking for you who:

  • Bachelor Degree in Mathematic, Statistic, Data Science or any related field.

  • Minimum 1 year of experience as a Data Analyst or Data Specialist

  • Proficient in data cleansing, processing, reporting, and dashboard creation.

  • Understanding of e-commerce metrics and business (GMV, Traffic, Conversion Rate, Average Order Value, etc.).

  • Familiar with seller center tools on marketplaces.

  • Able to work quickly, meticulously, and accurately.

  • Strong skills in Excel and Google Sheets (advanced formulas, tools, and macros).


What you will get :

  • Accelerated growth & plenty of learning opportunities.

  • Demanding & Supportive environment.

description: Tanggung Jawab UtamaMerancang Visualisasi: Membangun dan memelihara dasbor interaktif di Looker Studio untuk menerjemahkan data menjadi wawasan bisnis.Merekayasa Aliran Data: Mengoptimalkan query SQL di BigQuery untuk mengubah data mentah menjadi model siap analisis.Analisis Terprogram: Menggunakan ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tanggung Jawab Utama

Merancang Visualisasi: Membangun dan memelihara dasbor interaktif di Looker Studio untuk menerjemahkan data menjadi wawasan bisnis.

Merekayasa Aliran Data: Mengoptimalkan query SQL di BigQuery untuk mengubah data mentah menjadi model siap analisis.

Analisis Terprogram: Menggunakan Python (Pandas/NumPy) untuk pembersihan data, otomatisasi, dan analisis statistik tingkat lanjut.

Kolaborasi & Versioning: Menggunakan Git untuk kontrol versi, branching, dan peer review bersama tim.

Persyaratan Teknis

Penguasaan SQL: Ahli dalam BigQuery SQL, termasuk window functions, CTE, partitioning, dan clustering.

Keahlian BI: Berpengalaman dengan Business Intelligence (khususnya Looker Studio), termasuk data blending dan calculated fields.

Kemahiran Python: Andal menggunakan Python untuk manipulasi data dan otomatisasi alur kerja.

Pemodelan Data: Paham prinsip Star Schema dan denormalisasi untuk optimasi kinerja BI.

Kefasihan Git: Terbiasa dengan alur kerja branching, merging, dan pull requests.

Pola Pikir Analitis & Logika Bisnis

Penyusunan KPI: Mampu mendefinisikan dan membangun metrik untuk Produk, Rantai Pasok, dan Perilaku Pelanggan.

Literasi Statistik: Mampu membedakan sinyal dan noise, serta familier dengan uji hipotesis dan analisis tren.

Logika Spasial & Fuzzy: Berpengalaman menangani inkonsistensi data menggunakan algoritma string similarity atau fungsi geospasial.

1. Melakukan konsolidasi, validasi dan pengolahan data kinerja dari berbagai unit kerja

  2. Menyusun dan mengelola dashboard serta laporan monitoring KPI secara berkala

  3. Melakukan analisis gap antara target dan realisasi kinerja serta mengidentifikasi potensi penyebabnya

  4. Menyajikan insight berbasis data sebagai bahan evaluasi manajemen

  5. Memastikan standarisasi definisi KPI dan konsistensi pelaporan lintas fungsi

  6. Mendukung forum evaluasi kinerja dengan penyediaan data dan analisa yang akurat

  7. Melakukan monitoring siklus PDCA dari sisi dokumentasi dan tracking progres

 

Persyaratan

  1. Pendidikan lulusan S1 dari jurusan Ekonomi Manajemen, Teknik dan jurusan lainnya

  1. Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 3 tahun di bidang Data Performance / Business Analyst / Corporate Planning

  2. Memahami konsep PDCA, performance monitoring dan KPI management

  3. Mahir menggunakan Microsoft Excel dan tools visualisasi data

  4. Memiliki kemampuan analitis yang kuat dan detail oriented

  5. Terbiasa melakukan pengolahan dan interpretasi data

  6. Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim

Work closely with warehouse operators, leaders, management...
jobDescriptionHtml:
This role will perform data analysis in logistic area, ensuring inventory accuracy, utilizing the SAP system in the logistics operation, and be a hands-on team member to ensure all required steps and data are posted accurately in SAP system. Work closely with warehouse operators, leaders, management staff and logistic co-workers to ensure establishment of logistic processes as per standard, implementation and lead continuous improvement of processes in the Logistics area. Collect warehouse, transport, 3PL data, and perform pick-pack, storage, & delivery transactions in SAP system. Develop and conduct regular audits. Determine the root cause of data failure/issues, and recommend changes in design or processing methods.


Requirement:

• Degree in Engineering (Chemical, Industrial, etc), Science, Logistics, Transportation or related field and

• Min 3 years of experience in a logistic warehouse, Warehouse Specialist and Supply Chain Data Analyst

• Experienced and high capability to use SAP in the logistics area is a must

• Understanding logistic processes & data posting in SAP system is a must

• Strong knowledge of establishing the right working procedure and implementation of ground logistics processes

• Strong in data analytics to get the insight & drive further improvement

• Fluent in English

• Placement in Cikarang

description: Job Description:1. Data Input & MaintenanceInput master data (user access, geography, vehicle types, equipment types, etc.) into the system in accordance with established procedures.Perform data updates whenever changes occur.2. Data Validation & ControlEnsure that all input data is accurate, comple...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

1. Data Input & Maintenance

  • Input master data (user access, geography, vehicle types, equipment types, etc.) into the system in accordance with established procedures.

  • Perform data updates whenever changes occur.

2. Data Validation & Control

  • Ensure that all input data is accurate, complete, and compliant with defined standards (no duplicates or typographical errors).

  • Check data consistency across systems (e.g., ERP, HRIS, and others).

3. Monitoring & Reporting

  • Prepare routine reports related to master data status (e.g., number of updated user accesses).

  • Provide basic insights to support data quality improvement.

  • Monitor compliance of master data input against existing guidelines.

  • Update guidelines in line with the latest business requirements.

  • Review compliance results and improvement actions with data owners.

4. Support

  • Provide valid and reliable data to support operational activities.

5. Compliance & Governance

  • Implement standard operating procedures (SOPs) for master data management.

  • Ensure data confidentiality and security in accordance with company policies.


Requirements

  • Education : Minimum Diploma Degree (D3).

  • Major : Engineering, preferably Industrial Engineering.

  • GPA : Minimum 3.00.

  • Experience : Minimum 1 year in a similar role (fresh graduates are welcome).

  • Demonstrated attention to detail, discipline, and accuracy.

  • Proficient in using Excel/Google Sheets, ERP systems, or databases.

  • Good communication skills and ability to collaborate with other departments.

  • Basic understanding of data management (an advantage).

  • Key Competencies : Consistency, problem-solving and analytical skills, integrity, and a strong sense of responsibility.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities

  • Vendor Management & Cost Control: Identify, evaluate, and maintain relationships with technical service providers, including Cloud Services, e-Signature platforms, and SMS Gateways. Perform price comparisons and lead negotiations to ensure cost-efficiency.

  • Market Expansion: Proactively seek new business opportunities and support marketing-related initiatives to increase company presence in the local market.

  • AI Integration & Workflow Optimization: Utilize mainstream AI tools and AI agent(such as ChatGPT, Claude, Manus, or specialized productivity AI) to automate routine tasks, draft business proposals, and optimize internal operational processes.

  • Stakeholder Maintenance: Act as the primary point of contact for external partners, ensuring service quality and contract compliance.

  • Reporting: Monitor market trends in the Indonesian SaaS/PaaS landscape and provide regular insights to management regarding cost-saving opportunities.

Requirements

  • AI Proficiency: Strong command of mainstream AI tools. Experience in prompt engineering or using AI to improve work productivity is highly preferred.

  • Experience: 1–2 years of professional experience in Business Development, Procurement, or Marketing. Ambitious Fresh graduates with exposure to AI tools are welcome to apply

  • Language Skills: Fluency in English and Bahasa Indonesia (both written and verbal) is mandatory for business negotiations and contract reviews.

Kami membuka kesempatan berkarier di sister company PT Inti Berkat Jaya, sebagai Business Analyst & Representative. PT Inti Berkat Jaya merupakan perusahaan yang dinamis, terus berkembang pesat dan berekspansi secara cepat. Berfokus dalam kegiatan digital marketing dan distribusi brand-brand premium di Indonesia serta didominasi oleh tim-tim muda yang kreatif dan senantiasa mengembangkan diri.

Saat ini, kami sedang mencari tim Business Analyst & Representative yang memiliki peran strategis dalam mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis serta menjalin komunikasi dengan berbagai stakeholder. Posisi ini terbuka bagi kandidat yang detail, komunikatif, terbiasa menggunakan Bahasa Inggris, serta memiliki kemampuan analisis yang baik dalam melihat peluang dan perkembangan bisnis.

Tugas & Tanggung Jawab :

  • Menganalisa data penjualan dsb

  • Menganalisa kompetitor

  • Membuat presentasi kepada principal serta mepresentasikannya

  • Membuat perkiraan penjualan beserta dengan qty yang perlu diorder

Persyaratan :

  • Minimal S1 semua jurusan dengan IPK 3.00

  • Fasih dalam Ms. Excel (Google Sheet ataupun Ms Excel)

  • Memiliki kemampuan mendengar & berbicara bahasa inggris dengan baik

  • Language Skills: Fluency in English and Bahasa Indonesia (both written and verbal) is mandatory for business negotiations and contract reviews.

  • Analytical Mindset: Strong attention to detail with a focus on cost-benefit analysis and data-driven decision-making.

  • Core Competencies: Excellent communication skills, proactive attitude, and a high degree of adaptability in a fast-paced environment.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Descriptions:

• Analyze transactional and operational data from pharmacy retail and clinic systems.

• Develop and maintain regular performance reports and dashboards.

• Support business teams with insights on sales, margin, inventory, and patient visits.

• Identify trends, gaps, and improvement opportunities in business processes.

• Support forecasting for transaction volume, demand, and capacity planning.

• Assist in defining and monitoring business KPIs.

• Work closely with operations, finance, and management teams to support initiatives and projects.

• Provide ad-hoc analysis to support strategic and operational decisions.

• Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Business, Pharmacy, or related fields.

• Minimum 1–3 years experience in Data Analyst, Business Analyst, or Business Support role.

• Experience in retail, healthcare, pharmacy, or regulated industries is a strong advantage.

• Strong analytical and structured thinking.

• Advanced proficiency in Excel / Google Sheets.

description: Job SummaryWe are looking for a highly analytical, agile, and detail-oriented Data Analyst to join our Livestream team. This role is crucial in transforming raw data from every live session into actionable insights that drive Gross Merchandise Value (GMV), optimize viewer engagement, and empower the...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Summary

We are looking for a highly analytical, agile, and detail-oriented Data Analyst to join our Livestream team. This role is crucial in transforming raw data from every live session into actionable insights that drive Gross Merchandise Value (GMV), optimize viewer engagement, and empower the production team and hosts to make data-driven decisions.


Responsibilities

  • Daily Performance Analysis : Monitor and analyze key metrics from livestream sessions in real-time and post-live including Traffic, Watch Time, Click Through Rate (CTR), Conversion Rate (CR), GMV, etc

  • Content & Product Optimization : Collaborate closely with Livestream Trainer to evaluate top-selling products, identify high-retention segments, and provide data-backed recommendations for product bundling and flash sales

  • Dashboard Development & Reporting : Design, build, and maintain interactive daily and weekly reporting dashboards for the operational team using advanced spreadsheets, Tableau, Power BI, or Looker

  • Audience Profiling : Analyze audience demographics, purchasing behavior, and interaction patterns to determine optimal broadcasting schedules (peak hours)

  • A/B Testing & Experimentation : Design and measure the outcomes of livestream experiments, such as testing different thumbnail designs, stream titles, or host promotional styles.

  • Market Research : Monitor competitor and platform livestreaming trends (TikTok Shop, Shopee Live, etc)


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Statistics/Information Systems or a related quantitative field

  • Experience: 2-3 years of proven experience as Data Analyst. Background in E-commerce, Digital Marketing or an MCN (Multi-Channel Network) is a strong plus.

  • Highly proficient in Spreadsheets/Excel (comfortable with complex formulas, pivot tables, and large dataset manipulation).

  • Strong knowledge of SQL for database extraction and querying.

  • Hands-on experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, Google Looker Studio).

  • Excellent communication skills; ability to translate complex quantitative data into clear, actionable terms for creative teams and hosts.

  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adapt quickly to dynamic platform trends.

  • Strong business acumen to understand how data metrics directly impact revenue goals.
title: Data Analyst - Livestream

description: Role PurposeThis role exists to turn high-volume order-receiving data into meaningful insights. You will analyze thousands of incoming order records to identify patterns, risks, and performance drivers related to order accuracy, timing, channels, and data quality—supporting better decisions at the f...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Role Purpose

This role exists to turn high-volume order-receiving data into meaningful insights. You will analyze thousands of incoming order records to identify patterns, risks, and performance drivers related to order accuracy, timing, channels, and data quality—supporting better decisions at the front end of the order lifecycle.

This is a pure analytics role, not an order entry or processing position.


Job Scope

  • Analyze large datasets of incoming orders across multiple channels (sales, distributors, digital, EDI, etc.).

  • Identify trends, patterns, anomalies, and root causes related to order errors, duplicates, delays, and data inconsistencies into actionable strategies

  • Build and maintain analytical dashboards and insight reports for order-receiving performance.

  • Translate complex datasets into clear insights and narratives for operations, sales, and management to drive business.

  • Develop data-driven recommendations to address issues, improve efficiency, and optimize order intake.

  • Perform deep-dive analysis on order quality, demand signals, and customer behavior.

  • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity in all analytical outputs.

  • Continuously refine KPIs and analytical frameworks for order-receiving performance.


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Data Analytics, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related fields.

  • 3+ years experience in data analytics, preferably in sales operations or order management environments.

  • Strong skills in Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, etc.).

  • Proven experience handling high-volume transactional data.

  • Strong analytical thinking and data storytelling skills.

  • Minimum 2-3 years of experience in data analysis, sales data management, or a similar role

  • Strong proficiency in Oracle, SQL, and database management

  • Skilled in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word), data visualization, and reporting tools

  • Experience with data collection, analysis, modeling, and visualization

  • Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail

Job Descriptions:

  • Collect, clean, and analyze sales data from various sources to ensure accuracy and completeness

  • Develop and maintain data models, dashboards, and reports for sales performance monitoring

  • Perform statistical analysis, including regression and hypothesis testing, to identify patterns and correlations

  • Write SQL queries and create data visualizations for reporting and business intelligence

  • Provide actionable insights and recommendations to stakeholders for improving sales strategies

  • Ensure data integrity and consistency throughout the analysis and reporting process
title: General Trade Data Analyst

description: Responsibilities:- Responsible for evaluating the credit worthiness of new credit applicants and monitoring the ongoing financial performance of existing credit customers.- Overseeing & executing the end to end process of model training, including data preparation, feature analysis, parameter tuning...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:
- Responsible for evaluating the credit worthiness of new credit applicants and monitoring the ongoing financial performance of existing credit customers.
- Overseeing & executing the end to end process of model training, including data preparation, feature analysis, parameter tuning, and model evaluation, to ensure the accurate and effective credit score.
- Generate & implement new features by thorough analysis, aimed at enhancing model AUC.
- Responsible as PIC of modelling part for responding to regulator or partner in relates with audit or part of partnership cooperation.
- Study business operations and the local market to make determinations about its ongoing competitive outlook.
- Ensure compliance to all policies and standards and ensure full audit readiness at all times.

Requirements:
- Minimum 2 years of experience in credit risk analysis. More experienced candidates may be considered for lead positions.
- Bachelor Degree and above in Finance, Computer Science, Statistics, Economics, or other relevant fields.
- Excellent analytical thinking and solid experience in data management.
- Comfortable with ambiguity and yet able to steer analytics projects toward clear business goals, testable hypotheses and action-oriented outcomes.
- Working experience in Retail/Institutional Banking, Consumer/SME Finance, Supply Chain Finance, e-Commerce, Consulting or Credit Ratings Agency will be an advantage
- Proficiency in SQL or/and Python is a must
- English oral communication is a must.
- Mandarin ability is a plus.

- Working experience in Retail/Institutional Banking, Consumer/SME Finance, Supply Chain Finance, e-Commerce, Consulting or Credit Ratings Agency will be an advantage
- Proficiency in SQL or/and Python is a must
- English oral communication is a must.
- Mandarin ability is a plus.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan :

  • Melaksanakan analisa laboratorium untuk sampel produksi (blending) dan permintaan khusus secara akurat serta tepat waktu.

  • Melakukan pengembangan dan optimasi formulasi lab blend sesuai spesifikasi produk.

  • Menjamin keakuratan, konsistensi, dan ketertelusuran data hasil analisa.

  • Mengidentifikasi penyimpangan serta melakukan investigasi awal (analisa penyebab).

  • Menjaga keandalan instrumen melalui perawatan rutin dan troubleshooting dasar.

  • Berkontribusi dalam program peningkatan berkelanjutan (continuous improvement) di laboratorium. 

Kualifikasi : 

  • Pendidikan minimal D3 Kimia atau bidang terkait

  • Pengalaman 1 – 3 tahun di laboratorium (fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar)

  • Memahami spesifikasi material dan produk

  • Mampu mengoperasikan instrumen dan metode pengujian laboratorium

  • Memahami standar ISO 17025 dan ISO 9001:2015

  • Mampu membaca dan memahami dokumen teknis berbahasa Inggris

  • Menguasai penggunaan MS Office (minimal Excel)

  • Teliti, analitis, dan memiliki integritas tinggi

  • Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan dan memenuhi target waktu

  • Bersedia ditempatkan di area Cilegon - Banten 

Nilai Tambah: 

  • Pengalaman di industri pelumas / kimia

  • Familiar dengan sistem QC / QA

  • Pernah terlibat dalam audit laboratorium atau sistem kalibrasi 

Benefit/Facility :

  • BPJSTK & BPJS Kesehatan

  • THR

  • Reimbursement Medical

  • Bantuan makan ( catering )

title: General Trade Data Analyst

description: Excelitas® is a leading provider of advanced, life-enriching technologies that make a difference, serving global market leaders in the life sciences, advanced industrial, next-generation semiconductor and avionics end markets. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA, USA, Excelitas is an essential partner i...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Excelitas® is a leading provider of advanced, life-enriching technologies that make a difference, serving global market leaders in the life sciences, advanced industrial, next-generation semiconductor and avionics end markets. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA, USA, Excelitas is an essential partner in the design, development and manufacture of advanced technologies, offering leading-edge innovation in sensing, detection, imaging, optics and specialty illumination for customers worldwide.


Excelitas is at the forefront of addressing many of the relevant megatrends impacting the world today, including precision medicine, industrial automation, artificial intelligence, and connected devices (IoT).


Our facility in Batam, Indonesia specializes in the production of lighting and detection product technologies including our Specialty Lamps for industrial and photonics applications, IPL Lamps and Trigger Coils, as well as Infra-Red Detectors (IRD), Sensor Modules and Pyro-electric Ceramic Wafers. Operating since September 1994, this site is also responsible for manufacturing of our Thermopile Sensors (TPS), Thermopile modules (TPM), CCD Sensors and Printed Circuit Board Assemblies.


We are presently seeking a Test Development Engineer who will be responsible to develop, sustain and improve process of production in his/her designated area, creates process documentation, and solve process issues by using process engineering skills.


Key responsibilities:

  • Develop new test systems using advanced technologies to meet product and customer requirements.

  • Improve and optimize existing testers to achieve faster, more stable, and efficient performance.

  • Perform failure analysis to ensure product quality and troubleshoot tester/equipment issues to support smooth production operations.

  • Evaluate, verify, and provide technical support to R&D, NPI, and QA, especially in areas related to testability and result validation.

  • Prepare and maintain tester documentation, including test reports, buyoff documents, GRR, and MSA evaluations.

  • Qualify new or relocated equipment and validate testing processes used in manufacturing; analyze results and prepare qualification reports.

  • Drive process improvements to enhance efficiency in test operations and monitor testing yields using statistical techniques.

  • Provide training, guidance, and technical support to test operators and technicians.

  • Monitor and control tester performance through data analysis to prevent quality issues and reduce downtime.

  • Ensure compliance with all procedures related to quality, environmental, health, and safety (QEHS) management systems within the work area.

  • Comply with procedure related with quality, environment, health, and safety management system in respective area in-charge.


Requirements:

·       Bachelor’s degree (S1/D4) in Electronics Engineering, Physics Engineering, or Instrumentation.

·       Proficient in programming languages such as C#, C++, SQL, and HTML.

·       Strong understanding of Data Acquisition Systems (VISA, GPIB, RS232) and basic Image Processing.

·       Experience in tester development, embedded systems, and conduct failure analysis.

·       Solid knowledge of electronic fundamentals and hands‑on experience using laboratory equipment (oscilloscope, function generator, lux meter, etc.).

·       Ability to learn and understand new-generation products and technologies.

·       Capable of resolving technical and quality issues related to test programs, including proper documentation and coordination with stakeholders.

·       Fluent in spoken and written English.
title: Test Development Engineer
