description: Peluang Menarik di PT SerebrumPT Serebrum , sebuah perusahaan baru teknologi di Indonesia, sedang mencari talenta terbaik untuk bergabung dengan kami sebagai Full-Stack AI Engineer. Dalam peran ini, anda akan bertanggung jawab membangun aplikasi berbasis AI secara end‑to‑end. Tugas ini mencakup pera...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Peluang Menarik di PT Serebrum
PT Serebrum , sebuah perusahaan baru teknologi di Indonesia, sedang mencari talenta terbaik untuk bergabung dengan kami sebagai Full-Stack AI Engineer. Dalam peran ini, anda akan bertanggung jawab membangun aplikasi berbasis AI secara end‑to‑end. Tugas ini mencakup perancangan arsitektur dan integrasi model AI, pengembangan sistem backend yang andal, serta pembuatan antarmuka pengguna (UI) yang intuitif untuk berinteraksi dengan fitur AI.

Tanggung Jawab Anda

  • AI Integration: Mengintegrasikan model AI (melalui API seperti OpenAI/Anthropic atau model open‑source via Hugging Face) ke dalam aplikasi.

  • Backend Development: Membangun API yang robust, mengelola database (SQL/NoSQL), serta menggunakan vector databases (misalnya ChromaDB, Pinecone) untuk kebutuhan RAG (Retrieval‑Augmented Generation).

  • Frontend Development: Mengembangkan dashboard atau interface yang responsif dan ramah pengguna agar interaksi dengan fitur AI berjalan lancar.

  • Optimization: Melakukan prompt engineering, fine‑tuning ringan, serta optimasi performa dan latensi pada sisi backend maupun frontend.

Kualifikasi yang Kami Cari

  • Gelar Sarjana atau setara dalam Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait

  • Minimal 2 tahun pengalaman sebagai Full-Stack Developer atau AI Engineer

  • Bahasa Pemrograman: Python (untuk AI/Backend) dan JavaScript/TypeScript (untuk Frontend).

  • Framework AI: Pengalaman dengan LangChain, LlamaIndex, atau CrewAI. Pengetahuan dasar PyTorch/TensorFlow menjadi nilai tambah.

  • Backend: Familiar dengan framework seperti FastAPI, Flask, atau Node.js.

  • Frontend: Menguasai library modern seperti React.js serta styling dengan Tailwind CSS.

  • Data Storage: Memahami database relasional (PostgreSQL) dan vector database.

  • Tools: Docker, Git, serta layanan Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure).

  • Kemampuan problem‑solving yang baik.

  • Rasa ingin tahu dan kemampuan riset mandiri untuk memahami bagaimana fitur AI dapat memberikan nilai bagi pengguna.

Keuntungan Bekerja di PT Serebrum

  • Gaji kompetitif dan tunjangan menarik

  • BPJS Kesehatan & Ketenagakerjaan

  • Lingkungan kerja yang kolaboratif dan mendukung inovasi

  • Kesempatan untuk terlibat dalam proyek-proyek teknologi terkini

Tentang PT Serebrum
PT Serebrum adalah startup teknologi inovatif yang berfokus pada pengembangan ekosistem solusi IT cerdas. Mengambil inspirasi dari Cerebrum—pusat integrasi fungsi intelektual manusia—kami hadir untuk menjadi "otak" penggerak transformasi digital bagi bisnis dan masyarakat.

Kami percaya bahwa teknologi bukan sekadar alat bantu, melainkan mitra strategis. PT Serebrum berkomitmen untuk menjembatani kesenjangan antara kompleksitas data dengan kebutuhan praktis industri melalui pemanfaatan Artificial Intelligence (AI) dan rekayasa perangkat lunak yang presisi

Tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami? Lamar sekarang dan jadilah bagian dari perjalanan transformasi digital kami!
title: Full-Stack AI Engineer

description: Company DescriptionViahart was founded in 2010. We are an innovative consumer products company. We design, manufacture, and distribute consumer products ranging from educational toys & sporting goods to cell phone & AI-powered electronic accessories. We also offer innovative logistics and manufactur...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description

Viahart was founded in 2010. We are an innovative consumer products company. We design, manufacture, and distribute consumer products ranging from educational toys & sporting goods to cell phone & AI-powered electronic accessories. We also offer innovative logistics and manufacturing services. Because we sell worldwide and make our products in different countries (not just China), we’ve built a base to navigate tariffs and changes in global trade. The company is not owned by private equity and the owners, employees, and their families use the products we make. Our business has been featured in the Wall Street Journal, on television (CNBC and NBC), and in the New York Times. Learn more about our company at https://viahart.com/

Job Responsibilities

  • Forecasting sales and inventory for purchasing

  • Optimizing our inventory across multiple locations

  • Monitoring our sales vs. forecasts and seasonality patterns

  • Determining the root cause of inventory discrepancies

  • Pricing our products in the US, for retail stores, and for international sales

  • Checking the algorithms, calculations, and logic of our in-house custom built software (spreadsheet formulas required, programming is not)

  • Commenting and explaining any (spreadsheet) code or algorithms you write

  • Monitoring the profitability of our products

  • Simplifying the logic in our software both in our spreadsheets and with our developer

  • Building data dashboards

  • Logging data

  • Using data to determine causality and identify issues that need our attention

  • Updating process documents (SOP) so others know how to use the analysis and systems you have built

Skills required

  • Clear written and verbal English communication

  • Strong mathematical skills

  • Proficiency with spreadsheet formulas (Google Sheets, Excel)

  • Ability to understand the logic of software systems (coding not required, except for formulas)

  • Ability to use AI tools effectively, using reasoning and strong verification skills

  • Love numbers and be able to identify the relationship between them and what is happening the real world

  • High attention of detail and strong sense of responsibility for the quality of your work

  • Self-motivated and able to work independently

Location

  • You may start remote and then transition to an in-office position in Sudirman business district (Indonesia), 5 days a week

  • You must be able to join our semi-weekly 9 AM Texas Time meeting when needed. (9PM Indonesia Time) (no longer than 30 minutes)


Work commitment and availability required.

This is a full-time position requiring a minimum of 40 hours a week of good work! This position is not compatible with activities or commitments that limit daily availability. Candidates must be able to work consistently during agreed working hours and be available during the workday. If you cannot commit to a full-time schedule, this role will not be a fit for you.

Compensation and Benefits

  • You will be paid in USD ($1,940 to $2,531USD a month)

  • Yearly bonus: Performance-based bonuses are reviewed early February, typically ranging from 0% to 15% of annual salary.

  • We offer 16 business days of paid vacation anually.

    • We replaced public holidays with extra paid time off allowing you to choose when you take time off rather than following a calendar!

We may conduct reference checks as part of our hiring process to ensure we bring on honest, hardworking, and capable people.
title: Forecasting & Profitability Analyst

description: The Data Processor (Remote) plays a critical role in the daily operations of the Survey Department, ensuring efficient data flow between offshore and onshore teams and providing accurate to support project delivery, compliance, and long-term data management.Duties & ResponsibilitiesAssist with proce...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Processor (Remote) plays a critical role in the daily operations of the Survey Department, ensuring efficient data flow between offshore and onshore teams and providing accurate to support project delivery, compliance, and long-term data management.


Duties & Responsibilities

  • Assist with processing of survey data and charting

  • Restore, verify, archive, and remove data on the office server

  • Maintain and manage data storage systems to ensure proper transfer, archiving, and deletion

  • Assist with backup and removal of survey data onboard vessels

  • Take initiative to improve data management solutions in collaboration with IT

  • Propose and implement new methods or equipment to enhance processing efficiency and data quality

  • Support the vessel reporting team in producing and delivering final reports and data packages

  • Prepare survey data, charts, and required digital deliverables according to guidelines

  • Ensure all processing work is backed up with complete processing logs


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Geodesy/Geomatics or related fields

  • Skills in AutoCAD Map, GIS software (ArcGIS, QGIS), and EIVA bathymetry software are an advantage

title: Data Processor (Remote)

description: The Data Processor (Remote) plays a critical role in the daily operations of the Survey Department, ensuring efficient data flow between offshore and onshore teams and providing accurate to support project delivery, compliance, and long-term data management.Duties & ResponsibilitiesAssist with proce...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Processor (Remote) plays a critical role in the daily operations of the Survey Department, ensuring efficient data flow between offshore and onshore teams and providing accurate to support project delivery, compliance, and long-term data management.


Duties & Responsibilities

  • Assist with processing of survey data and charting

  • Restore, verify, archive, and remove data on the office server

  • Maintain and manage data storage systems to ensure proper transfer, archiving, and deletion

  • Assist with backup and removal of survey data onboard vessels

  • Take initiative to improve data management solutions in collaboration with IT

  • Propose and implement new methods or equipment to enhance processing efficiency and data quality

  • Support the vessel reporting team in producing and delivering final reports and data packages

  • Prepare survey data, charts, and required digital deliverables according to guidelines

  • Ensure all processing work is backed up with complete processing logs


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Geodesy/Geomatics or related fields

  • Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply, having exposure to hydrography will be preferred (i.e. experienced as Hydrography Lecturers Assistant, experienced in university hydrographic related projects, research/thesis related to hydrography, etc)

  • Fluent in English, proven with TOEFL/IELTS score

  • Skills in AutoCAD Map, GIS software (ArcGIS, QGIS), and EIVA bathymetry software are an advantage

  • Willing to work from office in shift schedule (8 working hours each)

  • Fulltime contract-based position

description: The Principal Product Manager for Discovery & Personalisation will own how subscribers find, explore and return to The Economist's journalism across web and app. This is a senior, cross-cutting role spanning two closely related disciplines:Discovery. Owning the on-platform representation of our cont...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Principal Product Manager for Discovery & Personalisation will own how subscribers find, explore and return to The Economist's journalism across web and app. This is a senior, cross-cutting role spanning two closely related disciplines:

Discovery. Owning the on-platform representation of our content - search, navigation, browse patterns and conversational interfaces that allow users to interrogate the archive and find authoritative journalism efficiently. This includes keyword and semantic search, ranking and surfacing logic, and generative AI features such as Q&A, content summarisation and conversational discovery experiences. A key part of this work is establishing the evaluation frameworks and human-in-the-loop processes that ensure AI-powered features are grounded in user trust and consistent with our editorial brand.       

Personalisation. Owning the recommendation and ranking algorithms that drive browse-led experiences — helping subscribers decide what to read, watch or listen to next. This means defining the behavioural signals and contextual inputs that feed personalisation models, partnering with data science on model development and evaluation, and ensuring our systems support habit formation without narrowing editorial perspective.

 The role interfaces with Web, App, Data science, Editorial and Analytics teams.

Responsibilities

  • Own the vision and roadmap for Discovery & Personalisation across web and app.

  • Lead the evolution of keyword and semantic search, including relevance, ranking and result quality.

  • Own browse-led personalisation systems — defining the signals, models and decisioning logic that surface relevant, timely content for individual subscribers.

  • Lead the creation of generative AI features including Q&A, content summarisation, explainer and conversational discovery experiences that help users explore and connect our journalism.

  • Establish robust evaluation frameworks and human-in-the-loop processes to ensure AI-powered features are accurate, transparent and aligned with our editorial values.

  • Partner closely with data science on the definition, evaluation and iteration of ranking and recommendation models.

  • Maintain strong judgement around responsible, transparent and editorially-aligned personalisation — preserving journalistic breadth and integrity.

  • Work closely with Editorial to ensure discovery and personalisation reflect journalistic judgement and trust, and that the right feedback loops are in place.

  • Collaborate with Web and App teams to ensure consistent, high-quality implementation of discovery and personalisation experiences across platforms.

  • Define and track success metrics related to findability, relevance, engagement, habit formation and trust.

  • Communicate strategy, priorities and performance clearly to senior stakeholders across product, editorial and technology.

The ideal skills for this role are:

  • Builder: You have owned and shipped complex search, discovery, recommendation or personalisation systems in content-rich or subscription products.

  • AI-fluent: You have hands-on experience defining and evaluating generative AI features — you understand the product, trust and editorial considerations that make AI experiences succeed or fail.

  • Data-informed: Comfortable working with data scientists on ML-driven systems, evaluation frameworks and experimentation.

  • Product-led: Strong judgement in defining strategy, translating it into roadmaps, and delivering outcomes through cross-functional teams in lean environments.

  • Editorially-aware: Confident balancing user intent, algorithmic optimisation and editorial integrity.

  • Communicator: Able to explain complex systems and trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

  • Collaborative: Comfortable learning, iterating and working across disciplines — engineering, data science, design and editorial — in a fast-moving environment.

Domain knowledge

  • Search and discovery systems, including semantic retrieval, ranking and evaluation.

  • Personalisation systems, behavioral signals and experimentation.

  • Generative AI product development and conversational interface best practices.

  • Responsible AI, algorithmic transparency and human-in-the-loop design.

  • Metrics for discovery quality, relevance, user understanding and trust.

  • Subscription or habit-forming digital products.

  • Multi-format digital content environments.

  • Enthusiasm for The Economist's mission, journalism and global audience.
title: Principal Product Manager - Discovery and Personalisation

description: Growth opportunities: progression path from 7×24 Asset Administrator → 5×8 Asset Administrator → Asset Manager.Job Responsibilities:Assist in managing data center warehouse assets, including inbound and outbound inventory handling.Maintain accurate asset records, ensure timely updates of stock data,...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Growth opportunities: progression path from 7×24 Asset Administrator → 5×8 Asset Administrator → Asset Manager.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Assist in managing data center warehouse assets, including inbound and outbound inventory handling.

  • Maintain accurate asset records, ensure timely updates of stock data, and support audit requirements.

  • Handle basic hardware equipment (e.g. servers, network devices) — asset tagging, inspection, and reporting.

  • Coordinate with internal teams on asset movement, delivery, and return processes.

  • Support the asset manager in daily warehouse operations and documentation.

  • Participate in 24/7 shift rotation and on-call support schedule as required.

  • Participate in continuous learning and skill development related to IT hardware and asset management.

Basic Job Requirement:

  • 1-3 years of related industry experience and at least 3 years of work experience

  • Familiar with common data center equipment (switches, servers), components and consumables (optical modules, boards, fibers); warehouse management experience; familiar with warehouse environmental requirements and dust/moisture prevention measures; good at proactively identifying and solving problems; conceptual understanding of IDC asset lifecycle from warehousing to decommissioning.

  • Responsible and detail-oriented, with strong organizational skills.

  • Diverse educational backgrounds are welcome — IT-related majors are preferred.

  • Must have Chinese Language Proficiency
title: Data Center Warehouse Executive

description:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan
 Key Responsibilities
Pipeline Development: Design, develop, and maintain robust ETL/ELT (Extract, Transform, Load) pipelines to move data from operational databases and external APIs into our data warehouse.
Data Modeling: Architect scalable data models (Star Schema, Snowflake, ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan Key Responsibilities
  • Pipeline Development: Design, develop, and maintain robust ETL/ELT (Extract, Transform, Load) pipelines to move data from operational databases and external APIs into our data warehouse.
  • Data Modeling: Architect scalable data models (Star Schema, Snowflake, Data Vault) to ensure high performance and ease of use for end-users.
  • Infrastructure Management: Manage cloud-based data environments (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and orchestrate workflows using tools like Apache Airflow or Prefect.
  • Data Quality & Governance: Implement automated testing and monitoring to ensure data integrity, security, and compliance with privacy regulations (GDPR/CCPA).
  • Collaboration: Partner with Data Scientists to prepare "feature stores" and with Business Intelligence (BI) Analysts to optimize query performance.
Required Qualifications
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
  • Proven experience as a Data Engineer or similar role
  • Strong proficiency in SQL and database management (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL)
  • Experience with programming languages such as Python, Java, or Scala
  • Hands-on experience with ETL tools and data pipeline frameworks
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure)
  • Understanding of data warehousing concepts and modeling (e.g., star/snowflake schema)
Preferred Qualifications
  • Experience with big data technologies (e.g., Apache Spark, Hadoop)
  • Knowledge of workflow orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow)
  • Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
  • Experience with streaming data (e.g., Kafka)
  • Understanding of data security and compliance standards

description: We’re a music-tech startup on the rise, based in Europe and growing our engineering team mainly in Indonesia. We’re moving fast, building ambitious products, and we need a backend dev who loves making things scalable, fast, and reliable.This is a full-time remote role (160h/month) with the chance to...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We’re a music-tech startup on the rise, based in Europe and growing our engineering team mainly in Indonesia. We’re moving fast, building ambitious products, and we need a backend dev who loves making things scalable, fast, and reliable.

This is a full-time remote role (160h/month) with the chance to become a permanent team member after a few months.

🎯 What You’ll Do

  • Build and ship fast APIs and microservices with Python + FastAPI (and occasionally Django where it fits best).

  • Write clean, reliable code that our product depends on every day.

  • Work hand-in-hand with frontend engineers and product folks to ship features quickly.

  • Keep our data flowing with PostgreSQL (plus a bit of MongoDB/Redis when needed).

  • Make sure everything runs smooth, secure, and scalable.

  • Hook up third-party APIs and services.

  • Share feedback in reviews, bring new ideas, and help level up the whole team.

🛠️ What We’re Looking For

  • 3+ years experience building backend systems.

  • Strong in Python 3 and hands-on with FastAPI and/or Django.

  • Comfortable with async/await and high-performance code.

  • Experience with Git, Docker, and CI/CD.

  • Familiar with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure).

  • Bonus points if you’ve tuned databases like PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or Redis.

  • Clear communicator — we like teammates who are proactive and collaborative.

💡 Why You’ll Love It Here

  • 100% remote, flexible setup.

  • Small team, big impact — your code goes live fast.

  • We’re all about building things that matter (and learning along the way).

  • Competitive pay with the opportunity to grow as we scale.
title: Backend Developer (Python/FastAPI/Django)

description: Contruction AI Expert Position at PT Sepuluh Sumber AnugerahAs a Construction AI Expert at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah, you will play a pivotal role in developing cutting-edge AI-powered solutions to transform the construction industry. This full-time position is based in Banten, offering you the opp...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Contruction AI Expert Position at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah

As a Construction AI Expert at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah, you will play a pivotal role in developing cutting-edge AI-powered solutions to transform the construction industry. This full-time position is based in Banten, offering you the opportunity to contribute to the company's ambitious technological initiatives and make a tangible impact.

Primary Responsibilities:

  1. Spearhead the design and development of AI models and algorithms to optimise construction processes and enhance project management

  2. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities for AI integration and implement innovative solutions

  3. Analyse construction data and leverage machine learning techniques to drive actionable insights and drive data-driven decision making

  4. Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI and construction technologies, and proactively explore new applications

  5. Provide technical leadership and mentorship to junior team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning and innovation

  6. Communicate complex technical concepts to various stakeholders, ensuring alignment and buy-in for your work

  7. Monitoring all security data that submit in to AI machine, also can elaborate the results of AI information to the team.

Required Qualifications:

  1. Proven expertise in AI, machine learning, and computer vision, with a strong background in construction or a related industry

  2. Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, and experience in developing and deploying AI models

  3. Excellent problem-solving skills, critical thinking, and the ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions

  4. Hands-on experience in data analysis, data engineering, and building end-to-end AI pipelines

  5. A collaborative mindset and excellent communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams

  6. A passion for staying ahead of the curve and exploring new technologies to drive innovation

Benefits at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugrah:

At PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugrah, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and supportive work environment. As a Construction AI Expert, you will have access to:

  1. Competitive remuneration and comprehensive benefits package

  2. Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

  3. A dynamic and collaborative work culture that encourages innovation and creativity

  4. Flexible work arrangements and work-life balance initiatives

  5. State-of-the-art facilities and the latest technological tools


About PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugrah:

PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah is a leading provider of innovative technology solutions for the construction industry. With a mission to revolutionise the way construction projects are planned, executed, and managed, we are at the forefront of AI and automation in the built environment. Join our dynamic team and be a part of the transformation that is reshaping the future of construction.

Apply now to become our next Construction AI Expert and help us drive the digital transformation of the construction industry.
title: Contruction AI Expert

description:
Company Description


About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excel...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description

About Grab and Our Workplace

Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.

Job Description

Get to Know the Team

The GFin Analytics team serves as the intelligence engine driving data-informed decisions across our payments and financial services products. As part of the Payments Tech Family, we're instrumental in accelerating cashless payments across all Grab verticals.

We're looking for analytically rigorous data analysts who have embraced AI as a force multiplier. If you excel at experimentation and behavioral analysis while leveraging LLMs to work smarter, and if you think in terms of scalable solutions rather than one-off analyses, we want to talk to you.

Get to Know the Role

We're looking for a Senior Data Scientist (Analytics) to lead critical analytical projects for the GFin Analytics team at Grab. Our mission centers on understanding user experiences at a granular level and collaborating with Business, Product, Design, and Engineering to deliver the right outcomes and features. You will directly report to the manager. You will be based onsite.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

  • Design, measure, and recommend A/B tests and multivariate experiments across the platform. These experiments evaluate layout optimization, UI/UX efficacy, contextualization, algorithm performance, and API effectiveness. Additionally, use LLMs to accelerate experiment design, automate statistical analysis, and create insight narratives.
  • Extract insights from clickstream and transactional data to understand user behavior across consumers, driver partners, and merchants, translating patterns into relevant product metrics, using AI coding assistants to write and improve complex SQL queries.
  • Create segmented customer and merchant views that allow business and product team to drive meaningful product iterations, building AI assisted segmentation frameworks that automatically identify emerging patterns and anomalies.
  • Transform ambiguous business challenges into structured analytical frameworks and conduct deep dive analyses that yield clear insights, using LLMs to rapidly prototype analytical approaches and synthesize findings into compelling narratives.
  • Balance analytical rigor with technical complexity and explainability while considering real world business constraints, leveraging AI to generate multiple solution approaches and evaluate trade offs efficiently.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders to define key metrics, align on measurement strategies, and design robust experimentation approaches, using AI to draft documentation, create presentations, and automate routine reporting.
  • Develop data-driven solutions, including reports, dashboards, models, and frameworks, that directly support stakeholder decision making. These solutions involve building AI-powered self-serve analytics tools that scale automatically and systematically.

Qualifications

What Essential Skills You Will Need

  • 4 years of experience in Analytics, Business Intelligence, or Data Science, in a Tech (FinTech or E-Commerce) company.
  • A minomum of Bachelor's Degree in Statistics, Analytics, Economics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related fields.
  • Experience in SQL (Presto, Hive) and visualization tools with solid Python or R programming skills, demonstrating daily use of AI and LLMs to create code faster than traditional methods.
  • Experience using AI tools to increase personal productivity with prompt engineering skills for code generation, analysis, and documentation, and AI coding assistants already integrated into your workflow.
  • Experience with apply AI solutions versus traditional approaches, can identify high ROI automation opportunities, and stays current with LLM and GenAI advancements through rapid experimentation.

Additional Information

Life at Grab

We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:

  • We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
  • With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
  • Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
  • We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
  • Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours

What We Stand For At Grab

We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.
title: Senior Product Analyst - GFin

Proven experience deploying production-grade AI/ML systems, as reflected in organizational resumes (e.g., computer vision pipelines, real-t...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Min experience 3 years as Engineer

Technical Skills

1. Strong proficiency in Python + ML ecosystem (PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit learn, Hugging Face, LangChain).
2. Proven experience deploying production-grade AI/ML systems, as reflected in organizational resumes (e.g., computer vision pipelines, real-time inference services).
3. Hands-on experience with LLMs, RAG architecture, vector databases (FAISS, Qdrant, Azure AI Search).
4. Solid understanding of software engineering fundamentals: API development, microservices, distributed systems.
5. Experience with Docker and Kubernetes, widely used in production deployments across internal candidates.
6. Proficiency with cloud platforms (GCP preferred; AWS/Azure also welcome).
7. Strong grasp of CI/CD, automated testing, model lifecycle management, and observability.
8. Familiarity with real-time processing (streaming, queues, event-driven architecture).

Soft Skills

1. Fast learner with ability to adopt new AI frameworks and technologies quickly.
2. Strong problem-solving mindset with practical approach to converting POC into production systems.
3. Clear communicator who can explain technical concepts to a variety of stakeholders.

description: We're Hiring! Join Us in Making an Impact!At Floothink Digital Agency, we don’t just build careers—we build a community driven by passion, collaboration, and purpose. Our team thrives on Collective Empowerment, working together to create meaningful contributions. We believe in Playfulness with Respo...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We're Hiring! Join Us in Making an Impact!

At Floothink Digital Agency, we don’t just build careers—we build a community driven by passion, collaboration, and purpose. Our team thrives on Collective Empowerment, working together to create meaningful contributions. We believe in Playfulness with Responsibility, balancing creativity with ownership and accountability.

If you’re someone who embraces Passion for Progress, eager to grow and adapt in an ever-evolving world, we want you! We value Empathy & Inclusivity, ensuring that everyone—whether teammates, customers, or supporters—feels heard and respected. And above all, we believe in Growth through Giving, because true success comes from lifting others up along the way.


We are looking for an experienced AI Automation Engineer (n8n, Integrasi API, LLM, AI Ops) who can design, build, and optimize AI-powered automation systems to support digital marketing operations and performance.
This role focuses on integrating tools such as n8n, APIs, LLMs (Claude, GPT), and AI Ops systems to improve the efficiency of marketing teams across content, ads, CRM, and analytics.
You will act as the technical brain behind automation workflows from content creation and distribution to performance analysis fully automated and scalable.

Requirements:
- Minimum 2-3 years of experience in a similar role, preferably in a digital/creative agency/Start up.
- Experience with automation tools (n8n / Zapier / Make)
- Strong API integration skills (REST, webhook, JSON)
- Hands-on experience with LLMs (GPT, Claude, etc.)
- Basic programming (JavaScript or Python)
- Understanding of automation logic, data pipelines, and prompt engineering
- Familiar with RAG, vector databases, or embeddings
- Experience handling large-scale automation workflows

Key Responsibilities:
- Build and optimize automation workflows (n8n / Zapier / Make) for marketing processes
- Integrate platforms (social media, CRM, ads, internal tools) via APIs & webhooks
- Implement LLMs (GPT, Claude) for content generation, ideation, and chatbots
- Develop AI systems using context (RAG / knowledge base) for brand consistency
- Monitor and improve system performance (quality, cost, reliability)
- Create internal tools (AI content generator, campaign builder, reporting dashboards)
- Collaborate with marketing, creative, and performance teams

About us

Floothink 360 Digital Agency is a leading full-service digital marketing agency based in Jakarta. We help our clients, ranging from startups to large enterprises, achieve their marketing goals through innovative digital strategies. With a team of passionate, creative specialists, we're driven to deliver exceptional results and an outstanding client experience.

If you're ready to take the next step in your career, apply now to become Our AI Automation Engineer.
title: AI Automation Engineer (n8n, Integrasi API, LLM, AI Ops)

We are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. Our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and excellence in every project we undertake.

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced BIM Coordinator to join our dynamic team in the APAC region. The BIM Coordinator will be instrumental in driving the successful implementation and coordination of BIM processes for our complex data center projects. This role requires a deep understanding of BIM methodologies, strong technical proﬁciency in BIM software, and a forward-thinking approach to integrating emerging technologies, particularly Artiﬁcial Intelligence (AI), to enhance project delivery and operational eﬃciency. The successful candidate will ensure seamless information ﬂow, clash detection, and model integrity throughout the project lifecycle, from design to construction and hand.

 Core Duties & Responsibilities


·       Develop, implement, and enforce BIM Execution Plans (BEP) and BIM standards across all data center projects in the APAC region. Ensure adherence to project-speciﬁc BIM protocols and client requirements.

·       Facilitate and manage BIM coordination meetings, performing regular clash detection using advanced BIM software (e.g., Autodesk Navisworks, Solibri). Identify, report, and track resolution of clashes and coordination issues among architectural, structural, MEP, and other disciplines.

·       Oversee the development, integrity, and maintenance of accurate and up-to-date BIM models throughout the project lifecycle, from conceptual design through construction and as-built documentation. Ensure models are properly formatted and compatible with various ﬁle formats.

·       Manage the ﬂow of digital information, ensuring all stakeholders have access to accurate, consistent, and timely project data. Implement robust data exchange protocols and common data environments (CDE) to facilitate seamless collaboration.

·       Provide technical expertise and support to project teams on BIM software applications (e.g., Autodesk Revit, AutoCAD, Civil 3D, Tekla Structures). Troubleshoot BIM-related issues and optimize software usage for project eﬃciency.

·       Conduct training sessions for project team members on BIM software, workﬂows, and best practices to enhance their BIM capabilities and ensure consistent application of standards.

·       Implement quality control procedures to ensure the accuracy, completeness, and compliance of BIM models and deliverables with project speciﬁcations and industry standards.

·       Generate comprehensive BIM coordination reports, progress updates, and other relevant documentation for project stakeholders.

·       Explore and implement AI-driven tools for enhanced clash detection and automated issue resolution, leveraging machine learning algorithms to identify complex conﬂicts and suggest optimal solutions.

·       Utilize AI to analyse BIM data for predictive insights, such as identifying potential project risks, optimizing resource allocation, and forecasting construction timelines in data center projects.

·       Implement AI-powered solutions for automated auditing of BIM models to ensure compliance with standards, identify inconsistencies, and improve model quality.

·       Collaborate with design teams to explore AI-driven generative design approaches for optimizing data center layouts, energy eﬃciency, and system conﬁgurations.

·       Integrate BIM with AI-powered real-time monitoring systems to

·       Represent the business, upholding our core values and behaviours with all internal and external customers, clients and third parties,

·       Maintain business and client confidentiality, adhering to applicable Data Protection regulations and Information Security Standards in line with company, and group policies and procedures.

 Qualifications: Skills and Experience

·       Bachelor’s degree in Architecture, Engineering, Construction Management, or a related ﬁeld.

·       Minimum of 5 years of experience as a BIM Coordinator or similar role, with a strong portfolio of successful BIM projects, preferably in the data center or critical infrastructure sector.

·       Proven expertise in BIM software, including but not limited to Autodesk Revit, Navisworks, AutoCAD, and other relevant design and coordination platforms.

·       In-depth knowledge of BIM standards, protocols, and best practices (e.g., ISO 19650).

·       Strong understanding of construction processes, particularly in complex MEP systems relevant to data centers.

·       Excellent communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills, with the ability to eﬀectively collaborate with diverse project teams and stakeholders.

·       Demonstrated problem-solving abilities and a proactive approach to identifying and resolving technical challenges.

·       Experience with Common Data Environments (CDE) platforms.

·       AI/ML Proﬁciency (Preferred): Familiarity with AI/ML concepts and their application in construction, data analysis, or design. Experience with AI-powered BIM tools or data analytics platforms is a signiﬁcant advantage.

Values & Behaviours:

 DPI Values

Dedication                Precision                   Integrity

 Behaviours

 ·      Inspiration - Has a clear vision of where to go and the ability to articulate it. Empowers people to implement our vision and strategy. Great communicator who captures the imagination, generating trust and commitment.

 ·      Team Spirit - Thinks about "we" not "me"; we do this together. Brings purpose to the team to make it a cohesive unit. Knows when to seek help and when to give it. Prepared to take action to address issues for the good of the team and celebrate others' successes.

 ·      Self-Awareness - Emotionally intelligent; has empathy for others and gets the best out of people by meeting them on their terms. Great at building rapport with colleagues and customers; knows that their behavior impacts on the performance of others and adapts approach to achieve the best results.

 ·      Achievement - Always striving to be the best and consistently delivers. High performer: bringing high energy, competence and making the right decisions to get things done.

 ·      Tenacity - Relentless in the pursuit of their goals. Excellent at solving problems and overcoming obstacles; seeing the challenges before others see them and taking action, to avoid them becoming problems. Sees setbacks as opportunities and becomes stronger in adversity.

 ·      Influence - Highly skilled at getting others committed to the goal. Confident, enthusiastic and encourages creativity. Understands the needs of stakeholders and as a result, engages them.

 Our Vision

 ·      To compete at the highest standards in data centre fit-out, MEP construction and managed services throughout Europe and beyond.

 Our Mission

·      Continue to develop and deliver products and services unparalleled in terms of quality.

·      Retain our clients, broaden our breadth of service, identifying closely with their changing requirements.

·      Execute a robust H&S and Wellbeing strategy.  Consider and implement wherever possible initiatives that relate to environmental improvements.

 Our Strategy

 ·      People - Build an organisation capable of managing the business we will become.  Recruit and retain and develop the best industry professionals.  Health, Safety and Wellbeing remain paramount, for our employees and clients.

·      Products - must address an industry need. We must have differentiators such as assured quality, modularisation, and off-site construction techniques. Datalec’s commitment to quality is unsurpassed in the industry, we seek perfection.  New products and services must be delivered to the same exacting standards.

·      Purpose - relates both to our clients and our organisation. We need to understand both how to be able to confidently present our solutions and product strategy to the market. Separately, we create a working environment that promotes and rewards employees fairly, actively supporting a culture of transparency and mutual respect.
title: BIM Coordinator

description: We're looking for an experienced Python / ML Engineer to join our team and help build innovative (G)AI and information extraction solutions.About the roleYou will be working on our journey into (G)AI and Machine Learning. Not only for our company, but also for our customers. We know what we want to ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We're looking for an experienced Python / ML Engineer to join our team and help build innovative (G)AI and information extraction solutions.

About the role

You will be working on our journey into (G)AI and Machine Learning. Not only for our company, but also for our customers. We know what we want to achieve, but the road leading to achieve those goals need to be explored. Together with our IT team in Jakarta and the Netherlands you will be exploring the frontier of Machine Learning, turning complex data into intuitive, automated experiences for our global clientele.

What you'll do

  • Explore and define the path to achieve (G)AI implementation goals

  • Build, validate, and deploy ML models, especially for information extraction

  • Integrate ML models into APIs and services

  • Experiment with iterative workflows and work comfortably in the terminal

  • Collaborate with international teams to explore new solutions

What we're looking for

  • Fluent English (spoken and written)

  • 2+ years of experience in Python (demonstrable via GitHub repos or job experience)

  • Strong software engineering fundamentals (testing, typing, deployment)

  • Hands-on experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP)

  • Strong Git workflow

  • Some exposure to JavaScript/TypeScript and React for basic frontend support

  • A proactive mindset: someone who is happy with experiments and exploration

Nice to have (not required)

  • Familiarity with on-prem deployment

  • Experience with containerization

Why you'll like working here

  • Small team, big impact

  • No endless meetings

  • A challenging role in a professional, supportive environment

  • Room to explore and define the road ahead

  • Salary based on experience and prior knowledge and benefits

  • Flexible hours and location (depending on the role)
title: Machine Learning Engineer

description: Senior Data Engineer (Web Scraping)📍 Location: Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia (On-site)💼 Employment Type: Full-time💰 Salary: IDR 18M - 25M (depending on experience)About the RoleWe are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our team in Bali. In this role, you will play a key part in building and s...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Senior Data Engineer (Web Scraping)

📍 Location: Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia (On-site)
💼 Employment Type: Full-time
💰 Salary: IDR 18M - 25M (depending on experience)

About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our team in Bali. In this role, you will play a key part in building and scaling production-grade web scrapers using modern AI coding assistants and supporting the Lead Data Engineer in technical decisions, project planning, and team coordination. You will also mentor junior and medior engineers while ensuring best practices are followed.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the development and maintenance of scalable, production-grade web scrapers.

  • Design, build, and maintain reusable scraper libraries and frameworks.

  • Design infra diagrams, define coding standards, workflows and processes with the Lead Engineer.

  • Implement robust monitoring, testing, and alerting systems to ensure reliability.

  • Manage and optimize cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure) for large-scale scraping workloads.

  • Optimize compute, storage, and proxy usage for performance and cost efficiency.

  • Mentor and review code of junior and medior engineers.

  • Collaborate with stakeholders to prioritize backlog items and integrate scraper outputs into pipelines.

  • Act as second in command to the Lead Data Engineer for technical and project support.

Requirements

Must-Have Skills:

  • Strong proficiency in Python and SQL, with hands-on web scraping experience.

  • Hands-on experience building web scrapers using AI coding assistants such as Claude Code or Cursor.

  • Deep knowledge of frameworks like Scrapy, Playwright, Selenium, and anti-bot strategies.

  • Experience designing reusable libraries, coding standards, and modular scraper frameworks.

  • Proficiency with cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure), including compute, storage, and security basics.

  • Experience with Docker & Kubernetes for containerization and orchestration.

  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, Git workflows, and IaC tools (Terraform/CloudFormation).

  • Strong debugging, performance tuning, and large-scale scraper optimization skills.

  • Excellent English communication skills (written & verbal).

Nice-to-Have Skills:

  • Workflow orchestration (Airflow, Prefect, Dagster).

  • Experience setting up AI agents or AI-powered workflows (e.g., using LLM APIs, agent frameworks, or automation pipelines with AI components).

  • Observability/monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, ELK).

  • Cost optimization in cloud and proxy-heavy workloads.

  • Knowledge of data governance, RBAC, and compliance.

  • Exposure to downstream data engineering pipelines (ETL/ELT, APIs, databases).

Why You’ll Love Working Here

  • Be part of a data-driven company that values curiosity, precision, and impact.

  • Collaborate with talented data engineers and analysts to solve real business challenges.

  • Based in beautiful Bali, working directly on-site with a passionate and talented team.

  • If relocating from other parts of Indonesia, we offer one-time reimbursement for flights and relocation expenses.
title: Senior Data Engineer (Web Scraping)

description: Job OverviewThe Data Engineer will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and data infrastructure to support business and analytical needs. This role will work closely with data teams, analysts, and stakeholders to ensure data availability, reliability, and p...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Overview
The Data Engineer will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and data infrastructure to support business and analytical needs. This role will work closely with data teams, analysts, and stakeholders to ensure data availability, reliability, and performance within a cloud environment, particularly using Google Cloud Platform (GCP). The position will also support data migration initiatives and help optimize data processing for banking-related systems.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Engineering, or a related field.

  • 3–5 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar data engineering role.

  • Experience working on cloud-based data platforms, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

  • Hands-on experience with SQL and BigQuery for data processing and analysis.

  • Experience in data migration projects from on-premise or legacy systems to cloud platforms.

  • Strong understanding of data pipeline development, ETL/ELT processes, and data warehousing concepts.

  • Familiarity with data modeling and data architecture.

  • Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams including analysts, developers, and business stakeholders.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

description: Education: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Electrical Engineering, Math, or related field.Experience: Minimum 2 strong years of software engineering practices and experiences in data science, machine learning, generative AI.Description:We are seeking passionate candidates for a machine learnin...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Education: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Electrical Engineering, Math, or related field.

Experience: Minimum 2 strong years of software engineering practices and experiences in data science, machine learning, generative AI.

Description:

  • We are seeking passionate candidates for a machine learning/ deep learning software engineering role who will join as a machine learning research engineer helping the team build intelligent automotive retail and mobility solutions.

Responsibilities:

  • As a Machine Learning Engineer, you will contribute to state-of-the-art machine learning infrastructure and relevant software (e.g. supervised learning, reinforcement learning, data management, and evaluation at unparalleled scale).

  • Implement cutting-edge deep learning models accelerating model training performance for intelligent automotive retail and mobility system applications.

  • Apply the latest advances in deep learning and machine learning to personalize car owners experience

  • Manipulate high-volume, high-dimensionality, structured data from automotive retail transactions for to come up with predictions and recommendations that addresses the challenges of the automotive industry.

  • Work in a multidisciplinary team and collaborate with other teams across our R&D and Delivery team.

Skills:

  • Strong Machine Learning background with deep understanding of different types of machine learning algorithms (e.g., CNN, RNN, LSTM and Reinforcement Learning). Experience of training deep-learning models in an end-to-end fashion.

  • Project experience working with Azure Machine Learning, Azure Open AI or other modern deep learning frameworks.

  • Proficient in Python is a minimum. Additional knowledge of C++ / C# is a plus.

  • Working knowledge of statistics (e.g., Monte Carlo, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, maximum likelihood, bootstrap, Bayesian inference)

  • Working knowledge in machine learning algorithms: logistic regression, random forest, gradient boosted trees, neural networks, k-means, and more!

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
title: Machine Learning Engineer – Intelligent Automotive Retail and Mobility

description: Responsibilities:Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalabi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.

  • Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).

  • Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.

  • Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalability.

  • Collaborate with:

- Business Analysts on reporting and dashboards

- Data Scientists on feature and dataset preparation

- Software Engineers on data integrations

  • Maintain clear documentation for data pipelines, schemas, and processes.

  • Implement best practices for data security, access control, and governance.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve data pipeline failures or performance issues.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.

  • 3–5 years of experience in data engineering or related roles.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL.

  • Experience with at least one programming language: Python, Scala, or Java

  • Hands-on experience with data warehouses (e.g., BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake).

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.

  • Understanding of data modeling concepts (star schema, normalization, etc.).

  • Experience working with large datasets and production data systems.

  • Experience supporting BI tools (Looker, Power BI, Tableau)

  • Knowledge of containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus

  • Experience with CI/CD for data pipelines will be preferred
title: Data Engineer

jobDescriptionHtml:
Education: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Electrical Engineering, Math, or related field.

Experience: Minimum 2 strong years of software engineering practices and experiences in data science, machine learning, generative AI.

Description:

  • We are seeking passionate candidates for a machine learning/ deep learning software engineering role who will join as a machine learning research engineer helping the team build intelligent automotive retail and mobility solutions.

Responsibilities:

  • As a Machine Learning Engineer, you will contribute to state-of-the-art machine learning infrastructure and relevant software (e.g. supervised learning, reinforcement learning, data management, and evaluation at unparalleled scale).

  • Implement cutting-edge deep learning models accelerating model training performance for intelligent automotive retail and mobility system applications.

  • Apply the latest advances in deep learning and machine learning to personalize car owners experience

  • Manipulate high-volume, high-dimensionality, structured data from automotive retail transactions for to come up with predictions and recommendations that addresses the challenges of the automotive industry.

  • Work in a multidisciplinary team and collaborate with other teams across our R&D and Delivery team.

Skills:

  • Strong Machine Learning background with deep understanding of different types of machine learning algorithms (e.g., CNN, RNN, LSTM and Reinforcement Learning). Experience of training deep-learning models in an end-to-end fashion.

  • Project experience working with Azure Machine Learning, Azure Open AI or other modern deep learning frameworks.

  • Proficient in Python is a minimum. Additional knowledge of C++ / C# is a plus.

  • Working knowledge of statistics (e.g., Monte Carlo, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, maximum likelihood, bootstrap, Bayesian inference)

  • Working knowledge in machine learning algorithms: logistic regression, random forest, gradient boosted trees, neural networks, k-means, and more!

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
title: Machine Learning Engineer – Intelligent Automotive Retail and Mobility

description: Responsibilities:Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalabi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.

  • Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).

  • Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.

  • Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalability.

  • Collaborate with:

- Business Analysts on reporting and dashboards

- Data Scientists on feature and dataset preparation

- Software Engineers on data integrations

  • Maintain clear documentation for data pipelines, schemas, and processes.

  • Implement best practices for data security, access control, and governance.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve data pipeline failures or performance issues.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.

  • 3–5 years of experience in data engineering or related roles.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL.

  • Experience with at least one programming language: Python, Scala, or Java

  • Hands-on experience with data warehouses (e.g., BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake).

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.

  • Understanding of data modeling concepts (star schema, normalization, etc.).

  • Experience working with large datasets and production data systems.

  • Experience supporting BI tools (Looker, Power BI, Tableau)

  • Knowledge of containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus

  • Experience with CI/CD for data pipelines will be preferred
title: Data Engineer

description: AI Strategy & DiscoveryAnalyze current business processes across departments to identify opportunities for AI-based optimization (e.g., Generative AI, Predictive Analytics, NLP, Computer Vision).Collaborate with stakeholders to understand pain points, inefficiencies, and automation opportunities.Dev...
jobDescriptionHtml:
AI Strategy & Discovery

  • Analyze current business processes across departments to identify opportunities for AI-based optimization (e.g., Generative AI, Predictive Analytics, NLP, Computer Vision).

  • Collaborate with stakeholders to understand pain points, inefficiencies, and automation opportunities.

  • Develop and maintain an AI roadmap aligned with the company’s strategic goals.

Solution Design & Evaluation

  • Recommend suitable AI approaches for identified use cases (build vs buy).

  • Evaluate and compare available AI solutions, tools, platforms, or vendors.

  • Prepare feasibility assessments, ROI projections, and implementation plans.

  • Implementation & Oversight

Lead or support the deployment of selected AI solutions.

  • Coordinate with internal teams, vendors, and third-party providers to ensure successful rollout.

  • Monitor performance, user adoption, and business impact post-implementation.

AI Awareness & Enablement

  • Educate teams on AI capabilities and create internal awareness about AI-driven transformation.

  • Stay updated with emerging AI trends and technologies relevant to the business.


Qualification

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, Business IT, or a related field. (Master’s preferred)

  • 3+ years experience in AI, data science, or digital transformation roles in retail companies preferred. Experience in Agentic AI is a must

  • Knowledge of different AI domains such as Generative AI (e.g., LLMs), Predictive Modeling, NLP, and automation technologies (e.g., RPA, Machine Vision).

  • Experience in solution evaluation, vendor comparison, and project implementation.

  • Strong analytical and business process mapping skills.

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
title: AI Transformation Manager (Agentic AI)

jobDescriptionHtml:
Data Engineer

A Data Engineer is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data systems and pipelines that support data processing, storage, and analysis.

Job Description

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop, construct, test, and maintain data pipelines and architectures

  • Ensure data quality, integrity, and reliability across systems

  • Collect, process, and clean large datasets from various sources

  • Design and implement data models and database structures

  • Optimize data flow and performance for analytics and reporting

  • Collaborate with data analysts, data scientists, and other stakeholders

  • Integrate new data management technologies and software tools

  • Monitor and troubleshoot data-related issues

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field

  • Proven experience as a Data Engineer or similar role

  • Strong knowledge of SQL and database systems (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL)

  • Experience with programming languages such as Python, Java, or Scala

  • Understanding of ETL processes and data warehousing

  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

  • Experience 2-4 years

  • Working proficiency in English (written and spoken)

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Google Cloud, Azure)

  • Knowledge of data pipeline tools (e.g., Airflow, Kafka)

  • Experience with data visualization tools is a plus
title: AI Data Engineer

jobDescriptionHtml:
The Economist Group is the leading source of analysis on international business and world affairs. We deliver world-class, thought-provoking content through a range of formats, from web and app to print, conferences, film, and audio. What ties us together is the objectivity of our opinion, the originality of our insight, and our advocacy of economic and political freedom around the world.

As our digital subscription business grows, so does the importance of delivering thoughtful, frictionless, and value-driven experiences across the entire subscriber lifecycle.

About the role

We are seeking a motivated Associate Product Manager to join our Subscriber Growth & Lifecycle product pillar. In this role, you will support the continuous improvement of subscription journeys that maximise subscriber lifetime value and foster long-term loyalty across web and app.

This is a hands-on role with strong exposure to strategy and delivery. You will contribute to initiatives across retention, upgrades, and customer care, working closely with experienced product managers, engineers, analysts, marketers, and customer operations teams. It offers a valuable opportunity to develop deep expertise in subscription products, monetisation, and experimentation within a globally recognised media organisation.

What you’ll do

As the Associate Product Manager for Subscriber Growth & Lifecycle, you will be responsible for the following with support from more senior Product Managers:

  • Own and optimise the end-to-end subscriber journey: You will be the product manager for key in-life subscription experiences, including upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, and re-engagement flows. You will continuously identify and address friction points, and champion a subscriber-first mindset in everything you do.

  • Drive monetisation and experimentation: You will develop and execute a roadmap of monetisation initiatives, including offers, add-ons, and subscription tiers. You will design and run experiments to optimise our upgrade and retention paywalls, and use data to inform our pricing and packaging strategies.

  • Innovate in customer care: You will partner with our Customer Care teams to redefine how we serve our subscribers. You will lead the development of our self-service and assisted service journeys, including implementing AI-powered bots and other automation technologies to improve efficiency and customer satisfaction.

  • Champion a data-driven culture: You will define and analyse key metrics such as churn, upgrades, engagement, and customer satisfaction. You will use this data to measure the impact of your initiatives, identify new opportunities, and communicate your progress to stakeholders.

  • Lead with influence: You will write clear and compelling user stories, acceptance criteria, and product documentation. You will use your strong communication and collaboration skills to align your team and stakeholders around a shared vision and roadmap.

What you’ll bring

We are looking for a candidate who is passionate about building great products and eager to learn and grow. The ideal candidate will have:

  • A proven track record of driving results: You have at least 2 years of experience in product management or a similar role (such as Product Marketing or Product Analytics) with a focus on digital customer journeys. You can point to specific examples of how you have used offers, discounts, add-ons, or subscription tiers to achieve business goals.

  • A deep understanding of the subscriber lifecycle: You have experience with paywall campaigns, experiments, or launches across web and app. You are familiar with the key levers for driving subscriber engagement, retention, and lifetime value.

  • A strategic and analytical mindset: You are comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment with shifting priorities. You have a structured, data-informed approach to problem-solving and prioritisation. You are proficient in using data to make decisions and measure success.

  • Exceptional collaboration and communication skills: You are a natural collaborator who can work effectively with designers, engineers, analysts, and operational teams. You can articulate your ideas clearly and persuasively, and you are a great listener.

  • A "go-getter" mindset with high autonomy: You are a self-starter who takes initiative and can run with things independently. While you will have support from senior PMs, you are comfortable taking the lead on projects, navigating ambiguity, and proactively pushing initiatives to completion.

Nice to have:

  • Experience managing monetisation for a B2C app and web product.

  • Exposure to monetisation automation, personalisation, or machine-learning-driven decisioning.

  • Familiarity with subscription platforms or lifecycle marketing tools (e.g., Zuora, SF).

  • Experience with data analysis and visualisation tools (e.g., Amplitude, Tableau, SQL).

Why this role matters

This is an opportunity to make a real impact on The Economist's future. By improving our in-life subscription experience, you will not only drive revenue growth but also help us build a more sustainable and resilient business. You will be at the heart of our efforts to create a lifelong relationship with our readers and to ensure that The Economist remains the world's leading source of analysis on international business and world affairs for generations to come.

Location:

This role is based in South East Asia.
title: Associate Product Manager - Subs Growth and Lifecycle

jobDescriptionHtml:
Requirement :

  • Pendidikan Minimal S1 Jurusan Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Sains, Matermatika

  • Minimal 1 tahun memiliki pengalaman profesional sebagai Data Engineer dan paham terkait Data Pipeline

  • Memiliki pengalaman menggunakan SQL :Query Data

  • Memiliki pengalaman menggunakan Python ( Pandas, Requests, dan Cleansing data)

  • Memiliki pemahaman terkait Integrasi API: paham dalam mengekstrak data dari REST API, termasuk menangani JSON

  • Memiliki Pengalaman dengan Apache Airflow

  • Memiliki pengalaman otomatisasi: Kemahiran dalam skrip Bash/Shell script

  • Memiliki pengalaman handle GIT

  • Memiliki Pengalaman dengan PySpark

  • Memiliki Pengetahuan tentang data cloud (misalnya, BigQuery, Redshift, atau Snowflake)


Tugas & Tanggung Jawab:

  • Manajemen Pipeline Independen: Membangun dan memelihara alur kerja ETL/ELT terutama dari REST API dan basis data SQL.

  • Memantau pekerjaan harian dan memberikan perbaikan segera untuk kegagalan pipeline guna memastikan ketersediaan data.

  • Menerapkan pemeriksaan validasi otomatis untuk memastikan keakuratan data sebelum mencapai Data Cloud

  • Menggunakan Docker dan Bash untuk memastikan stabilitas dan reproduksibilitas lingkungan data
title: Data Engineer

description: Qualification:    Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.Experience with RESTful API.Proficiency in at least one backend programming language (Python, Node.js, Java, Go).Familiarity with vector database used in AI such as Chroma or pgvector, which are optim...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Qualification:    

  • Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.

  • Experience with RESTful API.

  • Proficiency in at least one backend programming language (Python, Node.js, Java, Go).

  • Familiarity with vector database used in AI such as Chroma or pgvector, which are optimized for storing, indexing, and performing similarity searches.

  • Frameworks & Libraries: Experience with LLM libraries such as langchain, langgraph

  • Experience using Gemini API, Openai API or vertex AI API

  • Proficient in version control systems (such as Git) and Agile development practices.

  • Excellent analytical skills and creative approach to problem solving.

  • Strong team collaboration and effective communication abilities.

  • Ability to continuously learn and adapt to rapidly evolving AI technologies.


Job Description : 

  • Customize and fine-tune AI model parameters to optimize performance and accuracy. 

  • Develop robust, scalable solutions that integrate machine learning models and data-driven features. 

  • Develop and maintain APIs and integration layers that enable seamless communication between AI systems and other software components. 

  • Conduct debugging, testing, and code optimization to enhance application performance and security. 

  • Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms for API access.

  • Own and optimise the end-to-end subscriber journey: You will be the product manager for key in-life subscription experiences, including upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, and re-engagement flows. You will continuously identify and address friction points, and champion a subscriber-first mindset in everything you do.

  • Drive monetisation and experimentation: You will develop and execute a roadmap of monetisation initiatives, including offers, add-ons, and subscription tiers. You will design and run experiments to optimise our upgrade and retention paywalls, and use data to inform our pricing and packaging strategies.

  • Innovate in customer care: You will partner with our Customer Care teams to redefine how we serve our subscribers. You will lead the development of our self-service and assisted service journeys, including implementing AI-powered bots and other automation technologies to improve efficiency and customer satisfaction.

  • Champion a data-driven culture: You will define and analyse key metrics such as churn, upgrades, engagement, and customer satisfaction. You will use this data to measure the impact of your initiatives, identify new opportunities, and communicate your progress to stakeholders.

  • Lead with influence: You will write clear and compelling user stories, acceptance criteria, and product documentation. You will use your strong communication and collaboration skills to align your team and stakeholders around a shared vision and roadmap.

What you’ll bring

We are looking for a candidate who is passionate about building great products and eager to learn and grow. The ideal candidate will have:

  • A proven track record of driving results: You have at least 2 years of experience in product management or a similar role (such as Product Marketing or Product Analytics) with a focus on digital customer journeys. You can point to specific examples of how you have used offers, discounts, add-ons, or subscription tiers to achieve business goals.

  • A deep understanding of the subscriber lifecycle: You have experience with paywall campaigns, experiments, or launches across web and app. You are familiar with the key levers for driving subscriber engagement, retention, and lifetime value.

  • A strategic and analytical mindset: You are comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment with shifting priorities. You have a structured, data-informed approach to problem-solving and prioritisation. You are proficient in using data to make decisions and measure success.

  • Exceptional collaboration and communication skills: You are a natural collaborator who can work effectively with designers, engineers, analysts, and operational teams. You can articulate your ideas clearly and persuasively, and you are a great listener.

  • A "go-getter" mindset with high autonomy: You are a self-starter who takes initiative and can run with things independently. While you will have support from senior PMs, you are comfortable taking the lead on projects, navigating ambiguity, and proactively pushing initiatives to completion.

Nice to have:

  • Experience managing monetisation for a B2C app and web product.

  • Exposure to monetisation automation, personalisation, or machine-learning-driven decisioning.

  • Familiarity with subscription platforms or lifecycle marketing tools (e.g., Zuora, SF).

  • Experience with data analysis and visualisation tools (e.g., Amplitude, Tableau, SQL).

Why this role matters

This is an opportunity to make a real impact on The Economist's future. By improving our in-life subscription experience, you will not only drive revenue growth but also help us build a more sustainable and resilient business. You will be at the heart of our efforts to create a lifelong relationship with our readers and to ensure that The Economist remains the world's leading source of analysis on international business and world affairs for generations to come.

Location:

This role is based in South East Asia.
title: Associate Product Manager - Subs Growth and Lifecycle
