jobDescriptionHtml:
Posisi: Senior Computer Vision Engineer
Lokasi: Onsite (Jabodetabek/Cikarang/Karawang)
Jenis: Full-time (masa probation 3 bulan)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Posisi ini bertanggung jawab atas desain, pengembangan, dan implementasi solusi computer vision berbasis Machine Learning dan Deep Learning untuk lingkungan industri. Peran ini berfokus pada pembangunan sistem inspeksi visual yang akurat, andal, dan siap produksi, serta berkolaborasi erat dengan tim hardware, IoT, dan software untuk memastikan integrasi end-to-end yang optimal.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Mendesain dan mengembangkan algoritma computer vision untuk aplikasi industri seperti defect detection, object detection, classification, segmentation, dan optical character recognition (OCR).

  • Mengembangkan, melatih, dan mengoptimalkan model Machine Learning dan Deep Learning menggunakan arsitektur modern seperti CNN, ResNet, EfficientNet, YOLO, Vision Transformer (ViT), dan U-Net.

  • Membangun pipeline end-to-end mulai dari data collection, annotation, preprocessing, training, validation, hingga deployment.

  • Mengoptimalkan performa model untuk kebutuhan produksi dengan mempertimbangkan akurasi, latency, throughput, dan resource efficiency.

  • Mengimplementasikan dan melakukan deployment model pada edge device, industrial PC, atau lingkungan cloud.

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim IoT dan Field Engineer untuk memastikan kesesuaian sistem kamera, pencahayaan, dan hardware dengan kebutuhan model AI.

  • Melakukan tuning dan evaluasi performa model di lingkungan nyata, termasuk analisis error dan continuous improvement.

  • Mengembangkan dan memelihara kode produksi yang scalable, modular, dan terdokumentasi dengan baik.

  • Menyusun dokumentasi teknis tingkat engineering, termasuk arsitektur model, eksperimen, dan laporan performa.

  • Menjadi representasi teknis dalam diskusi dengan klien dan pemangku kepentingan (engineer-to-engineer discussion).

Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 (di Universitas ternama) Teknik Informatika, Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Elektro, Artificial Intelligence, atau bidang terkait atau S2; S3 menjadi nilai tambah.

  • Pengalaman minimal 5–10 tahun di bidang Computer Vision, Machine Learning, atau Artificial Intelligence.

  • Berpengalaman dalam pengembangan model computer vision menggunakan framework seperti TensorFlow, PyTorch, atau OpenCV.

  • Memahami arsitektur modern seperti CNN, YOLO, Faster R-CNN, SSD, U-Net, dan Vision Transformer.

  • Menguasai bahasa pemrograman Python dan library terkait seperti NumPy, Pandas, dan Scikit-learn.

  • Berpengalaman dalam data preprocessing, data augmentation, dan evaluasi model.

  • Memahami teknik optimasi dan deployment seperti TensorRT, ONNX, OpenVINO, atau model quantization.

  • Memiliki pengalaman dalam pengolahan citra industri dan sistem inspeksi visual.

  • Memahami konsep MLOps, versioning model, dan eksperimen terstruktur.

  • Mampu bekerja dengan NVIDIA CUDA, JetPack, Linux, Docker, dan Git.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analitis yang kuat serta mampu memecahkan masalah kompleks secara mandiri.

  • Mampu berkomunikasi dengan baik dan bekerja dalam tim lintas disiplin.

  • Bersedia melakukan perjalanan dinas dan bekerja di site pelanggan.

Keuntungan

  • Kesempatan mengembangkan solusi AI dan computer vision untuk industri berskala internasional.

  • Lingkungan kerja inovatif di bidang Artificial Intelligence dan otomasi industri.

  • Akses ke teknologi mutakhir dan proyek berdampak tinggi.

  • Pelatihan profesional dan peluang pengembangan karier.

  • Paket kompensasi yang kompetitif sesuai pengalaman dan keahlian.

Nilai Tambah (Opsional)

  • Pengalaman dalam pengembangan sistem inspeksi visual di sektor manufaktur.

  • Familiar dengan integrasi AI pada edge computing dan embedded systems seperti NVIDIA Jetson.

  • Pengetahuan tentang IoT, industrial automation, dan integrasi dengan PLC atau SCADA.

  • Pengalaman dalam penggunaan tools anotasi data seperti CVAT, LabelStuedio, atau Roboflow.

  • Kontribusi dalam publikasi ilmiah, paten, atau proyek open-source di bidang AI.

  • Pengalaman dalam penggunaan layanan cloud seperti AWS, Google Cloud, atau Microsoft Azure.

  • Kemampuan dalam C++ untuk pengembangan sistem berperforma tinggi.

  • Pemahaman tentang 3D vision, stereo vision, atau hyperspectral imaging.
title: Senior Computer Vision Engineer

Experience in develop Microsoft Power BI Dashboard is mandatory4. Have experience in SSRS reporting,  Google Big Q...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Requirement for Middle Level:

1. Min experiences 3-5 years as Data Engineer (Junior,Middle, Senior Level)
2. Experience in writing SQL query, SQL function and SQL procedure is mandatory
3. Experience in develop Microsoft Power BI Dashboard is mandatory
4. Have experience in SSRS reporting,  Google Big Query, ETL & data pipeline is advantage.
5. Have knowledge and experience in data science with Phyton is advantage.

Requirement for Junior Level :

1. Programming and Scripting: Proficiency in Python, Java, or Scala for pipeline development.
2. Database Management: Expertise in SQL and Gogle Big Query
3. Data Modeling: Ability to design schema and data models optimized for analytics.
4. Big Data Tools: Knowledge of platforms like Hadoop, Spark, Kafka, or Flink for processing large datasets.
Problem Solving: Analytical skills for troubleshooting pipeline issues, optimizing performance, and ensuring data integrity.

Core Responsibilities
1. Data Pipeline Development and Management
Data engineers create and manage the pipelines that extract data from various sources, transform it into usable formats, and load it into databases or data warehouses (ETL/ELT processes). They ensure that data flows reliably from source systems to reporting and analytics platforms.
2. Data Storage and Architecture
They design and maintain scalable and secure data storage solutions, such as relational databases, NoSQL databases, and cloud-based data warehouses. They establish schemas, indexing strategies, and storage models optimized for performance and analytics.
3. Data Quality and Governance
Data engineers enforce data quality standards, implement validation and cleansing processes, and monitor pipelines to detect and resolve inconsistencies. They also ensure compliance with data governance policies and standards, including privacy regulations.
4. Performance Optimization and Scalability
Optimizing database queries, improving pipeline performance, and planning for scalable infrastructure to manage growing datasets are key responsibilities. This includes tuning systems to handle large-scale batch and real-time processing efficiently.
5. Collaboration with Stakeholders
Data engineers work closely with data scientists, analysts, and business teams to understand their data requirements and provide reliable datasets for analysis, reporting, and machine learning applications.
6. Tooling and Automation
They leverage tools such as Apache Spark, Hadoop, Kafka, Airflow, and cloud services like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform to automate workflows and manage large-scale data processing.

  • Proficiency in at least one backend programming language (Python, Node.js, Java, Go).

  • Familiarity with vector database used in AI such as Chroma or pgvector, which are optimized for storing, indexing, and performing similarity searches.

  • Frameworks & Libraries: Experience with LLM libraries such as langchain, langgraph

  • Experience using Gemini API, Openai API or vertex AI API

  • Proficient in version control systems (such as Git) and Agile development practices.

  • Excellent analytical skills and creative approach to problem solving.

  • Strong team collaboration and effective communication abilities.

  • Ability to continuously learn and adapt to rapidly evolving AI technologies.


Job Description : 

  • Customize and fine-tune AI model parameters to optimize performance and accuracy. 

  • Develop robust, scalable solutions that integrate machine learning models and data-driven features. 

  • Develop and maintain APIs and integration layers that enable seamless communication between AI systems and other software components. 

  • Conduct debugging, testing, and code optimization to enhance application performance and security. 

  • Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms for API access.

description: Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab:Membuat, menetapkan, mengawasai dan mengevaluasi target serta progres KPIM dan BAP Divisi berdasarkan sasaran Departemen.Merencanakan dan mengevaluasi strategi dan efektifitas sistem (software dan aplikasi) dan pendukungnya (hardware, infrastruktur, jaringan, dll), guna terc...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab:

  1. Membuat, menetapkan, mengawasai dan mengevaluasi target serta progres KPIM dan BAP Divisi berdasarkan sasaran Departemen.

  2. Merencanakan dan mengevaluasi strategi dan efektifitas sistem (software dan aplikasi) dan pendukungnya (hardware, infrastruktur, jaringan, dll), guna tercapainya proses berbasis digital yang efektif dan efisien.

  3. Merencanakan dan memelihara sistem data dan database.

  4. Mengidentifikasi dan menganalisa data dari database, untuk didata ulang dengan format yang mudah dibaca oleh user dan mesin, agar menghasilkan laporan diagnostic dan predictive analytics secara efektif dan efisien.

  5. Merencanakan, membuat dan mengevaluasi predictive analytics yang dibuat berdasarkan pemeriksaan tren perubahan data yang sudah terjadi.

  6. Merencanakan, membuat dan mengevaluasi predictive analytics atau forcasting trend yang dibuat berdasarkan hasil diagnostic analitycs.

  7. Berkoordinasi dengan Departemen terkait untuk mengidentifikasi peluang digitalisasi proses, merekomendasikan modifikasi sistem dan mengembangkan kebijakan untuk tata kelola data yang efektif dan efisien.

  8. Membuat dan mengevaluasi dokumentasi yang membantu user memahami proses transformasi data menjadi aplikasi dan laporan analisa.

  9. Memberikan penilaian bulanan dan tahunan kepada bawahan.

  10. Melakukan coaching dan counseling kepada bawahan.


Kualifikasi:

  1. Pendidikan Minimal S1 Teknik Informatika / Sistem Informatika.

  2. Pengalaman minimal 2 tahun pada cakupan yang sama.

  3. Memahami pengoperasian Microsoft Dynamic NAV.

  4. Memahami Platform & Tools Pemrograman.

  5. Memahami SQL, Phyton, R Programing Languange.

  6. Memahami Data mining.

  7. Memahami Teknik data analisis.

  8. Memahami Machine Learning.

  9. Mampu dalam hal Analitical Thinking dan Critcal Thinking.

  10. Bersedia ditempatkan di Cikupa, Tangerang.
title: KEPALA BAGIAN ELECTRONIC DATA PROCESSING (EDP)

description: Python Developer (Code: PD)PT Plexis Erakarsa Pirantiniaga (Plasmedia) is an established IT leader in Jakarta, providing innovative enterprise solutions since 1998. We are looking for a skilled and dedicated Python Developer to contribute to our mission of delivering excellence across various indust...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Python Developer (Code: PD)

PT Plexis Erakarsa Pirantiniaga (Plasmedia) is an established IT leader in Jakarta, providing innovative enterprise solutions since 1998. We are looking for a skilled and dedicated Python Developer to contribute to our mission of delivering excellence across various industries.

Key Responsibilities:

  • System Development: Design, develop, and maintain high-performance software solutions using the Python programming language tailored for enterprise needs.

  • Front-End Integration: Collaborate on user interface development by implementing responsive designs using HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and jQuery.

  • Database Management: Architect and optimize relational database systems, including PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server, or Oracle, to ensure data integrity and system efficiency.

  • Enterprise Solutions: Build and customize functional modules for ERP (specifically Odoo), CRM, and Web-based Content Management Systems (CMS).

  • Code Quality: Uphold high standards of software engineering by writing clean, well-structured, and thoroughly documented code.

  • Project Coordination: Utilize Microsoft Project and Office tools to manage workflows, ensuring all project milestones and deadlines are met effectively.

  • Field Deployment: Demonstrate flexibility and readiness to travel for temporary project-based assignments at client locations.

Technical Proficiencies:

  • Core: Python Programming, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.

  • Database: PostgreSQL, Microsoft SQL Server, or Oracle Database.

  • Systems: ERP (Odoo), CRM, and CMS.

  • Tools: Microsoft Office and Microsoft Project.

  • Value-Add: Experience with DotNetNuke (DNN) or Unified Modeling Language (UML) is a significant advantage.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s Degree (S1) in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field from a reputable institution.

  • Minimum of 1 year of professional experience in Python development.

  • Fluency in both Bahasa Indonesia and English (written and verbal).

  • Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and the ability to work both independently and within a collaborative team environment.

Application Requirements:

To apply, please provide the following documents:

  1. Current Résumé or Curriculum Vitae.

  2. Copy of a valid ID card (KTP).

  3. Recent color photograph (3 x 4 cm).

  4. Copy of University/Institute Diploma and latest Academic Transcript.

  5. Copy of your professional Work Portfolio.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be required to bring hard-copy versions of these documents for the interview phase.

description: PT. Nusantara Duta Solusindo is seeking Data Engineer to join and strengthen our team. We are looking for a candidate who is passionate about technology, has a strong analytical mindset, excels in problem-solving, and has a proven track record in developing effective software solutions for complex s...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT. Nusantara Duta Solusindo is seeking Data Engineer to join and strengthen our team. We are looking for a candidate who is passionate about technology, has a strong analytical mindset, excels in problem-solving, and has a proven track record in developing effective software solutions for complex systems.


Responsibilities

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable and reliable data pipelines (ETL/ELT).

  • Develop and optimize data warehouse and database systems (on-premise or cloud-based).

  • Ensure data quality, consistency, and validation across multiple sources.

  • Collaborate with data analysts, data scientists, and cross-functional teams to understand data needs.

  • Deliver clean, well-structured data for reporting, analytics, and machine learning purposes.

  • Implement monitoring, alerting, and logging for data workflows.

  • Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Mathematics, or a related field.

  • Minimum 2 years of experience working as a Data Engineer or in a similar role.

  • Strong understanding of SQL, data modeling, and ETL/ELT processes.

  • Experience with data pipeline tools such as Apache Airflow, dbt, Talend, or Luigi.

  • Proficient in at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java).

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery), AWS (Redshift), or Azure Data Factory.

  • Knowledge of data warehousing and data lake concepts.

  • Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git) and CI/CD tools for data workflows is a plus.

  • Strong communication skills and ability to work in an Agile team environment.

description: About Us:At PT Pro Teknologi Siber, we're at the cutting edge of AI innovation. Our mission is to drive transformative solutions using the power of artificial intelligence to shape the future of computer vision. We believe in fostering a culture of collaboration, learning, and personal growth. Our t...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About Us:
At PT Pro Teknologi Siber, we're at the cutting edge of AI innovation. Our mission is to drive transformative solutions using the power of artificial intelligence to shape the future of computer vision. We believe in fostering a culture of collaboration, learning, and personal growth. Our team thrives on challenging projects that make a real-world impact, and we're excited to expand our AI capabilities with driven, passionate individuals like you.

Role Overview:
We are looking for a Junior AI Engineer to join our dynamic team and contribute to the development of AI models, including computer vision applications. In this role, you’ll assist in designing, implementing, and optimizing AI systems using machine learning and deep learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and object detection frameworks. You'll play a key role in data preprocessing, ensuring data quality and integrity, while also supporting the testing and validation of computer vision models. You will collaborate closely with senior engineers to learn and grow in this rapidly evolving field.

What You'll Do:

  • Develop AI & Computer Vision Models: Assist in the creation and refinement of machine learning and deep learning models, including computer vision applications like image classification, object detection, and image segmentation using frameworks such as TensorFlow, Keras, and PyTorch.

  • Code Implementation: Write clean, efficient, and scalable code in Python, Java, or Scala to implement AI algorithms, particularly for computer vision tasks.

  • Data Management: Support the team in managing, cleaning, and preprocessing image and video data, ensuring high-quality inputs for training and evaluation of computer vision models.

  • Testing & Validation: Help test and validate AI and computer vision systems, ensuring their performance and reliability across a variety of use cases.

  • Continuous Learning: Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI and computer vision, integrating new techniques into your work to improve model performance and innovation.

  • Team Collaboration: Work closely with senior engineers and cross-functional teams, contributing ideas and solutions while also enhancing your own technical skills.

What We're Looking For:

  • Educational Background: A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).

  • Technical Skills: Experience or coursework in machine learning, deep learning, and computer vision, with proficiency in Python, Java, or Scala. Familiarity with frameworks like TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, OpenCV, or similar is a plus.

  • Data Handling: Solid understanding of data preprocessing techniques, especially for image and video data, and familiarity with data augmentation and annotation methods for computer vision tasks.

  • Problem-Solving Mindset: A curious and analytical mindset, eager to tackle complex computer vision problems and innovate.

  • Team Player: Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively within a team and learn from others.

  • Growth-Oriented: Passionate about AI and computer vision, with a desire to continuously develop your technical skills and knowledge.

Why Join Us?

  • Learning & Development: Be part of a culture that encourages continuous learning and professional growth, with access to resources, mentorship, and real-world experience.

  • Impactful Work: Contribute to projects that make a meaningful impact in [industry or field], using AI and computer vision to solve real-world challenges.

  • Collaborative Environment: Work with a passionate team of engineers and AI experts who support each other’s growth and innovation.

  • Innovation at Scale: Engage with some of the most cutting-edge AI technologies and tools to create solutions that will shape the future.

We are seeking candidates who are not only qualified but also possess genuine interest in joining and growing with our team. If you are considering multiple offers or are still uncertain, we appreciate your honesty at the outset of the process.

If you're excited about the potential of AI and computer vision and are looking for an opportunity to grow in a supportive, forward-thinking company, we'd love to hear from you!

description:
Company Description


About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excel...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description

About Grab and Our Workplace

Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.

Job Description

Get to Know the Team

GrabFin Analytics team supports the GFin product and business organisations, across Payments, Lending, Insurance, and Kios. As a Senior Data Scientist (Analytics), you will be part of the Lending tech family where we strive to be the best FinTech company in the region. Our team is focused on understanding user experiences and partnering with Business, Product, Design, and Tech teams to achieve the right outcomes. We are integral to product development, from understanding user journeys with UX designers, to developing hypotheses, through to post-rollout optimisation.

Get to Know the Role

You will use data to understand user needs and be the de-facto Voice of the Customer (users, driver-partners, merchants, agents) across Lending's suite of products. You will leverage data to unveil insights to help launch, improve and scale our products. You will champion data-driven decision-making within GFin and partner with Product Managers, Business Owners, UX Designers, and Engineers to design analytical projects that drive the Product roadmap. You will provide thought leadership and generate data-driven hypotheses to solve key Product and Business problems, and drive our GFin strategies forward. You will report into the Lending Analytics Manager and work onsite in the Jakarta South Quarter office.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

  • You will partner with product, design, and engineering teams to derive insights, design experiments, and drive key product decisions.
  • You will support strategic plans with data insights, performing deep-dives into user behaviour, segmented views and product efficacy.
  • You will provide tailored analysis for specific products and strategies, define critical business and product metrics, and make regular recommendations for continuous improvements.
  • You will design, measure, and recommend A/B tests and multivariate experiments, including layout optimisation, UI/UX efficacy, algorithm effectiveness, and API performance.
  • You will analyse clickstream and transactional data to uncover insights on user behaviour and drive product metrics. You will manage instrumentation for all feature releases within assigned tech families within GFin.
  • You will develop self-serve solutions for stakeholders that are scalable and automated to handle a product environment. You will drive plans involving Large Language Models or Generative Artificial Intelligence.

Qualifications

What Essential Skills You Will Need

  • You have at least 4 years of experience in Analytics, Business Intelligence, or Data Science, in a Tech (FinTech or E-Commerce) company.
  • You have a Bachelor's Degree in Statistics, Analytics, Economics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related fields.
  • You are proficient in writing advanced SQL queries and querying large relational databases.
  • You have hands-on experience with data analysis and programming tools such as Python.
  • You are skilled in data visualisation platforms like PowerBI or D3.js to present findings.
  • You have experience designing, running, and analysing A/B tests and product experiments, with knowledge of hypothesis testing and the basic principles of Design of Experiments (DoE).

Additional Information

Life at Grab

We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:

  • We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
  • With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
  • Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
  • We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
  • Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours

What We Stand For At Grab

We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.
title: Senior Data Scientist (Analytics) - Grab Financial Services

jobDescriptionHtml:
Data Annotation Staff (Anotasi Suara) for Artificial Intelligence

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

  • Melakukan proses anotasi, pelabelan, dan validasi data suara sesuai dengan pedoman yang telah ditentukan.

  • Mendengarkan rekaman audio dan menginput data secara akurat ke dalam sistem.

  • Mengikuti instruksi serta standar kualitas yang diberikan oleh tim supervisor.

  • Memastikan hasil kerja memenuhi target kuantitas dan kualitas harian.

  • Melaporkan kendala teknis atau ketidaksesuaian data kepada tim terkait.

Kualifikasi

  • Mampu mengoperasikan komputer/laptop dengan lancar (termasuk penggunaan browser, Microsoft Office/Google Docs, dan sistem berbasis web).

  • Memiliki kemampuan mengikuti instruksi dengan teliti dan detail.

  • Mampu bekerja secara disiplin, fokus, dan konsisten dalam pekerjaan yang bersifat repetitif.

  • Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan serta memenuhi target waktu yang ditetapkan.

  • Memiliki ketelitian dan konsentrasi yang baik dalam mendengarkan audio.

  • Bersedia bekerja sesuai jadwal yang ditentukan (kontrak 1 bulan, WFO Senin–Jumat 08.30–17.30).

Informasi Tambahan

  • Lokasi kerja: Menara Matahari – Karawaci

  • Uang saku: Rp200.000 / hari

description: The OpportunityJoin the innovative team at PT. Sreeya Sewu Indonesia, Tbk' as a Full Stack Data Engineer. jobDescriptionHtml:
The Opportunity

Join the innovative team at PT. Sreeya Sewu Indonesia, Tbk' as a Full Stack Data Engineer. In this full-time role, you will play a crucial part in developing cutting-edge data solutions that drive the company's strategic objectives. Based in the vibrant South Jakarta area, you'll have the opportunity to work on challenging and rewarding projects that make an impact.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Design, develop, and maintain robust data pipelines and infrastructure to process and transform complex data sets

  2. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into effective data solutions

  3. Develop and optimise data-driven applications and analytical tools to support data-informed decision making

  4. Implement scalable and efficient data storage and retrieval systems

  5. Ensure data quality, integrity, and security throughout the data lifecycle

  6. Stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and best practices in data engineering

  7. Contribute to the continuous improvement of the company's data infrastructure and capabilities

What We're Looking For

  1. Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field

  2. Minimum 2 years of experience in full-stack data engineering or a similar role

  3. Proficient in Python, SQL, and NoSQL database technologies

  4. Hands-on experience with data processing frameworks like Apache Spark, Apache Kafka, or similar

  5. Strong understanding of data architecture, data modelling, and data warehousing principles

  6. Experience with cloud-based data platforms (e.g., AWS, Google Cloud, Azure)

  7. Familiarity with agile software development methodologies

  8. Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills

What We Offer

At PT. Sreeya Sewu Indonesia, Tbk', we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and collaborative work environment. You'll have access to competitive compensation, comprehensive health benefits, and opportunities for professional development and career growth. Our focus on work-life balance means you can thrive both at work and in your personal life.

If you're passionate about data engineering and ready to contribute to the success of an industry-leading company, we encourage you to apply now.
title: Full Stack Data Engineering

description: Contruction AI Expert Position at PT Sepuluh Sumber AnugerahAs a Construction AI Expert at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah, you will play a pivotal role in developing cutting-edge AI-powered solutions to transform the construction industry. This full-time position is based in Banten, offering you the opp...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Contruction AI Expert Position at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah

As a Construction AI Expert at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah, you will play a pivotal role in developing cutting-edge AI-powered solutions to transform the construction industry. This full-time position is based in Banten, offering you the opportunity to contribute to the company's ambitious technological initiatives and make a tangible impact.

Primary Responsibilities:

  1. Spearhead the design and development of AI models and algorithms to optimise construction processes and enhance project management

  2. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities for AI integration and implement innovative solutions

  3. Analyse construction data and leverage machine learning techniques to drive actionable insights and drive data-driven decision making

  4. Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI and construction technologies, and proactively explore new applications

  5. Provide technical leadership and mentorship to junior team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning and innovation

  6. Communicate complex technical concepts to various stakeholders, ensuring alignment and buy-in for your work

  7. Monitoring all security data that submit in to AI machine, also can elaborate the results of AI information to the team.

Required Qualifications:

  1. Proven expertise in AI, machine learning, and computer vision, with a strong background in construction or a related industry

  2. Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, and experience in developing and deploying AI models

  3. Excellent problem-solving skills, critical thinking, and the ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions

  4. Hands-on experience in data analysis, data engineering, and building end-to-end AI pipelines

  5. A collaborative mindset and excellent communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams

  6. A passion for staying ahead of the curve and exploring new technologies to drive innovation

Benefits at PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugrah:

At PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugrah, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and supportive work environment. As a Construction AI Expert, you will have access to:

  1. Competitive remuneration and comprehensive benefits package

  2. Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

  3. A dynamic and collaborative work culture that encourages innovation and creativity

  4. Flexible work arrangements and work-life balance initiatives

  5. State-of-the-art facilities and the latest technological tools


About PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugrah:

PT Sepuluh Sumber Anugerah is a leading provider of innovative technology solutions for the construction industry. With a mission to revolutionise the way construction projects are planned, executed, and managed, we are at the forefront of AI and automation in the built environment. Join our dynamic team and be a part of the transformation that is reshaping the future of construction.

Apply now to become our next Construction AI Expert and help us drive the digital transformation of the construction industry.

description: We are seeking highly skilled AI Automation & Systems Specialist to design and implement automation to our Digital Transformation within our organization.This role focuses on developing and maintain sophisticated AI-driven workflows and internal systems that reduce manual work, improve efficiency, a...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are seeking highly skilled AI Automation & Systems Specialist to design and implement automation to our Digital Transformation within our organization.

This role focuses on developing and maintain sophisticated AI-driven workflows and internal systems that reduce manual work, improve efficiency, and integrate multiple platforms within our operations.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Design and build automation workflows across internal systems

  • Implement AI Integrations to improvae operational efficiency

  • Build automation using tools such as Make.com, Zapier, Power Automate, or n8n

  • Integrate APIs between internal tools, CRM system, and third-party platforms

  • Build and deploy AI agents and AI-assisted workflows

  • Work with management team to identify processes that can be automated

  • Maintain and improve existing automation infrastructure

  • Document automation systems and workflows


Required Skills & Experience:

  • Proven hands-on Experience building workflows and AI agent using automation platforms such as    Make.com, Zapier, n8n, or Power Automate

  • Experience building AI chatbots, including setting up and optimizing RAG-based knowledge bases for accurate performance

  • Strong technical understanding of AI tools and AI workflows

  • Experience working with AI agents or LLM tools (Claude, GPT, etc.)

  • Comfortable working with APIs and system integrations

  • Strong Basic command line / terminal experience (CLI)

  • Ability to identify and troubleshoot automation workflows and technical integrations

  • Strong problem-solving ability and technical curiosity


Highly Desirable:

  • Experience building AI agents or multi-step AI workflows

  • Experience integrating AI into business processes

  • Familiarity with webhooks, APIs, and data pipelines

  • Basic scripting ability (Python, JavaScript, or similar)


What We Offer:

  • Opportunity to build AI systems within a fast-growing organization

  • Work directly with management team on automation strategy

  • Freedom to experiment with cutting-edge AI tools
title: Specialist, AI Automation Transformation & System

description:
Support the sales cycle, covering the technical architecture, data strategy, and AI capabilities of Data Cloud and Agentforce.
Design, build, and present hands-on Proof of Concepts (POCs) and demonstrations for Data Cloud and Agentforce, showcasing their power and viability to technical stakeholders...
jobDescriptionHtml:
• Support the sales cycle, covering the technical architecture, data strategy, and AI capabilities of Data Cloud and Agentforce.

  • Design, build, and present hands-on Proof of Concepts (POCs) and demonstrations for Data Cloud and Agentforce, showcasing their power and viability to technical stakeholders.

  • Explain the technical and business benefits of the Salesforce Customer 360 platform, with a strong focus on Data Cloud and Agentforce, to IT and technical stakeholders.

  • Understand, assess, and define technical customer requirements, focusing on AI, data management, and operational data utilisation.

  • Advise CIO/CTO/CXO-level contacts and their IT teams on adopting cloud architectures, particularly how to leverage unified customer data and generative AI effectively.

  • Answer deep technical questions related to the capabilities and integration of Salesforce Data Cloud, AI, and Agentforce solutions.

  • Establish close relationships with customer technical stakeholders and act as a trusted advisor on data and AI strategy.

  • Respond to RFPs, focusing on the technical components of data, AI, and integration.

  • Coach and mentor fellow pre-sales colleagues on the technical aspects of Data Cloud and Agentforce.

  • Be a thought leader on specific technology topics like Generative AI and Data Strategy.

  • Drive innovation projects with impact (POCs, MVPs).

  • Maintain awareness of technical best practices related to data governance, security, and compliance.


Minimum Qualifications:

  • Proven track record of running hands-on, successful technical Proof of Concepts (POCs) for complex AI and/or Data solutions.

  • Relevant background and deep technical expertise in AI, Machine Learning, and/or Advanced Data Solutions (e.g., CDP, Data Warehousing, Data Lake, etc.).

  • Fluent in English and local language (Bahasa)

  • Experience in pre-sales, e.g., solution engineering or technical architecture.

  • Multi-year experience in software, system, or enterprise architecture disciplines.

  • Strong understanding of data integration patterns, data synchronisation, and data volume considerations in a cloud environment.

  • Good understanding of the architectural principles of cloud-based platforms, including SaaS, PaaS, multitenancy, and multi-tiered infrastructure.

  • General interest in staying at the forefront of current technology developments and keeping knowledge up to date.


Preferred Qualifications:

  • Direct experience with Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce, Marketing Cloud, or Service Cloud (Agentforce) solutions.

  • Experience with Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI architectures.

  • Salesforce Certified Architect or relevant Data/AI certifications (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP Data/ML certifications).

  • Knowledge of relevant data privacy and compliance requirements is a plus.

  • Knowledge of data architecture principles, including data modeling, ETL/ELT, data governance, and data quality.

Tentang SalesforceSalesforce adalah CRM AI terkemuka, di mana manusia dan agen bekerja sama untuk mencapai kesuksesan pelanggan. Di sini, ambisi bertemu dengan tindakan. Teknologi bertemu dengan kepercayaan. Dan inovasi bukan sekadar istilah populer — itu adalah cara hidup. Dunia kerja yang kita kenal sedang berubah, dan kami mencari Trailblazers yang bersemangat untuk meningkatkan bisnis dan dunia melalui AI, mendorong inovasi, dan menjaga nilai-nilai inti Salesforce di pusat segala hal. Siap untuk mengembangkan karier Anda di perusahaan yang memimpin transformasi tenaga kerja di era agen? Anda berada di tempat yang tepat! Agentforce adalah masa depan AI, dan Anda adalah masa depan Salesforce. Bersama dengan karyawan, pelanggan, dan mitra kami, kami bekerja untuk meningkatkan kondisi dunia. Komitmen kami terhadap budaya yang didorong oleh nilai-nilai — yang berakar pada Kepercayaan, Kesuksesan Pelanggan, Inovasi, dan Kesetaraan — adalah alasan mengapa kami secara konsisten diakui sebagai salah satu pemberi kerja terkemuka di dunia. Insinyur Solusi Datacloud dan Agentforce adalah anggota kunci dari tim pra-penjualan. Fokus peran ini adalah menangani topik teknis kompleks dalam siklus penjualan, khususnya untuk solusi Data Cloud dan Agentforce kami. Anda akan berperan penting dalam membantu pelanggan memahami bagaimana kemampuan Salesforce generasi berikutnya ini cocok dan terintegrasi ke dalam lanskap arsitektur mereka yang sudah ada. Komponen kritis dari peran ini adalah bertindak sebagai ahli teknis yang praktis yang merancang, mengembangkan, dan mengimplementasikan Proof of Concepts (POC) dan hackathons untuk solusi Data Cloud dan Agentforce. Ini melibatkan transformasi visi arsitektur menjadi solusi yang nyata dan berfungsi, yang menunjukkan kekuatan data terpadu yang didorong oleh AI kepada pelanggan kami. Topik yang dibahas meliputi arsitektur AI/Machine Learning, unifikasi data, arsitektur data skala besar, pemodelan data, kinerja solusi, dan pola integrasi sistem.Dampak Anda – Tanggung Jawab:

Mendukung siklus penjualan dengan membahas arsitektur teknis, strategi data, dan kemampuan AI dari Data Cloud dan Agentforce.

Merancang, membangun, dan mempresentasikan Proof of Concepts (POC) dan demonstrasi praktis untuk Data Cloud dan Agentforce, menampilkan kekuatan dan kelayakannya kepada pemangku kepentingan teknis.  

Menjelaskan manfaat teknis dan bisnis platform Salesforce Customer 360, dengan fokus kuat pada Data Cloud dan Agentforce, kepada pemangku kepentingan IT dan teknis.  

Memahami, mengevaluasi, dan mendefinisikan persyaratan teknis pelanggan, dengan fokus pada AI, manajemen data, dan pemanfaatan data operasional.

Memberikan saran kepada kontak tingkat CIO/CTO/CXO dan tim IT mereka tentang adopsi arsitektur cloud, terutama cara memanfaatkan data pelanggan terpadu dan AI generatif secara efektif.  

Menjawab pertanyaan teknis mendalam terkait kemampuan dan integrasi solusi Salesforce Data Cloud, AI, dan Agentforce.  

Membangun hubungan dekat dengan pemangku kepentingan teknis pelanggan dan bertindak sebagai penasihat tepercaya dalam strategi data dan AI.

Menanggapi RFP, dengan fokus pada komponen teknis data, AI, dan integrasi.  

Membimbing dan membina rekan kerja pra-penjualan dalam aspek teknis Data Cloud dan Agentforce.  

Menjadi pemimpin pemikiran dalam topik teknologi spesifik seperti AI Generatif dan Strategi Data.  

Menggerakkan proyek inovasi berdampak (POC, MVP).  

Menjaga kesadaran akan praktik terbaik teknis terkait tata kelola data, keamanan, dan kepatuhan.

Persyaratan Minimum:

Rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam mengelola Proof of Concepts (POC) teknis yang sukses untuk solusi AI dan/atau data yang kompleks.

Latar belakang relevan dan keahlian teknis mendalam dalam AI, Machine Learning, dan/atau Solusi Data Lanjutan (misalnya CDP, Data Warehousing, Data Lake, dll.).

Menguasai bahasa Inggris dan bahasa lokal (Bahasa).

Pengalaman dalam pra-penjualan, misalnya rekayasa solusi atau arsitektur teknis.

Pengalaman bertahun-tahun dalam disiplin arsitektur perangkat lunak, sistem, atau arsitektur perusahaan.

Pemahaman yang kuat tentang pola integrasi data, sinkronisasi data, dan pertimbangan volume data dalam lingkungan cloud.

Pemahaman yang baik tentang prinsip arsitektur platform berbasis cloud, termasuk SaaS, PaaS, multitenancy, dan infrastruktur berlapis.  

Minat umum untuk tetap berada di garis depan perkembangan teknologi terkini dan memperbarui pengetahuan.  

Kualifikasi yang Diutamakan:  

Pengalaman langsung dengan solusi Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce, Marketing Cloud, atau Service Cloud (Agentforce).

Pengalaman dengan Model Bahasa Besar (LLMs) dan arsitektur AI Generatif.

Sertifikasi Salesforce Certified Architect atau sertifikasi Data/AI yang relevan (misalnya, AWS, Azure, GCP Data/ML).

Pengetahuan tentang persyaratan privasi dan kepatuhan data yang relevan merupakan nilai tambah.

Pengetahuan tentang prinsip arsitektur data, termasuk pemodelan data, ETL/ELT, tata kelola data, dan kualitas data.
title: Agentforce & Data 360 Solution Engineer - Indonesia

Fokus peran ini adalah menangani topik teknis kompleks dalam siklus penjualan, khususnya untuk solusi Data Cloud dan Agentforce kami. Anda akan berperan penting dalam membantu pelanggan memahami bagaimana kemampuan Salesforce generasi berikutnya ini cocok dan terintegrasi ke dalam lanskap arsitektur mereka yang sudah ada. Komponen kritis dari peran ini adalah bertindak sebagai ahli teknis yang praktis yang merancang, mengembangkan, dan mengimplementasikan Proof of Concepts (POC) dan hackathons untuk solusi Data Cloud dan Agentforce. Ini melibatkan transformasi visi arsitektur menjadi solusi yang nyata dan berfungsi, yang menunjukkan kekuatan data terpadu yang didorong oleh AI kepada pelanggan kami. Topik yang dibahas meliputi arsitektur AI/Machine Learning, unifikasi data, arsitektur data skala besar, pemodelan data, kinerja solusi, dan pola integrasi sistem.Dampak Anda – Tanggung Jawab:

Mendukung siklus penjualan dengan membahas arsitektur teknis, strategi data, dan kemampuan AI dari Data Cloud dan Agentforce.

Merancang, membangun, dan mempresentasikan Proof of Concepts (POC) dan demonstrasi praktis untuk Data Cloud dan Agentforce, menampilkan kekuatan dan kelayakannya kepada pemangku kepentingan teknis.  

Menjelaskan manfaat teknis dan bisnis platform Salesforce Customer 360, dengan fokus kuat pada Data Cloud dan Agentforce, kepada pemangku kepentingan IT dan teknis.  

Memahami, mengevaluasi, dan mendefinisikan persyaratan teknis pelanggan, dengan fokus pada AI, manajemen data, dan pemanfaatan data operasional.

Memberikan saran kepada kontak tingkat CIO/CTO/CXO dan tim IT mereka tentang adopsi arsitektur cloud, terutama cara memanfaatkan data pelanggan terpadu dan AI generatif secara efektif.  

Menjawab pertanyaan teknis mendalam terkait kemampuan dan integrasi solusi Salesforce Data Cloud, AI, dan Agentforce.  

Membangun hubungan dekat dengan pemangku kepentingan teknis pelanggan dan bertindak sebagai penasihat tepercaya dalam strategi data dan AI.

Menanggapi RFP, dengan fokus pada komponen teknis data, AI, dan integrasi.  

Membimbing dan membina rekan kerja pra-penjualan dalam aspek teknis Data Cloud dan Agentforce.  

Menjadi pemimpin pemikiran dalam topik teknologi spesifik seperti AI Generatif dan Strategi Data.  

Menggerakkan proyek inovasi berdampak (POC, MVP).  

Menjaga kesadaran akan praktik terbaik teknis terkait tata kelola data, keamanan, dan kepatuhan.

Persyaratan Minimum:

Rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam mengelola Proof of Concepts (POC) teknis yang sukses untuk solusi AI dan/atau data yang kompleks.

Latar belakang relevan dan keahlian teknis mendalam dalam AI, Machine Learning, dan/atau Solusi Data Lanjutan (misalnya CDP, Data Warehousing, Data Lake, dll.).

Menguasai bahasa Inggris dan bahasa lokal (Bahasa).

Pengalaman dalam pra-penjualan, misalnya rekayasa solusi atau arsitektur teknis.

Pengalaman bertahun-tahun dalam disiplin arsitektur perangkat lunak, sistem, atau arsitektur perusahaan.

Pemahaman yang kuat tentang pola integrasi data, sinkronisasi data, dan pertimbangan volume data dalam lingkungan cloud.

Pemahaman yang baik tentang prinsip arsitektur platform berbasis cloud, termasuk SaaS, PaaS, multitenancy, dan infrastruktur berlapis.  

Minat umum untuk tetap berada di garis depan perkembangan teknologi terkini dan memperbarui pengetahuan.  

Kualifikasi yang Diutamakan:  

Pengalaman langsung dengan solusi Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce, Marketing Cloud, atau Service Cloud (Agentforce).

Pengalaman dengan Model Bahasa Besar (LLMs) dan arsitektur AI Generatif.

Sertifikasi Salesforce Certified Architect atau sertifikasi Data/AI yang relevan (misalnya, AWS, Azure, GCP Data/ML).

Pengetahuan tentang persyaratan privasi dan kepatuhan data yang relevan merupakan nilai tambah.

Pengetahuan tentang prinsip arsitektur data, termasuk pemodelan data, ETL/ELT, tata kelola data, dan kualitas data.
title: Agentforce & Data 360 Solution Engineer - Indonesia

description: Steradian Data Optima is looking for a Presales – AI & Data Solutions to help customers turn business challenges into impactful AI and modern data platform solutions.In this role, you will work closely with sales and technical teams to design, position, and present solutions built on Databricks, Sno...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Steradian Data Optima is looking for a Presales – AI & Data Solutions to help customers turn business challenges into impactful AI and modern data platform solutions.

In this role, you will work closely with sales and technical teams to design, position, and present solutions built on Databricks, Snowflake, and compatible open-source technologies. We're looking for someone with a strong technical foundation in AI / ML / Data Science, combined with the ability to engage customers and drive solution conversations confidently.

What you'll do

• Support sales in positioning AI and data solutions

• Understand customer needs and translate them into solution designs

• Present architectures, demos, and POCs

• Create proposals and support technical discussions with customers

• Work with internal teams to ensure solutions are scalable and practical


Requirements

• Minimum 2 years experience in ML, AI, or Data Science implementation

• Experience as a Data Scientist or similar technical role

• Minimum 1 year experience in Presales or customer-facing technical role

• Familiar with Databricks, Snowflake, or similar open-source data platforms

• Good understanding of:

o Python

o Apache Spark / PySpark

o ML frameworks such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch

o Data engineering and analytics workflows

• Familiar with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, GCP, and Alibaba Cloud

• Strong communication, presentation, and problem-solving skills


Nice to have

• Experience with Databricks Lakehouse or Snowflake Data Cloud

• Exposure to MLOps or model deployment

• Experience supporting enterprise AI or data modernization initiatives


Join Steradian Data Optima and help shape real-world AI and data solutions for enterprise customers.
title: Presales – AI & Data Solutions

description: Key Responsibilities• Design, build, and maintain data pipelines to support analytics, reporting, and operational use cases using Microsoft Fabric or similar platforms (e.g., Azure Databricks, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift).• Develop and optimize ETL/ELT workflows across multiple source systems, ens...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities
• Design, build, and maintain data pipelines to support analytics, reporting, and operational use cases using Microsoft Fabric or similar platforms (e.g., Azure Databricks, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift).

• Develop and optimize ETL/ELT workflows across multiple source systems, ensuring reliable and high performance data integration.

• Write and maintain notebooks (Python, SQL) with clean, efficient, and well structured code.

• Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and security of data through validation, monitoring, and troubleshooting.

• Collaborate with stakeholders to understand data requirements and translate them into scalable data solutions.

• Contribute to the continuous improvement of data engineering standards, data quality checks, technical documentation, and best practices.

Requirements

• Bachelor's degree (S1) in Computer Science or Information System, or related field.

• 1-3 years of hands-on experience in Data Engineering, Data Warehouse, Business Intelligence, Analytics, or related technical field.

• Strong proficiency in SQL (must-have); experience writing complex queries and optimizing performance.

• Solid understanding of ETL/ELT processes, data modeling, and data warehouse concepts.

• Good knowledge in Python or equivalent programming language.

• Strong communication skills in English, both written and verbal.

• Familiarity with modern data platforms such as Microsoft Fabric, Azure Databricks, Snowflake, BigQuery, or Redshift is highly preferred.

• Exposure to BI tools such as Power BI or Tableau is a plus.

You will also assist in monitoring stock usage, maintaining production documents, and supporti...
jobDescriptionHtml:
"As part of our Production team, you will support daily administrative activities, including preparing and updating production reports, inputting production data, and coordinating with related departments. You will also assist in monitoring stock usage, maintaining production documents, and supporting inventory reconciliation. In addition, you will help with production planning activities, track production performance, and ensure data accuracy in accordance with company procedures (SOP)."

 

  • Minimum Diploma (D3) degree in Management, Accounting, Industrial Engineering, or related field

  • Minimum 1–3 years of experience as Production Admin / Operational Admin / Warehouse Admin

  • Experience in a manufacturing environment is a plus

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (Pivot Table, VLOOKUP/HLOOKUP), including data processing & reporting

  • Good knowledge of Microsoft Word and PowerPoint

  • Detail-oriented, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment
title: Production Administration

description: About the CompanyWe are a leading main construction contractor specializing in data center development. Our projects demand high precision, strong technical knowledge, and strict adherence to cost, quality, and timeline standards. We are looking for a Quantity Surveyor to join our team and support t...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the Company

We are a leading main construction contractor specializing in data center development. Our projects demand high precision, strong technical knowledge, and strict adherence to cost, quality, and timeline standards. We are looking for a Quantity Surveyor to join our team and support the commercial and cost management aspects of our ongoing and upcoming data center projects.


Key Responsibilities:

·       Prepare, review, and manage cost estimates, bills of quantities (BoQ), and tender documentation for data center construction projects.

·       Evaluate and compare supplier, vendor, and subcontractor quotations to ensure compliance with project requirements.

·       Conduct cost control and financial reporting throughout all project stages.

·       Manage and monitor variations, change orders, and progress claims.

·       Support contract negotiation, procurement, and tender evaluation processes.

·       Work closely with the project management, engineering, and procurement teams to ensure cost-effective project execution.

·       Conduct site visits to assess progress, verify quantities, and ensure compliance with contractual obligations.

·       Prepare monthly valuations, cash flow forecasts, and cost-to-complete reports.

·       Assist in resolving contractual and commercial disputes.

·       Ensure all cost and commercial documentation complies with company standards, policies, and client requirements.


 Qualifications and Education Requirements

·       Bachelor’s degree in MEP Engineering or related field especially has a strong knowledge and experience in Quantity Surveying.

·       Minimum 3–5 years of experience in a Quantity Surveyor or Cost Engineer role within construction or infrastructure projects (data center experience preferred).

·       Strong knowledge of construction contracts and procurement processes.

·       Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, AutoCAD, Negotiations, etc.

·       Can both speak English and Bahasa

·       Excellent numerical, analytical, and communication skills.

·       Detail-oriented, organized, and capable of managing multiple priorities under tight deadlines.

·       Knowledge of MEP systems and data center-specific infrastructure is an advantage.
title: QS (Quantity Surveyor)

description: Job Description:Develop, suggest, and implement an effective planning and analysis capability that will provide management team with appropriate analytic tools to support business planning & decision making processWork closely with Head of Corporate Planning & Risk Management to maintain and evaluat...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

  • Develop, suggest, and implement an effective planning and analysis capability that will provide management team with appropriate analytic tools to support business planning & decision making process

  • Work closely with Head of Corporate Planning & Risk Management to maintain and evaluate achievement and follow-up strategies in order to support the achievement of the company's vision and mission

  • Apply strategic frameworks to analyze & identify any kind of risks towards company and develop risk mitigation system

  • Analyze, evaluate and create sustainable management system in our company group and continuously seeking for improvement towards the implementation process.

  • Analyze and plan company group’s Key Performance Indicator (KPI) & tools to monitor and evaluate the achievements

  • Develop and maintain strong relationships with group strategy partners, management, and stakeholders

Requirements:

  • Min Bachelor degree in Industrial Engineering, Economics, Business, Management or equal

  • 1-2 years in Corporate Planning, System Management Development & Implementation, Risk Management. 

  • Having knowledge in Balance Score Card, OKR, SOP, Data & Business Intelligence experience (e.g. Data Analysis, Power BI, Tableau) is preferred

  • Understand broad business issues, benchmark and analyze various business risks, able to design, carry out analysis and business process models.

  • Negotiation skill, risk & business analysis, strong analytical background, a problem solver and have excellent diagramming and communication.

  • Specialized knowledge: hospitality, property, construction industry, knowledge of macro and micro economic conditions, organization’s culture and structure.

  • High integrity and trustworthy, have a good relationship with co-workers and business associates, ability to multi task and work under pressure.

  • Fluent in English.
title: Corporate Planning & Strategic Management Analyst

description: ResponsibilitiesManage and manipulate data using SQL Server to ensure accuracy, consistency, and reliability of dataBuild and maintain SSIS packages to import and integrate data from Excel and other sources into SQL ServerUtilize SSAS to analyze data and support reporting needs, including preparing ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities

  1. Manage and manipulate data using SQL Server to ensure accuracy, consistency, and reliability of data

  2. Build and maintain SSIS packages to import and integrate data from Excel and other sources into SQL Server

  3. Utilize SSAS to analyze data and support reporting needs, including preparing structured reports in Excel

  4. Develop and monitor Data Mart using SQL, Power Query, or Power BI to support business insights and decision-making

  5. Compile and consolidate data from multiple sources into a reliable dataset

  6. Perform data reconciliation to ensure accuracy and alignment of incoming data within the system

  7. Support data preparation for Accounts Receivable (AR) collection processes

  8. Assist in reconciling data between Accurate and Orders systems to ensure consistency across platforms

  9. Review reconciliation results and collaborate with related teams to resolve discrepancies and improve data quality


Requirements

  1. Bachelor ‘s degree in Information System, Computer Science, Accounting, Mathematics or related field

  2. Experience as Data Specialist / Data Analyst / Data Management or related field at least 1 year, Freshgraduate are open to apply

  3. Comfortable working with SQL Server to explore data, write complex queries, and optimize performance

  4. Hands-on with SSIS to build ETL pipelines, connect data from various sources, and automate processes

  5. Familiar with SSAS for data modeling and turning raw data into structured insights

  6. Proficient in using Power Query & Power BI to transform data and build clean, interactive dashboards

  7. Strong Excel skills (formulas, pivot tables, and all the good stuff for data crunching)

  8. Curious and genuinely enjoy working with data, with strong analytical thinking and attention to detail

  9. Proactive, fast learner, and comfortable working both independently and in a collaborative, fast-paced team
title: Data Specialist

description: Kami sedang mencari Service Administrator untuk bergabung dengan PT Berca Carrier Indonesia. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran penting dalam memberikan dukungan administratif yang sangat diperlukan untuk memastikan pelayanan dan pengalaman pelanggan yang luar biasa.Tanggung Jawab Utama1. Pe...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kami sedang mencari Service Administrator untuk bergabung dengan PT Berca Carrier Indonesia. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran penting dalam memberikan dukungan administratif yang sangat diperlukan untuk memastikan pelayanan dan pengalaman pelanggan yang luar biasa.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

1. Pengelolaan Dokumen & Data

  • Mengelola, menyimpan, dan mengarsipkan dokumen perusahaanbaik dalam bentuk fisik maupun digital.

  • Memastikan data tersusun dengan rapi, akurat, dan mudah diakses.

  • Melakukan input dan update data secara berkala ke dalam sistem (SAP).

2. Pengelolaan Komunikasi

  • Menjadi penghubung komunikasi internal dan eksternal (factory & vendor).

  • Menyaring dan mendistribusikan informasi kepada pihak terkait.

3. Pengolahan Data & Laporan

  • Menyusun laporan rutin (harian, mingguan, bulanan).

  • Melakukan pengecekan dan validasi data sebelum dilaporkan.

  • Mendukung analisis sederhana terkait data administratif

4. Dukungan Administratif untuk Tim

  • Membantu kebutuhan administratif tim Sales seperti pembuatan Sales Order (SO), Sales Quotation (SQ), memberikan informasi/komunikasi dari factory ke tim Sales, pengajuan credit limit/TOP customer, dll.

  • Membantu kebutuhan administrasi tim Operation seperti membuat Travel Aplication (TA) dan juga proses Cash Advance untuk kebutuhan Engineer dan teknisi melakukan perjalanan dinas atau keperluan di project.

  • Melakukan proses Purchasing seperti membuat Purchase Request (PR), Purchase Order (PO), proses bidding vendor, negosiasi dengan vendor, update harga ke factory, dll.

5. Kepatuhan & Kerapihan Administrasi

  • Memastikan seluruh dokumen dan proses administrasi sesuai dengan kebijakan perusahaan.

  • Menjaga kerahasiaan data dan informasi perusahaan.

6. Tugas Tambahan

  • Melaksanakan tugas lain yang berkaitan dengan fungsi administrasi sesuai arahan atasan.


Keterampilan dan Kualifikasi

  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 2 tahun dalam peran administrasi atau layanan pelanggan

  • Mahir dalam menggunakan Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)

  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, verbal dan tertulis, dalam Bahasa Indonesia dan Bahasa Inggris

  • Berorientasi pada detail dan dapat bekerja dengan tepat waktu

  • Membantu kebutuhan administrasi tim Operation seperti membuat Travel Aplication (TA) dan juga proses Cash Advance untuk kebutuhan Engineer dan teknisi melakukan perjalanan dinas atau keperluan di project.

  • Melakukan proses Purchasing seperti membuat Purchase Request (PR), Purchase Order (PO), proses bidding vendor, negosiasi dengan vendor, update harga ke factory, dll.

5. Kepatuhan & Kerapihan Administrasi

  • Memastikan seluruh dokumen dan proses administrasi sesuai dengan kebijakan perusahaan.

  • Menjaga kerahasiaan data dan informasi perusahaan.

6. Tugas Tambahan

  • Melaksanakan tugas lain yang berkaitan dengan fungsi administrasi sesuai arahan atasan.


Keterampilan dan Kualifikasi

  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 2 tahun dalam peran administrasi atau layanan pelanggan

  • Mahir dalam menggunakan Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)

  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, verbal dan tertulis, dalam Bahasa Indonesia dan Bahasa Inggris

  • Berorientasi pada detail dan dapat bekerja dengan tepat waktu

description: About the roleSigmatech is seeking a Data Engineer (ETL – Microsoft Fabric) to join our team in our South Jakarta office. This full-time role will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining our data pipelines and infrastructure, with a focus on Microsoft Fabric. You will play a key pa...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

Sigmatech is seeking a Data Engineer (ETL – Microsoft Fabric) to join our team in our South Jakarta office. This full-time role will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining our data pipelines and infrastructure, with a focus on Microsoft Fabric. You will play a key part in driving our data strategy and transforming raw data into valuable business insights.

Job Description:

  1. Design, develop, and manage ETL processes (Extract, Transform, Load) for data integration and transformation.

  2. Build and maintain data pipelines using Microsoft Fabric to support scalable data solutions.

  3. Develop and manage Power BI reports, including data modeling, DAX, and data visualization.

  4. Implement and support data warehouse solutions while ensuring data quality, consistency, and accuracy.

  5. Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and translate them into data-driven solutions.

Qualifications:

  1. Minimum 2 - 3 years of experience in ETL processes and data engineering or database programming.

  2. Hands-on experience with Microsoft Fabric and strong proficiency in Power BI.

  3. Solid understanding of data warehouse concepts and data integration.

  4. Experience handling medium to large-scale datasets with strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

  5. Good communication and teamwork skills.

  6. Availability: Preferably ASAP

Recruitment Process : CV Screening → Technical Test (Live Test) → Interview Online with User → Offering → Contract Signing → Onboarding with Client

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you.

About us

Sigmatech is a leading provider of innovative IT solutions and services in Indonesia. With a strong focus on digital transformation, we help our clients leverage the power of data and technology to drive business success. Our team of passionate and talented professionals is committed to delivering excellence and creating lasting value for our clients.

If you're excited about the prospect of joining our team, we encourage you to apply now!

description: Didirikan pada tahun 2006, Nabel Sakha kini terbagi menjadi tiga perusahaan dengan fokus yang berbeda : PT Nabel Sakha Gemilang yang berfokus pada distribusi pelumas industri, PT Rafitama Millenial Wahyudi yang berfokus pada distribusi komponen hidrolik dan pneumatik, dan PT Dimensi Quantum Wahyudi ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Didirikan pada tahun 2006, Nabel Sakha kini terbagi menjadi tiga perusahaan dengan fokus yang berbeda : PT Nabel Sakha Gemilang yang berfokus pada distribusi pelumas industri, PT Rafitama Millenial Wahyudi yang berfokus pada distribusi komponen hidrolik dan pneumatik, dan PT Dimensi Quantum Wahyudi yang berfokus pada distribusi komponen vakum dan sistem penanganan (handling systems).

Nabel Sakha Group berkomitmen untuk hanya mendistribusikan produk-produk berkualitas dengan solusi praktis guna memberikan produk dan layanan terbaik yang tersedia bagi para pelanggan setianya, dengan komitmen penuh terhadap kepuasan pelanggan


Job Desription :

  1. Mencari dan mengidentifikasi peluang bisnis baru (leads) di segmen manufaktur/B2B.

  2. Melakukan presentasi produk/layanan yang persuasif dan melakukan demo produk kepada calon klien.

  3. Menyusun proposal bisnis, melakukan negosiasi kontrak, dan memastikan penutupan penjualan (closing) sesuai target

  4. Mengelola data prospek di sistem CRM dan memberikan laporan aktivitas penjualan secara berkala.

  5. Memantau tren pasar dan aktivitas kompetitor untuk memberikan masukan strategis kepada perusahaan.

  6. Menjaga hubungan baik dengan klien lama (existing accounts) untuk memastikan adanya pembelian berulang (repeat order)


Requirements :

  1. Pendidikan minimal S1 (Semua jurusan, namun untuk jurusan lebih diutamakan)

  2. Pengalaman minimal 1-3 tahun di bidang Sales B2B atau Corporate Sales.

  3. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, presentasi, dan negosiasi yang sangat baik.

  4. Berorientasi pada target (target-driven) dan memiliki motivasi kerja yang tinggi.

  5. Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim.

  6. Memiliki jaringan (networking) yang luas di industri lubricant dan pneumatic hidrolik adalah nilai tambah.

  7. Fasih berbahasa Inggris (lisan & tulisan) akan menjadi poin plus.

  8. Memiliki kendaraan pribadi dan SIM yang aktif. (SIM A)

  9. Siap ditempatkan di area Bekasi.
title: Sales Engineer B2B

description: Responsibilities :Partner with stakeholders to analyze current business processes and recommend SAP best-practice improvements.Translate complex business requirements into detailed functional specifications for the ABAP development team.Perform hands-on functional configuration in your primary modul...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities :

  • Partner with stakeholders to analyze current business processes and recommend SAP best-practice improvements.

  • Translate complex business requirements into detailed functional specifications for the ABAP development team.

  • Perform hands-on functional configuration in your primary module(s) and manage integration points with other SAP modules.

  • Lead or participate in SAP rollouts, upgrades, and the implementation of new functionalities.

  • Provide support for end-users by resolving tickets related to master data, transactional errors, and system bugs.

  • Create and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and conduct training sessions to ensure high system adoption.

Requirements :

  • University degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or Business Administration

  • Minimum 3 years of hands-on SAP functional experience.

  • Proficiency in at least one (preferably two) SAP modules: Sales & Distribution, Materials Management, Production Planning, or Finance & Controlling.

  • Experience with S/4HANA migration is highly preferred.

  • Strong understanding of the FMCG industry and supply chain dynamics.

  • Ability to troubleshoot complex data discrepancies.
title: SAP Functional Supervisor

description: About usWith a strong track record of supporting customer success for over 75 years, Oil States Industries is a technology-focused and major global provider of integrated energy systems & solutions to oil and natural gas markets. At Oil States Industries, we cultivate a culture that recognizes our e...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About us

With a strong track record of supporting customer success for over 75 years, Oil States Industries is a technology-focused and major global provider of integrated energy systems & solutions to oil and natural gas markets. At Oil States Industries, we cultivate a culture that recognizes our employees are our greatest asset. Together, we focus on innovation, teamwork, and our commitments to our customers. Our People embrace mutual respect, ethical behavior, and work-life balance in our relentless pursuit for growth, diversity as well as high standards in safety, quality, and performance. We now have an exciting career opportunity for an aspiring individual to make an impact, develop your capabilities and unleash your potential with Oil State Industries as a QC Engineer. This position will be based in Batam, Indonesia.

Job Description:

  • Report to QC Superintendent/ QHSE Manager on quality matters on day-to-day basis.

  • Supervise and direct QC Inspectors and NDE Technicians.

  • Satisfy the NDT Level III requirements, and provide required training and evaluations, and maintain visual test records.

  • Conduct project briefing and monitoring with Inspectors on shop-floor.

  • Coordinate nonconformities identification, initialization and finalization of nonconformities reports and involve in root cause analysis, corrective actions and improvement action.

  • Create and updates quality plans, Inspection Test Plans, and Notification of Inspections on timely manner.

  • Ensure the QC Inspectors are preparing and issuing QC reports in a timely manner.

  • Review the QC reports and Data Book for accuracy of information on daily basis in Master Control.

  • Liaise with vendors for inspection activity & perform regular surveillances including NCR, NDT, Machining.

  • Liaise with Customers and TPI for the inspection surveillances activities. Respond and attend customer complaints immediately.

  • Respond to critical matters from internal/ external customers and keep the communication effectively.

  • Summarize and report QC activity on weekly basis and report to QHSE Manager. Supervise the validity of inspection results, the effectiveness of Quality systems at all levels.

  • Communicate to QC team about weekend QC resource plan.

  • Maintain QC related documentation in Master control System. Prepare procedures, work instructions and documents related with product/ processes quality control.

  • Participate in internal / external vendor quality audits.

  • Attend the meetings as required by the Company and facilitate meetings to resolve quality issues.

  • Prepare and issue RT Request / Test Request and communicate to vendors in liaison with production.

  • Monitor that the calibration of tools and equipment and records are maintained.

  • Review NDT results and resolve if any discontinuity and defect reported.

Qualification:

  • Minimum Bachelor’s degree in engineering or Equivalent.

  • AWS or CSWIP Welding Inspector Certification is required.

  • ASNT NDT Level II or similar qualifications/certifications is essential.

  • Knowledge in API 6A, API 16A, API 16C, API 1104, API STD 64, NACE MR0175, ASME VIII & IX & ASTM NDT Standards.

  • Overall, 7 years of QC Engineer experience comprising minimum 4 years of work experience in manufacture, repair and remanufacture of drilling equipment and tubular products background with overseeing a team of Inspectors are expected.

  • Experience in Training and Auditing.

  • Working proficiency in English.

  • Applicable for Indonesian
title: QC Engineer

description: We are PT SECM TECH INDONESIA is trusted contractor specializing in Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) and instrumentation works for high-standard projects across Indonesia. With ISO certified in quality, safety, and information security, we deliver reliable solutions for complex infrastruct...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are PT SECM TECH INDONESIA is trusted contractor specializing in Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) and instrumentation works for high-standard projects across Indonesia. With ISO certified in quality, safety, and information security, we deliver reliable solutions for complex infrastructures such as data centres, factories, and commercial buildings. Our team values professionalism, compliance and motivation making us strong partner in building Indonesia’s digital future.

We are seeking for suitable candidates who are highly motivated, hardworking and aggressive individual to fill the following positions:

PROJECT ENGINEER - MEP

Will be responsible for analyzing project needs and implementing appropriate technical solutions and developing designing and developing efficient and standard-compliant MEP systems for construction projects.

QUALIFICATIONS

  • Salary IDR 8,000,000 – IDR 10,000,000

  • Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related field

  • Have analytical skills and excellent problem-solving abilities.

  • In-depth knowledge of Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing systems and materials.

  • Experience in handling Data Centre projects is an added value.

  • Preparing technical drawings, specifications, and other project documents,

  • Supervising and coordinating the execution of MEP work on-site

  • Planning and controlling the implementation of work methods related to technical aspects and the entire drawing process

  • Have knowledge of Contract Documents, Drawings, Negotiation Minutes (Specifications, Bill of Quantity), and compiling Material Lists.

  • Willing to be placed in site project (Karawang)
title: PROJECT ENGINEER - MEP

description: About the roleWe are seeking an experienced Engineering Maintenance Supervisor to join our team at PT Colorobbia Indonesia in Cikarang Selatan, West Java. As a full-time Engineering Maintenance Supervisor, you will be responsible for overseeing the maintenance and repair of our manufacturing equipme...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking an experienced Engineering Maintenance Supervisor to join our team at PT Colorobbia Indonesia in Cikarang Selatan, West Java. As a full-time Engineering Maintenance Supervisor, you will be responsible for overseeing the maintenance and repair of our manufacturing equipment and facilities, ensuring optimal performance and efficiency.

What you'll be doing

  • Develop and implement preventative maintenance schedules to minimise downtime and ensure the smooth operation of all production equipment

  • Coordinate and oversee the work of the maintenance team, including technicians and engineers, to ensure timely and effective completion of repair and maintenance tasks

  • Analyse equipment performance data and identify areas for improvement, implementing corrective actions as necessary

  • Collaborate with production and engineering teams to identify and resolve equipment-related issues and optimise production processes

  • Ensure compliance with all relevant health, safety and environmental regulations

  • Maintain detailed records of maintenance activities, costs and inventory

  • Provide training and development opportunities for the maintenance team to enhance their skills and knowledge

What we're looking for

  • Minimum 5 years of experience in a similar engineering maintenance supervisory role, preferably in the manufacturing industry

  • Strong technical knowledge and understanding of industrial machinery, equipment and maintenance best practices

  • Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking and decision-making skills

  • Proficient in reading and interpreting technical diagrams, schematics and manuals

  • Proven ability to lead and motivate a team, fostering a positive and collaborative work environment

  • Familiarity with computerised maintenance management systems (CMMS) and data analysis tools

  • Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical field

What we offer

  • Competitive salary and bonus structure

  • Comprehensive health and life insurance benefits

  • Ongoing training and development opportunities

  • Opportunities for career advancement within the organisation

  • Supportive and collaborative work environment

About us

PT Colorobbia Indonesia is a leading manufacturer of high-quality ceramic materials and coatings for the construction, automotive, and industrial sectors. With a strong focus on innovation and sustainability, we are committed to providing our customers with cutting-edge solutions that drive their success. Join our team and be a part of our exciting growth journey!

Apply now for this exciting opportunity!
title: Engenering Maintenance Supervisor

Contract Arrangement: Outsourcing Company

  1. Minimum Bachelor’s Degree (D4/S1) in any major.
