title: Utility Planner & Admin

description: About the roleWe are seeking an experienced Engineering Maintenance Supervisor to join our team at PT Colorobbia Indonesia in Cikarang Selatan, West Java. As a full-time Engineering Maintenance Supervisor, you will be responsible for overseeing the maintenance and repair of our manufacturing equipme...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking an experienced Engineering Maintenance Supervisor to join our team at PT Colorobbia Indonesia in Cikarang Selatan, West Java. As a full-time Engineering Maintenance Supervisor, you will be responsible for overseeing the maintenance and repair of our manufacturing equipment and facilities, ensuring optimal performance and efficiency.

What you'll be doing

  • Develop and implement preventative maintenance schedules to minimise downtime and ensure the smooth operation of all production equipment

  • Coordinate and oversee the work of the maintenance team, including technicians and engineers, to ensure timely and effective completion of repair and maintenance tasks

  • Analyse equipment performance data and identify areas for improvement, implementing corrective actions as necessary

  • Collaborate with production and engineering teams to identify and resolve equipment-related issues and optimise production processes

  • Ensure compliance with all relevant health, safety and environmental regulations

  • Maintain detailed records of maintenance activities, costs and inventory

  • Provide training and development opportunities for the maintenance team to enhance their skills and knowledge

What we're looking for

  • Minimum 5 years of experience in a similar engineering maintenance supervisory role, preferably in the manufacturing industry

  • Strong technical knowledge and understanding of industrial machinery, equipment and maintenance best practices

  • Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking and decision-making skills

  • Proficient in reading and interpreting technical diagrams, schematics and manuals

  • Proven ability to lead and motivate a team, fostering a positive and collaborative work environment

  • Familiarity with computerised maintenance management systems (CMMS) and data analysis tools

  • Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical field

What we offer

  • Competitive salary and bonus structure

  • Comprehensive health and life insurance benefits

  • Ongoing training and development opportunities

  • Opportunities for career advancement within the organisation

  • Supportive and collaborative work environment

About us

PT Colorobbia Indonesia is a leading manufacturer of high-quality ceramic materials and coatings for the construction, automotive, and industrial sectors. With a strong focus on innovation and sustainability, we are committed to providing our customers with cutting-edge solutions that drive their success. Join our team and be a part of our exciting growth journey!

Apply now for this exciting opportunity!
title: Engenering Maintenance Supervisor

description: Frontend Engineer (Vue / Admin System)Responsibilities1. Develop and maintain frontend systems based on Vue;2. Build and optimize admin dashboards (content review, data dashboards, taskmanagement, etc.);3. Integrate with backend APIs and implement data display and interaction logic;4. Participate in...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Frontend Engineer (Vue / Admin System)

Responsibilities

1. Develop and maintain frontend systems based on Vue;

2. Build and optimize admin dashboards (content review, data dashboards, task

management, etc.);

3. Integrate with backend APIs and implement data display and interaction logic;

4. Participate in UI structure design and user experience optimization;

5. Continuously improve frontend performance and code quality;


Requirements

1. At least 2 years of frontend development experience;

2. Strong proficiency in JavaScript / HTML / CSS;

3. Proficient in Vue (Vue 3 preferred) with solid component-based development skills;

4. Familiar with UI frameworks such as Element Plus or Ant Design Vue;

5. Experienced in API integration (Axios / Fetch) and frontend-backend separation;

6. Familiar with Git or other version control tools;

7. Good coding standards and development practices;


Core Competencies (Must Have)

1. Experience in building admin/backend management systems (key requirement);

2. Ability to independently implement common features such as lists, filtering, pagination, and state management;

3. Ability to understand business workflows (e.g., review processes, state transitions) and implement corresponding UI logic;

4. Ability to independently integrate with backend APIs and complete feature development;


Preferred Qualifications

1. Experience with data dashboards or charting tools (e.g., ECharts);

2. Experience with permission management systems (roles/menus);

3. Experience in e-commerce or content platforms;

4. Experience in frontend performance optimization;


Keywords

Vue3 / Admin System / API Integration / Data Dashboard / Content Review System
title: Frontend Engineer (Vue / Admin System)

description: Our client is a company in the Banking sector who is looking for a position as an PM Data with the following qualifications and job descritions :Requirement :Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology/System, Data Analytics, Computer Science, or a related fieldHave min 2 years of experience as soft...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Our client is a company in the Banking sector who is looking for a position as an PM Data with the following qualifications and job descritions :

Requirement :

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology/System, Data Analytics, Computer Science, or a related field

  • Have min 2 years of experience as software PM Data

  • Strong knowledge of SQL and databases (Oracle, Postgre, Cloudera, Impala, Hive).

  • Strong understanding of data transformation and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes.

  • Experience with Talend or similar data integration platforms (ODI/Pentaho) and streaming technologies such as Kafka.

  • Excellent communication skills (written and verbal) with the ability to effectively engage both business and technical teams.

  • Experience with agile methodologies and the product development lifecycle.

  • Knowledge of the banking industry is a plus.

Scope of work :

  • Collaborate with business users to understand data and reporting needs (especially in debit and credit card domains) and translate them into clear product requirements.

  • Ensure reporting requirements are aligned with standardized data models, governance practices, and enterprise data definitions.

  • Create comprehensive datamart requirements, including detailed source-to-target mappings, transformation logic, and business rules to ensure accurate and consistent data modeling.

  • Develop and maintain the data integration platform, including ETL tools such as Talend as well as data streaming and Change Data Capture (CDC) technologies such as Kafka.

  • Work closely with engineering teams to communicate and groom development scope, ensure clear understanding of data product requirements, and monitor development progress for timely and accurate delivery.

  • Partner with QA teams to validate data tables, datamart structures, and ETL pipelines, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and alignment with business rules.

  • Monitor daily ETL jobs to ensure timely, reliable, and high-quality data processing.


Benefit :

  • Laptop available

  • THR

  • BPJS Kesehatan

  • BPJS Ketenagakerjaan

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Responsibilities

  • Manage and optimize warehouse operations and system processes using SAP and EMS

  • Ensure accurate and timely inventory transactions (inbound, outbound, transfer, and stock adjustment) in SAP

  • Monitor and maintain data accuracy between physical stock and system records

  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Production, Planning, Procurement) to ensure smooth material flow

  • Analyze warehouse data to identify process gaps, inefficiencies, and improvement opportunities

  • Support implementation and improvement of warehouse management systems (SAP/EMS)

  • Ensure compliance with company procedures, inventory control standards, and audit requirements

  • Assist in troubleshooting system-related issues in SAP and EMS within warehouse operations

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Industrial Engineering, Logistics, Supply Chain, or related field

  • Proven experience in warehouse operations (inventory, material handling, stock control)

  • Hands-on experience with SAP (MM/WM module preferred) and EMS systems

  • Strong understanding of inventory management and warehouse processes

  • Good analytical skills with the ability to interpret operational data

  • Detail-oriented with high accuracy in data handling

  • Good communication and coordination skills

  • Able to work in a fast-paced, operational environment
title: Warehouse System Officer

description: Kinobi AI is a Singapore-based company dedicated to transforming higher education by helping universities go beyond just academics. We focus on holistic student success, leveraging AI-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. We're looking for individuals who sha...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kinobi AI is a Singapore-based company dedicated to transforming higher education by helping universities go beyond just academics. We focus on holistic student success, leveraging AI-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. We're looking for individuals who share our vision and want to make a meaningful impact in the future of education.

Our purpose is to:

  • Empower institutions to guide their beneficiaries toward meaningful employment opportunities through AI-driven solutions.

  • Demonstrate to the world that a global AI-powered B2B SaaS enterprise can be successfully built from Southeast Asia.

About the Role:

As a Full Stack Software Engineer at Kinobi AI, you will play a crucial role in developing our core platform and shaping the future of our AI-driven products. You will be responsible for building scalable, maintainable, and high-quality code, while also contributing to the development of intelligent features that support holistic education and student career readiness.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Work directly with the CTO on occasions to ensure we build an intelligent, AI-powered, customer-loving product for our clients.

  • Support the development and eventually take ownership of the application development roadmap — including AI-integrated feature planning, technical research, prioritization, and action planning.

  • Take ownership of the full development lifecycle and operate closely like a forward-deployed engineer, especially in shaping AI-first features.

  • Push the frontier of Kinobi’s AI capabilities and technological innovation in the era of intelligent education tools.

  • Develop core modules with clean, scalable architecture that supports future AI integrations and performance.

  • Drive the launch and development of new AI-enhanced platform features (details to be shared upon joining).

  • Write clean, testable, and maintainable code that adheres to Kinobi AI’s standards and best practices.

  • Design meaningful analytics and data pipelines, including AI-driven dashboards to monitor internal metrics and track strategic performance across products, regions, and teams.

  • Research and develop user-friendly UI for both mobile and web platforms, including potential AI-guided UX elements.

Qualifications:

  • At least 3 years of experience as a Full Stack Software Engineer, ideally in fast-paced environments with exposure to AI/ML applications or data-driven systems.

  • Proficiency in Node.js, Express.js, and UI frameworks like Vue.js, React.js, or similar — with 3+ years of hands-on experience building dynamic web apps (bonus if you’ve worked with AI components or LLM APIs).

  • Strong experience with MongoDB or similar databases — especially in designing schemas to support AI models, analytics, and high-volume data queries.

  • Solid understanding of the software development lifecycle — particularly for web applications with AI modules or APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Hugging Face, LangChain, etc.).

  • Comfortable using Git and collaborating on repositories involving ML engineers or data scientists.

  • Ability to manage both technical and AI/ML-enhanced tasks effectively, from ideation to deployment.

  • Enjoy working on technically simple but contextually complex tasks, especially those involving AI user guidance or behavior prediction.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with curiosity to explore how AI can solve real education problems.

  • Excellent oral, written, and interpersonal communication skills — including technical writing and documenting AI models or APIs.

  • Ability to work independently and in a remote, cross-functional team environment.

  • Previous experience in fast-paced VUCA environments (e.g., startups, AI labs, or tech consultancies).

  • Experience working as a freelancer or contractor on AI-driven or highly customized projects, with a strong understanding of user pain points.

  • Fluent in English, both written and spoken.

  • Bonus: Experience working closely with founders or product teams in B2B SaaS companies building global products.

  • Bonus: Strong desire to build a global standard AI company from Southeast Asia.

  • Bonus: Background in software houses or agencies that require continuous product iteration and close client alignment — similar to how Kinobi AI operates.

Why Join Us?

  • Work on a meaningful AI-powered product that’s transforming the future of education and impacting millions of students across Southeast Asia and beyond.

  • Be part of a fast-growing company with founders who deeply care about your professional and personal growth — and who are committed to building with purpose and intelligence.

  • Get ownership and flexibility to shape how the tech + AI team grows and scales — from roadmap to architectural decisions.

Additional Information:

  • All interviews and communication will be conducted in English.

  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
title: Fullstack Software Engineer

description: KesempatanPT Sutandi Jaya Sejahtera, sebuah perusahaan manufaktur dan logistik terkemuka di Surabaya, Jawa Timur, sedang mencari seorang PPIC (Production Planning and Inventory Control) Engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memegang peran penting dal...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kesempatan
PT Sutandi Jaya Sejahtera, sebuah perusahaan manufaktur dan logistik terkemuka di Surabaya, Jawa Timur, sedang mencari seorang PPIC (Production Planning and Inventory Control) Engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memegang peran penting dalam mengoptimalkan proses produksi dan kontrol persediaan demi mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis perusahaan.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Mengembangkan dan mengelola rencana produksi berdasarkan permintaan pelanggan dan kapasitas pabrik.

  • Memantau dan mengontrol level persediaan bahan baku, barang dalam proses, dan barang jadi untuk menjamin kelancaran produksi.

  • Menganalisis data produksi dan persediaan untuk mengidentifikasi peluang perbaikan dan efisiensi.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim produksi, pembelian, dan logistik untuk memastikan aliran material yang lancar.

  • Mengembangkan dan menerapkan sistem dan prosedur PPIC yang efektif.

  • Menyiapkan laporan produksi, persediaan, dan analisis varians secara berkala.

Persyaratan

  • Sarjana Teknik Industri atau bidang terkait.

  • Minimal 3 tahun pengalaman sebagai PPIC Engineer atau peran serupa di industri manufaktur.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Mengembangkan dan mengelola rencana produksi berdasarkan permintaan pelanggan dan kapasitas pabrik.

  • Memantau dan mengontrol level persediaan bahan baku, barang dalam proses, dan barang jadi untuk menjamin kelancaran produksi.

  • Menganalisis data produksi dan persediaan untuk mengidentifikasi peluang perbaikan dan efisiensi.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim produksi, pembelian, dan logistik untuk memastikan aliran material yang lancar.

  • Mengembangkan dan menerapkan sistem dan prosedur PPIC yang efektif.

  • Menyiapkan laporan produksi, persediaan, dan analisis varians secara berkala.

Persyaratan

description: Job SummaryThe BIM Coordinator (MEP) is responsible for developing and coordinating 3D models for Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing, and Fire Protection systems in data center construction projects using Revit. This role ensures accurate modeling, coordination, and alignment with project requirements...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Summary

The BIM Coordinator (MEP) is responsible for developing and coordinating 3D models for Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing, and Fire Protection systems in data center construction projects using Revit. This role ensures accurate modeling, coordination, and alignment with project requirements to support efficient construction delivery.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and manage 3D BIM models for MEP systems (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing, and Fire Protection) using Autodesk Revit

  • Perform clash detection and coordination with other disciplines and resolve design conflicts

  • Produce MEP shop drawings, coordination drawings, and as-built models

  • Ensure all models comply with project standards, specifications, and BIM Execution Plan (BEP)

  • Coordinate with engineers, consultants, and site teams to ensure model accuracy and constructability

  • Update models based on site conditions and design revisions

  • Maintain proper model documentation, version control, and data accuracy

  • Support project teams during installation and coordination phases

  • Participate in BIM coordination meetings and provide technical input


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering or related field

  • Minimum 2–4 years of experience in BIM (MEP), preferably in data center construction projects

  • Strong proficiency in Autodesk Revit (MEP)

  • Experience in modeling Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing, and Fire Protection systems

  • Familiar with clash detection tools (Navisworks or similar)

  • Good understanding of MEP systems and construction workflows

  • Strong coordination and communication skills

  • Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple tasks
title: BIM Coordinator MEP

jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking a talented Drafter 2D/3D Security System, Data Network / Electronic System to join our team at PT. Tera Tekno Infotama'. In this contract position based in Jakarta Raya, you will play a crucial role in the design and development of security systems, data networks, and electronic systems for our clients.

What you'll be doing

  1. Producing detailed 2D and 3D technical drawings and schematics for security, data network, and electronic systems

  2. Collaborating with project teams to ensure design specifications are accurately captured and translated into technical deliverables

  3. Staying up-to-date with the latest industry standards, regulations, and best practices related to security, data networking, and electronic systems

  4. Providing technical support and guidance to installation and maintenance teams

  5. Documenting design decisions and creating comprehensive technical manuals and user guides

  6. Continuously improving design processes and exploring new technologies to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of our solutions

What we're looking for

  1. Degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related technical field

  2. Minimum 2 years of experience as a Drafter for security systems, data networks, or electronic systems

  3. Proficiency in 2D and 3D CAD software, such as AutoCAD or SolidWorks

  4. Strong understanding of security, data networking, and electronic system design principles and best practices

  5. Familiarity with industry-standard regulations and compliance requirements

  6. Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills

  7. Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and adapt to changing project needs

What we offer

At PT. Tera Tekno Infotama', we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits, including:

  1. Comprehensive health insurance coverage

  2. Generous paid time off and holiday allowances

  3. Professional development opportunities and training programs

  4. Opportunities for career advancement and growth

  5. A dynamic and innovative work environment


If you're ready to join a dynamic and forward-thinking team, we encourage you to apply now.

description: Position Overview:This role is responsible for developing, maintaining, and optimizing process control systems that support safe, reliable, and efficient mineral processing operations at the Round Mountain Gold Mine. This position focuses on improving plant stability, throughput, recovery, and equip...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Position Overview:

This role is responsible for developing, maintaining, and optimizing process control systems that support safe, reliable, and efficient mineral processing operations at the Round Mountain Gold Mine. This position focuses on improving plant stability, throughput, recovery, and equipment performance through effective control strategies, automation enhancements, and close collaboration with the operations, metallurgy, and maintenance teams.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Design, implement, and optimize control strategies across all plant circuits (Crushing, Grinding, Leaching) to enhance stability and metallurgical performance.

  • Configure, troubleshoot, and support DCS, PLC, and HMI/SCADA platforms to ensure high system availability and operational reliability.

  • Develop and tune regulatory and advanced control loops to improve process throughput, mineral recovery, and reagent efficiency.

  • Partner with Metallurgy and Operations teams to identify process constraints and implement proactive automation solutions for risk mitigation.

  • Collaborate with the Maintenance Superintendent to support instrumentation reliability, hardware integrity, and control network performance.

  • Provide high-level technical support and conduct Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for complex process upsets or control system failures.

  • Ensure all control systems adhere to safe operating limits, critical safeguards, and site Management of Change (MOC) procedures.

  • Lead automation-related capital projects, including functional specifications, FAT/SAT documentation, and commissioning for continuous improvement.

Qualifications:

  • Minimum Senior High School (SMA/SMK) qualification.

  • 5–8 years of experience in process control or automation within mineral processing, mining, or heavy industrial environments.

  • Familiarity with CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System).

  • Hands-on experience with DCS and/or PLC platforms commonly used in mining operations (e.g., Honeywell, ABB, Emerson, Rockwell).

  • Strong understanding of mineral processing unit operations and their specific control requirements.

  • Expertise in control loop tuning, alarm management, and control system troubleshooting.

  • Experience using process data analysis and visualization tools (e.g., Wonderware, PI System, or equivalent historians).

  • Instrumentation fundamentals, including flow, level, pressure, density, and analytical measurements.

  • Familiarity with Advanced Process Control (APC) concepts is preferre

 Important Notice: Masmindo Dwi Area does not charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process and does not require the use of specific travel agents for transportation or accommodation. Any claims or requests to the contrary should be considered fraudulent.
title: Process Control Engineer

description: Job OverviewThe Delivery Engineer will be responsible for the delivery quality of the project and ensure that the technical solution is aligned with the business objectives. In addition, the technical manager is required to have both technical depth and team management ability and be able to coordin...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Overview


The Delivery Engineer will be responsible for the delivery quality of the project and ensure that the technical solution is aligned with the business objectives. In addition, the technical manager is required to have both technical depth and team management ability and be able to coordinate XFN resources.


Core responsibilities

1) Project Management

Coordinate with product, operation and other departments to control the whole life cycle of the project (demand review, scheduling, development, testing, online).

Monitor project progress, identify risks and drive solutions to ensure high - quality delivery.


2) Project implementation

Configure rules, lead technical problem solving, optimize system performance, stability and maintainability.


3) XFN collaboration

Align strategic goals with the technology leadership (CTO/Technical Director) and clearly communicate the value of technology to non-technical departments.


4) Local support

As the window for local customer technology docking.


Job Requirements

  • Educational background: Bachelor's degree or above in computer science, software engineering or related majors.

Experience requirements:

  • More than 5 years of experience

  • Proficient in mainstream technology stacks (such as Java, Python, Go, JavaScript, etc.), preferably with a solid Java foundation and proficient in the supporting Spring Boot framework; understand the microservice architecture and cloud computing principles; be familiar with Elasticsearch and relational databases (such as MySQL, PostgreSQL); have a basic understanding of the principles of big data technologies (such as Spark, Hadoop).

  • Be familiar with agile development process.

Soft Skills:

  • Excellent communication skills, able to balance the needs of technology, business and team.

  • Strong sense of responsibility and anti-pressure ability, good at solving complex problems.

Bonus points:

Be familiar with cutting - edge fields such as AI and Big data.
title: Delivery Engineer

PT Golden Great Borneo, perusahaan pertambangan terkemuka di Indonesia, mencari seorang Mine Plan Engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Lahat, Sumatera Selatan. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam merencanakan dan mengoptimalkan operasi penambangan kami, berkontribusi secara langsung pada efisiensi dan keberhasilan keseluruhan bisnis kami.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Mengembangkan rencana tambang jangka pendek, menengah, dan panjang yang selaras dengan tujuan produksi perusahaan.

  • Melakukan analisis dan pemodelan geologi, topografi, dan data operasional lainnya untuk membuat rencana penambangan yang optimal.

  • Mengidentifikasi dan mengevaluasi peluang untuk meningkatkan efisiensi operasi dan produktivitas.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim teknis lainnya, seperti geolog, surveyor, dan operator tambang, untuk memastikan pelaksanaan rencana tambang yang efektif.

  • Memantau dan melaporkan kemajuan rencana tambang, mengidentifikasi tantangan, dan mengusulkan solusi yang tepat.

  • Memastikan kepatuhan terhadap peraturan lingkungan, keselamatan, dan peraturan pemerintah yang berlaku.

Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan

  • Gelar sarjana dalam Teknik Pertambangan, Geologi, atau bidang terkait.

  • Minimal 2 tahun pengalaman sebagai Mine Plan Engineer di industri pertambangan.

  • Pemahaman yang mendalam tentang proses perencanaan tambang, termasuk pemodelan, optimasi, dan penjadwalan.

  • Kemampuan untuk menganalisis dan menginterpretasikan data geologi, survei, dan operasional.

  • Pengetahuan tentang perangkat lunak perencanaan tambang seperti Surpac, MineSched, atau perangkat lunak serupa.

  • Kemampuan untuk bekerja dalam tim dan berkolaborasi dengan berbagai pemangku kepentingan.

  • Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, kemampuan analitis, dan pemecahan masalah yang kuat.

Manfaat Utama Perusahaan

  • Paket kompensasi yang kompetitif, termasuk gaji yang menarik dan tunjangan yang komprehensif.

  • Kesempatan untuk pengembangan karier dengan program pelatihan dan pengembangan profesional yang kuat.

  • Budaya perusahaan yang mendukung keseimbangan kehidupan-kerja, dengan fleksibilitas dan opsi kerja jarak jauh.

  • Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif di lingkungan industri pertambangan yang sedang berkembang.

Tentang PT Golden Great Borneo
PT Golden Great Borneo adalah perusahaan pertambangan terdepan di Indonesia yang berfokus pada eksplorasi dan produksi bahan tambang. Kami berkomitmen untuk menjalankan bisnis kami dengan cara yang bertanggung jawab secara lingkungan dan sosial. Dengan didukung oleh tim profesional yang berdedikasi, kami terus berinovasi dan memanfaatkan teknologi mutakhir untuk mencapai standar kinerja tertinggi. Bergabung dengan kami berarti menjadi bagian dari organisasi yang dinamis, ambisius, dan berorientasi pada pertumbuhan.


Tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami? Lamar sekarang untuk peran Mine Plan Engineer yang menantang ini!
title: MINE PLAN ENGINEER

description: Job OverviewThe Delivery Engineer will be responsible for the delivery quality of the project and ensure that the technical solution is aligned with the business objectives. In addition, the technical manager is required to have both technical depth and team management ability and be able to coordin...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Overview


The Delivery Engineer will be responsible for the delivery quality of the project and ensure that the technical solution is aligned with the business objectives. In addition, the technical manager is required to have both technical depth and team management ability and be able to coordinate XFN resources.


Core responsibilities

1) Project Management

Coordinate with product, operation and other departments to control the whole life cycle of the project (demand review, scheduling, development, testing, online).

Monitor project progress, identify risks and drive solutions to ensure high - quality delivery.


2) Project implementation

Configure rules, lead technical problem solving, optimize system performance, stability and maintainability.


3) XFN collaboration

Align strategic goals with the technology leadership (CTO/Technical Director) and clearly communicate the value of technology to non-technical departments.


4) Local support

As the window for local customer technology docking.


Job Requirements

  • Educational background: Bachelor's degree or above in computer science, software engineering or related majors.

Experience requirements:

  • More than 5 years of experience

  • Proficient in mainstream technology stacks (such as Java, Python, Go, JavaScript, etc.), preferably with a solid Java foundation and proficient in the supporting Spring Boot framework; understand the microservice architecture and cloud computing principles; be familiar with Elasticsearch and relational databases (such as MySQL, PostgreSQL); have a basic understanding of the principles of big data technologies (such as Spark, Hadoop).

  • Be familiar with agile development process.

Soft Skills:

  • Excellent communication skills, able to balance the needs of technology, business and team.

  • Strong sense of responsibility and anti-pressure ability, good at solving complex problems.

Bonus points:

Be familiar with cutting - edge fields such as AI and Big data.
title: Delivery Engineer

You will also assist in monitoring stock usage, maintaining production documents, and supporti...
jobDescriptionHtml:
"As part of our Production team, you will support daily administrative activities, including preparing and updating production reports, inputting production data, and coordinating with related departments. You will also assist in monitoring stock usage, maintaining production documents, and supporting inventory reconciliation. In addition, you will help with production planning activities, track production performance, and ensure data accuracy in accordance with company procedures (SOP)."

 

  • Minimum Diploma (D3) degree in Management, Accounting, Industrial Engineering, or related field

  • Minimum 1–3 years of experience as Production Admin / Operational Admin / Warehouse Admin

  • Experience in a manufacturing environment is a plus

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (Pivot Table, VLOOKUP/HLOOKUP), including data processing & reporting

  • Good knowledge of Microsoft Word and PowerPoint

  • Detail-oriented, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment
title: Production Administration

  • Mengelola dan menyimpan file dan dokumen seluruh karyawan perusahaan.

  • Mengelola administrasi HR Operasional seperti dokumen, invoice, dsb.

  • Bertanggung jawab sebagai PIC dalam mengimplementasikan HRIS end- to-end mulai dari proses administrasi, hubungan B2B dengan vendor, implementasi, hingga memberikan bantuan kepada karyawan terkait HRIS.

  • Menganalisa dan melakukan benchmarking skema compensation & benefit agar tetap kompetitif dan selaras dengan strategi perusahaan.

  • Bekerjasama dengan Astra International dalam melakukan salary survey terkait dengan employee benefit.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan cross function terkait pembuatan skema benefit.

  • Memastikan compliance of rewards terhadap undang-undang ketenagakerjaan.

  • Melakukan sosialisasi mengenai kebijakan dan SK yang berkaitan dengan availability data analisa dan review benefit compensation yang berlaku.

  • Mengelola kegiatan employee well being

description: About the roleWe are seeking a talented Sales Data Analyst to join our team at PT. LIPPO KARAWACI TBK'. As a Sales Data Analyst, you will be responsible for analysing and reporting on our sales data using DAX Power BI, with a focus on commission tracking and data reporting. This is a full-time posit...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking a talented Sales Data Analyst to join our team at PT. LIPPO KARAWACI TBK'. As a Sales Data Analyst, you will be responsible for analysing and reporting on our sales data using DAX Power BI, with a focus on commission tracking and data reporting. This is a full-time position based in Tangerang Banten.

What you'll be doing

  • Design and maintain Power BI dashboards for external divisions to gain deeper analysis with interactive and informative dashboards.

  • Developing and maintaining comprehensive sales reporting and analytics to track commission structures and key performance metrics using power BI

  • Analysing sales data to identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement

  • Preparing regular sales reports and presentations for management and key stakeholders

  • Collaborating with the sales team to understand their data needs and provide valuable insights

  • Implementing data quality assurance processes to ensure the integrity of sales data

  • Identifying and implementing process improvements to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of sales data reporting

What we're looking for

  • Bachelor Degree in a quantitative field such as statistics, economics, mathematic, or computer science

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in a sales data analysis or reporting role

  • Proficient in data manipulation, analysis, and visualization using tools like Excel, SQL, and Power BI

  • Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills to uncover insights from data

  • Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey complex data-driven insights

  • Familiarity with sales commission structures and data reporting in the property industry is a plus

What we offer

At PT. LIPPO KARAWACI TBK', we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits, including:

  • Comprehensive healthcare coverage

  • Generous annual leave and sick leave entitlements

  • Opportunities for career advancement and professional development

  • Collaborative and inclusive company culture

description:
Job Description:
We are seeking a Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our business and product domains. In this role, you will leverage data to drive insights, support decision-making, and provide actionable recom...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

We are seeking a Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our business and product domains. In this role, you will leverage data to drive insights, support decision-making, and provide actionable recommendations that will shape the direction of our products and business strategies. Some of the key responsibilities that you will have are:

  • Database: design, test, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Data Engineering) to enable, extract, or enrich data/data pipeline.
  • Reporting: design, build, and disseminate dashboards or other self-served data products to enable stakeholders get quick business performance, conduct data exploration, or derive quick insights.
  • Analysis: design, perform, and disseminate descriptive or diagnostic analyses with valuable findings and actionable insights to better understand the business.
  • Experimentation: design, analyze, and disseminate experiments or causal-impact studies to test multiple hypotheses, variants, or initiatives and infer the best result(s) based on relevant success metrics.
  • Modeling: design, develop, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist) to deploy supervised or unsupervised models as per business needs to optimize business performance.

Job Requirements:

  • Several openings are available across multiple domains and levels
  • Bachelor/Master's degree majoring in Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, Computers/Informatics, Engineering, Economics, or equivalent
  • Good communication, presentation, and storytelling skills to deliver data-inspired findings, also passionate in data, analysis, or insights with high curiosity character.
  • 3+ years of full time data analyst experience (open for prior experience in scientist and engineerr).
  • 3+ years of hands-on experience with SQL, spreadsheet, and R/Python.
  • 3+ years of dashboarding experience with BI or dataviz tools (Tableau, Looker Studio, Domo etc.).
  • Prior experience in conducting statistical experimentation or A/B testing is a plus.
  • Prior experience in developing unsupervised/supervised models is a plus.
  • Prior experience in working on cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure, etc.) is a plus.

Bergabung dengan Sevima untuk merevolusi dunia pendidikan melalui data. Di role ini, kamu akan mengubah data menjadi insight dan strategi yang mendorong peningkatan kualitas pendidikan, efisiensi operasional, dan impact nyata bagi institusi pendidikan di Indonesia.

  6. Kolaborasi dengan tim product, marketing, dan management

  4. Terbiasa dengan BI tools (Metabase/Tableau/Power BI)

  5. Strong analytical & problem-solving

  6. Mampu translate data → insight → strategy

description:
Job Description
We are seeking a high-caliber Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner to the business. Our focus is on growing a sustainable lending business by providing our customers with a responsible and convenient form of credit. In this role, you will partner closely with the pro...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are seeking a high-caliber Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner to the business. Our focus is on growing a sustainable lending business by providing our customers with a responsible and convenient form of credit. In this role, you will partner closely with the product, fraud‑investigation, and engineering teams to detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent activity in various stages of PayLater business, delivering actionable insights to help drive critical business decisions. If you’re a team player with a passion for data and analytics, we’d love to have you on board!

Our techstack: BigQuery, dbt, Python, Github, Tableau, Looker Studio, Google Cloud Build, 

Main Responsibilities

  • Understand PayLater business, customer behaviour and fraud in lending and OTA settings
  • Collaborate closely with PM and fraud investigation teams to monitor fraudulent behaviour, uncover emerging fraud schemes/attacker personas, translate insights into new features, score‑card updates, or prevention rules/models. Present findings clearly through written narratives, documents, dashboards and during stakeholder discussions.
  • Conduct A/B and back‑testing to evaluate new detection concepts
  • Develop dashboards and alerts not just for monitoring, but to produce actionable insights that decision makers can use to steer the business.
  • Develop ETL pipelines within a robust framework that is highly automated and does not require a large team to maintain and monitor

Qualifications

  • 2-5 years of experience in analytics with at least a Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field.
  • Proficiency in SQL and data visualization tools (e.g. Tableau, Looker, Power BI).
  • Strong skills in Python or R for data analysis and modeling
  • Experience with A/B testing and experiment design.
  • Excellent communication skills to convey complex analyses to non-technical stakeholders.
  • Ability to translate business problems into analytical solutions and actionable recommendations.
  • Ability to build classification, anomaly‑detection, and time‑series models
  • Familiarity with common fraud vectors (cashout fraud, identity theft, account takeover, synthetic identity etc). Experience in fintech industries/consumer lending business is preferred. 
  • Proficiency in Bahasa (preferred)
title: Data Analyst - PayLater

jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Bertanggung jawab melakukan analisis kebutuhan bisnis, membuat dokumentasi, dan memastikan solusi sistem berjalan sesuai proses bisnis perusahaan. Berkolaborasi dengan tim IT dan user untuk requirement gathering hingga implementasi.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Melakukan analisis kebutuhan bisnis secara menyeluruh

  • Menyusun dokumentasi requirement yang jelas dan terstruktur

  • Menganalisis serta mengoptimalkan proses bisnis

  • Berkoordinasi dengan stakeholder lintas divisi

  • Melakukan validasi dan klarifikasi kebutuhan sistem

  • Mendukung tim development selama proses pengembangan

  • Melakukan testing & UAT (User Acceptance Test)

  • Monitoring dan evaluasi performa sistem

  • Menyusun laporan dan analisis data

  • Berkontribusi dalam continuous improvement


Kualifikasi

  • Minimal S1 Informatika / Sistem Informasi / Manajemen Informatika.

  • Pengalaman minimal 2–3 tahun sebagai Business Analyst.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisa yang kuat dan detail-oriented

  • Komunikatif dan mampu bekerja sama dengan berbagai stakeholder

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim

  • Menguasai bisnis proses HCMS ( Human Capital Management System) atau berkaitan dengan Aplikasi HR, Finance, dll

  • Siap ditempatkan di wilayah Cibubur, Bekasi

Skill

  • Microsoft Excel / Google Sheets

  • Tools diagram (Visio, Draw.io, atau sejenisnya)

  • Task Management ( Jira / Trello )

  • SQL / BI Tools

  • Kemampuan dokumentasi (BRD, FRD, dll)


Benefit

  • Gaji kompetitif

  • BPJS lengkap

  • Peluang pengembangan karier

  • Lingkungan kerja kolaboratif

title: IT BUSINESS ANALYST

description: Media Tiga Warna is a leading provider of innovative Hospital Information Systems (HIS) and healthcare IT solutions. We empower hospitals and clinics with cutting-edge technology to streamline operations, improve patient care, and enhance decision-making. Join our dynamic team to drive digital trans...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Media Tiga Warna is a leading provider of innovative Hospital Information Systems (HIS) and healthcare IT solutions. We empower hospitals and clinics with cutting-edge technology to streamline operations, improve patient care, and enhance decision-making. Join our dynamic team to drive digital transformation in healthcare!

Your main responsibilities include, but are not limited to:

  • Collaborate with healthcare stakeholders (doctors, administrators, IT teams) to gather and document business needs for HIS modules (EMR, billing, pharmacy, labs, etc.).

  • Translate requirements into functional specifications, workflows, and system configurations.

  • Lead end-to-end HIS deployment—install, configure, test, and train users.

  • Resolve system issues, optimize performance, and ensure compliance with healthcare standards (HL7, HIPAA, etc.).

  • Liaise between clients and technical teams to ensure seamless delivery.

  • Follows established policies and practices for implementation services.

  • Ensures milestones and deliverables for all assigned projects are completed according to plans.

  • Tracks and analyzes the status of projects and provides regular project reports.

  • Builds and maintains strong relationships with customers by understanding their needs, communicating effectively and ensuring that we deliver value.

  • May assist in development of technical project estimates, scope analysis, and technical documentation.

  • Maintain team communication daily (daily/ad-hoc, weekly, monthly)

  • Provide post-go-live support and create training materials.

Education and experience requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Healthcare IT, Computer Science, Business Administration, or related field

  • Minimum 1 recent year Technology Implementor experience related to packaged business applications

  • Familiar with create documentation for project (FSD / TSD / BRD, MOM, etc)

  • Bachelor’s degree in Healthcare IT, Computer Science, Business Administration, or related field

  • Understanding in Hospital business experience preferably


Why Join Us?

  • Impactful work improving patient care through technology.

  • Career growth in a fast-evolving healthtech industry.

description: HIRING - Business Strategy Analyst/ Data AnalystKami mencari Business Strategy Analyst / Data Analyst yang memiliki ketajaman bisnis di industri Fintech/Banking untuk mengelola, menganalisis, dan menyajikan narasi strategis dari ekosistem payment channel (EDC, QRIS, ATM/CRM) dan branchless banking. ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
HIRING - Business Strategy Analyst/ Data Analyst

Kami mencari Business Strategy Analyst / Data Analyst yang memiliki ketajaman bisnis di industri Fintech/Banking untuk mengelola, menganalisis, dan menyajikan narasi strategis dari ekosistem payment channel (EDC, QRIS, ATM/CRM) dan branchless banking. Peran ini bertanggung jawab mengubah data transaksi mentah menjadi insight profitabilitas dan rekomendasi pertumbuhan bisnis.

Key Responsibilities

* Performance Monitoring: Mengelola laporan rutin kinerja EDC, QRIS, ATM dan Produk Perbankan lainnya dengan fokus pada Sales Volume, Transaction Growth, dan CASA.

* Profitability Analysis: Melakukan pemetaan struktur biaya (FBI) secara presisi, dan skema MDR.

* Agent Segmenting & Dynamics: Menganalisis pergerakan status Merchant dan Agen, menggunakan Transition Matrix.

* Technical Mapping: Melakukan pemetaan teknis akseptasi pembayaran, termasuk identifikasi Issuer melalui NNS/BIN dan logika routing NSS (Network Switching System).

* Strategic Narrative: Menyusun laporan eksekutif dan publikasi data profesional yang menjelaskan fenomena bisnis (seperti hubungan EDC vs QRIS atau efisiensi CRM maupun potensi pengembangan produk seperti fitur relasi di BRILINK dan Digital Product).

Technical Qualifications

* Expert in SQL: Mahir menulis complex query, CTE, dan pemrosesan data besar di lingkungan big-data.

* SQL dan Dashboard Tools

* Financial Literacy: Memahami konsep BC Ratio, Fee-Based Income, Interchange Fee, dan Supply Chain Financing.

* Excel Mastery: Mahir dalam pemodelan data tingkat lanjut dan otomatisasi laporan.

Domain Expertise (Preferred)

* Memahami ekosistem perbankan mikro dan ultra mikro (holding UMI, PNM, QRIS).

* Familiar dengan protokol transaksi perbankan (ISO 8583) dan alur transaksi On-Us/Off-Us.

* Memahami ekosistem digital merchant (BRIMerchant) dan Produk Ritel Perbankan (Skema Acquiring).

Soft Skills

* Analytical Thinking: Mampu menemukan "anomali" dalam data dan mencari penyebabnya (root cause Analysis).

* Professional Communication: Mampu menjelaskan data teknis ke dalam bahasa bisnis yang sederhana dan efektif.

  • Memiliki pengalaman memimpin tim atau mengelola project analisis data menjadi nilai tambah.

  • Senin – Jumat: 07.30 – 16.00 WIB

jobDescriptionHtml:
• Menjaga kelengkapan, keakuratan, dan kualitas database karyawan.

  • Melakukan budgeting employee cost dan operational expenses, serta memonitor penggunaannya.

  • Menganalisa dan melakukan benchmarking skema compensation & benefit agar tetap kompetitif dan selaras dengan strategi perusahaan.

  • Bekerjasama dengan Astra International dalam melakukan salary survey terkait dengan employee benefit.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan cross function terkait pembuatan skema benefit.

  • Memastikan compliance of rewards terhadap undang-undang ketenagakerjaan.

  • Melakukan sosialisasi mengenai kebijakan dan SK yang berkaitan dengan availability data analisa dan review benefit compensation yang berlaku.

  • Mengelola kegiatan employee well being

company/name: PT Daya Kobelco Construction Machinery Indonesia
description: Tugas & Tanggung Jawab Inventory Analyst :Mengelola proses Stock Transfer Order (STO) di sistem SAP mulai dari penerimaan permintaan cabang, pembuatan STO, hingga monitoring pengiriman dan penanganan pembatalan transaksiMelakukan monitoring dan rekonsiliasi stok melalui proses stock taking berkala, ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tugas & Tanggung Jawab Inventory Analyst :

  1. Mengelola proses Stock Transfer Order (STO) di sistem SAP mulai dari penerimaan permintaan cabang, pembuatan STO, hingga monitoring pengiriman dan penanganan pembatalan transaksi

  2. Melakukan monitoring dan rekonsiliasi stok melalui proses stock taking berkala, termasuk analisa selisih antara data sistem dan kondisi fisik di cabang, dan mengelola Event National Stock Take per 6 bulan

  3. Mengelola proses distribusi dan replenishment stok berdasarkan kebutuhan cabang, termasuk permintaan urgent, MRP, dan minimum stock level.

  4. Reduce dead stock melalui perencanaan yg terukur dan sistematis

  5. Melakukan analisa data penjualan dan pergerakan stok untuk menentukan kebutuhan pengadaan dan distribusi spare parts secara optimal

  6. Melakukan alokasi stok terhadap Sales Order outstanding untuk memastikan ketersediaan barang dan mendukung proses penjualan

  7. Mengelola dan memproses data MRP (Material Requirement Planning) termasuk pembuatan Purchase Order serta koordinasi dengan pihak terkait

  8. Menangani proses work order terkait assembly, disassembly, dan perubahan part number di sistem SAP sesuai kebutuhan operasional dan permintaan customerMelakukan analisa harga cost dan penyesuaian part number untuk memastikan kesesuaian antara kebutuhan customer dan ketersediaan part produk.

  9. Berkoordinasi dengan cabang, depo, dan pihak terkait untuk memastikan kelancaran proses distribusi, penyimpanan, dan ketersediaan spare parts

  10. Memastikan seluruh proses inventory berjalan sesuai dengan SOP, akurat, dan terdokumentasi dengan baik di dalam sistem


Kualifikasi / Requirements :

  • Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 jurusan Teknik, Logistik, Supply Chain, Manajemen, atau bidang terkait

  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 2–3 tahun di bidang inventory, warehouse, atau supply chain (wajib memiliki pengalaman di perusahaan alat berat)

  • Wajib menguasai, memahami, dan terbiasa menggunakan system SAP

  • Mampu melakukan forecasting inventory dan replenishment stock

  • Memahami proses inventory management, stock control, dan distribusi barang

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisa data yang baik terkait pergerakan stok dan kebutuhan barang

  • Mampu bekerja secara detail, teliti, dan memiliki akurasi tinggi dalam pengolahan data

  • Memiliki kemampuan kerjasama tim, koordinasi dan komunikasi yang baik dengan tim internal maupun cabang

  • Terbiasa bekerja dengan deadline dan mampu mengelola prioritas pekerjaan

  • Mampu mengoperasikan Microsoft Excel (terutama untuk analisa data) dengan baik

  • Memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik dalam menangani kendala operasional inventory

  • Mampu bekerja secara sistematis, terstruktur, dan sesuai dengan SOP yang berlaku

description: Job Responsibilities Develop and implement databases, data collection systems, data analytics, and other strategies to optimize statistical efficiency and quality.Acquire data from primary or secondary sources and maintain databases/data systems.Interpret data, analyze results using statistical tech...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Responsibilities 

  1. Develop and implement databases, data collection systems, data analytics, and other strategies to optimize statistical efficiency and quality.

  2. Acquire data from primary or secondary sources and maintain databases/data systems.

  3. Interpret data, analyze results using statistical techniques, and provide ongoing reports as needed by stakeholders.

  4. Identify, analyze, and interpret trends or patterns in complex data sets.

  5. Filter and "clean" data by reviewing computer reports, printouts, and performance indicators to locate and correct system problems.

  6. Work with stakeholders to prioritize academic, financial, and human resource information needs.

  7. Locate and define new process improvement opportunities.

  8. Improve data quality across educational and business systems.

  9. Prepare reports, dashboards, and visualizations in consultation with stakeholders and advise and support as needed.

  10. Identify and recommend new ways to save time and money by streamlining business processes.

Job Requirements

  • Proven experience as a Data Manager/Analyst (preferably in a school environment).

  • Strong knowledge of data modeling, database design, data mining, and segmentation.

  • Familiarity with school management information systems.

  • Proficient in data visualization and reporting.

  • Solid understanding of statistics and analytical tools.

  • Strong analytical skills with close attention to detail and accuracy.

  • Skilled in querying, report writing, and data presentation.

  • Ability to collaborate with stakeholders and develop dashboards/reports.

  • Bachelor's degree in Math, Economics, Computer Science, Information Management, or Statistics (plus programming/cloud is a bonus).

  • High integrity, good communication, teamwork, confidentiality, and a positive, flexible attitude.

description: Are you someone who enjoys working in an environment where data integrity, actionable insights, and strategic growth really matter?PT Asuransi Raksa Pratikara is a trusted insurance company that continues to scale its digital systems. As our technology grows, so do the challenges — and that’s where ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Are you someone who enjoys working in an environment where data integrity, actionable insights, and strategic growth really matter?

PT Asuransi Raksa Pratikara is a trusted insurance company that continues to scale its digital systems. As our technology grows, so do the challenges — and that’s where you come in.

We’re looking for a Data Analyst who’s curious, detail-oriented, and comfortable bridging the gap between raw numbers and business strategy. You’ll work hands-on with SQL and visualization tools, monitor key performance metrics, uncover trends, and help strengthen our data-driven decision-making.

This role is perfect for someone who likes digging into complex datasets, solving business problems, building dashboards, and constantly learning new analytical methods. Your work will directly impact operational efficiency, risk assessment, and future business strategies.

If you enjoy hands-on data storytelling, learning fast, and turning information into real business value, you’ll fit right in.


What You’ll Do:

  • Interpret complex datasets to analyze key metrics (e.g., sales trends, customer behavior, or operational costs) and provide actionable recommendations.

  • Design, build, and maintain self-serve dashboards using BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, or Looker) to democratize data access.

  • Write and optimize SQL queries.

  • Analyze historical data patterns to forecast future trends, seasonality, and the impact of business initiatives.

  • Validate data accuracy and consistency, working with engineering teams to resolve discrepancies in pipelines or source systems.

  • Identify manual reporting processes and automate them using SQL, Python, or other tools to improve efficiency.

  • Partner with non-technical stakeholders (Managers, Marketing, Ops) to translate business questions into data requirements..

  • Maintain clear documentation for data definitions, metrics logic, and reporting processes.

  • Communicate technical findings clearly to diverse audiences, ensuring insights lead to measurable business decisions.

What We’re Looking For:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, or a related quantitative field.

  • Minimum 1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or a relevant role.

  • Strong mastery of SQL (joins, window functions, CTEs) is mandatory.

  • Proven experience creating interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, Tableau, or Qlik.

  • Advanced proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets; basic knowledge of Python or R for data manipulation is a strong plus.

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex data to non-technical teams.

  • Specific attention to detail, a proactive problem-solving attitude, and the ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Are you someone who enjoys working in an environment where data integrity, actionable insights, and strategic growth really matter?

PT Asuransi Raksa Pratikara is a trusted insurance company that continues to scale its digital systems. As our technology grows, so do the challenges — and that’s where you come in.

We’re looking for a Data Analyst who’s curious, detail-oriented, and comfortable bridging the gap between raw numbers and business strategy. You’ll work hands-on with SQL and visualization tools, monitor key performance metrics, uncover trends, and help strengthen our data-driven decision-making.

This role is perfect for someone who likes digging into complex datasets, solving business problems, building dashboards, and constantly learning new analytical methods. Your work will directly impact operational efficiency, risk assessment, and future business strategies.

If you enjoy hands-on data storytelling, learning fast, and turning information into real business value, you’ll fit right in.


What You’ll Do:

  • Interpret complex datasets to analyze key metrics (e.g., sales trends, customer behavior, or operational costs) and provide actionable recommendations.

  • Design, build, and maintain self-serve dashboards using BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, or Looker) to democratize data access.

  • Write and optimize SQL queries.

  • Analyze historical data patterns to forecast future trends, seasonality, and the impact of business initiatives.

  • Validate data accuracy and consistency, working with engineering teams to resolve discrepancies in pipelines or source systems.

  • Identify manual reporting processes and automate them using SQL, Python, or other tools to improve efficiency.

  • Partner with non-technical stakeholders (Managers, Marketing, Ops) to translate business questions into data requirements..

  • Maintain clear documentation for data definitions, metrics logic, and reporting processes.

  • Communicate technical findings clearly to diverse audiences, ensuring insights lead to measurable business decisions.

What We’re Looking For:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, or a related quantitative field.

  • Minimum 1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or a relevant role.

  • Strong mastery of SQL (joins, window functions, CTEs) is mandatory.

  • Proven experience creating interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, Tableau, or Qlik.

  • Advanced proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets; basic knowledge of Python or R for data manipulation is a strong plus.

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex data to non-technical teams.

  • Specific attention to detail, a proactive problem-solving attitude, and the ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Introduction

If you enjoy turning numbers into insights that shape commercial decisions, this role puts your analysis at the centre of revenue performance. You’ll work closely with regional and hotel teams, providing data‑driven insights that directly influence pricing, demand and strategy. This is a great opportunity to grow your analytics expertise while supporting real‑world business outcomes across a diverse region.

Your Day to Day

  • Analyse historical and forward‑looking room data to support forecasting and revenue planning.

  • Produce clear reports and insights that guide commercial and pricing decisions.

  • Track booking trends, occupancy patterns and market performance to identify opportunities.

  • Support hotel and regional teams with data for revenue meetings and performance reviews.

  • Partner with commercial and digital teams to ensure data is accurate, timely and actionable.

What We Need From You

  • Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Economics, Mathematics, or a related analytical field.

  • 1–3 years’ experience in data analytics or revenue‑related roles, or strong analytical capability

  • Strong numerical and analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex data.

  • Clear communication and presentation skills, able to explain insights to non‑technical audiences.

  • Ability to manage deadlines, prioritise tasks and work with accuracy under pressure.

  • Assist Operating Unit upon determining Item Code for transaction including adding new Item to Master Item.

  • Authorized Asset Registrations, Asset Inactivations, and Item Code approvals.

  • Conduct internal data audits and prepare detailed compliance reports

description: Ownership for monitoring inventory levels, traceability, and identifying, classifying, and finding the root causes of inventory inaccuracies. Give feedback and possible solutions to manager for eliminating further discrepancies.ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIESResponsible for monitoring all mate...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Ownership for monitoring inventory levels, traceability, and identifying, classifying, and finding the root causes of inventory inaccuracies. Give feedback and possible solutions to manager for eliminating further discrepancies.

ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Responsible for monitoring all material transactions for assigned area(s).

  • Responsible for identifying, resolving, and finding the root cause of discrepancies and other related inventory errors.

  • Recommend changes that will eliminate or greatly reduce future inaccuracies from reoccurring.

  • Be flexible enough to work overtime, assist in material handling functions, and fill in for other Inventory Control personnel as required and as specified by the Inventory Control Manager.

  • Responsible for eliminating any manufacturing downtime associated with assigned area (where applicable).

  • Perform regular component cycle counts as required.

  • Perform inventory transactions and reporting on customer systems when required.

  • Assist in the development and implementation of any materials management systems that will enhance inventory control at Jabil Circuit.

  • Be able to interface with all departmental supervisors, support functions, engineering, program management, and other pertinent functions within the plant operations.

  • Adhere to all safety and health rules and regulations associated with this position and as directed by supervisor.

JOB QUALIFICATIONS
KNOWLEDGE REQUIREMENTS      

  •    Ability to effectively present information and respond to questions from groups of managers, clients, customers, and the general public.

  • Ability to define problems, collect data, establish facts, and draw valid conclusions.

  • Ability to operate a personal computer including using a Windows based operating system and related software.

  • Advanced PC skills, including training and knowledge of Jabil’s software packages.

  • Ability to write simple correspondence. Read and understand visual aid.

  • Ability to apply common sense understanding to carry out simple one- or two-step instructions.

  • Ability to deal with standardized situations with only occasional or no variables.

  • Ability to read and comprehend simple instructions, short correspondence, and memos.

  • Ability to add, subtract, multiply, and divide in all units of measure, using whole numbers, common fractions, and decimals.

  • Ability to compute rate, ratio, and percent and to draw and interpret graphs.

description: Responsibilities:Achieve total sales and MH sell-out targets within the Semi Modern (SM) channel.Monitor sell-out performance at the store level, identify issues, and coordinate with relevant departments to optimize sell-out results.Manage and supervise field forces in assigned areas, including SM s...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Achieve total sales and MH sell-out targets within the Semi Modern (SM) channel.

  • Monitor sell-out performance at the store level, identify issues, and coordinate with relevant departments to optimize sell-out results.

  • Manage and supervise field forces in assigned areas, including SM sales personnel and promoters, and oversee their KPI performance.

  • Support Head Office Store Management in tracking and managing SM assets such as product displays, booths, POSM distribution, and signage.

  • Develop ideas and recommendations for sell-out promotional programs within the SM channel.

  • Execute, monitor, and report on dealer sponsorship and activity programs in the SM channel.

  • Track competitors’ sell-out activities in SM stores and provide insights, key findings, and countermeasures.

  • Coordinate daily with the SM Head and SM Assistant Manager (Sell-In) to ensure alignment between sell-in and sell-out activities.

  • Design and maintain an effective reporting system by period, channel/store, and promoter.

  • Conduct regular store visits and market surveys to gather insights and monitor execution.

  • Organize and conduct branch-level training with support from the Head Office training team.

  • Manage approval processes for exhibition plans.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in related area.

  • 3 years as Sales / Retail Specialist.

  • Excellent sales management & relationship building.

  • Excellent in English both written and speaking professionally.

  • Have good leadership and people management skills.

  • Have good analytical thinking, market and competitor analysis.

  • Meticulous and attention to details.

  • Manager level of reporting ability.

  • Skilled in Microsoft Office and other related apps.

  • Retail Management knowledge.

  • Willing to travel.

  • Vaccinated Covid 19.


Placement: North Jakarta

jobDescriptionHtml:
PT. Falah Inovasi Teknologi is an Indonesian company specializing in VR, AR, and software solutions for professional training, military simulation, interactive education, and smart campus systems — delivering immersive technologies across multiple sectors.

We are currently looking for a skilled and experienced:

🎯 Senior Back End Engineer
📍 Placement: Jakarta Selatan
📝 Contract / Temporary

🔍 Requirements

Education & Experience

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree (S1/S2) in Computer Science, Informatics Engineering, or related fields

  • Minimum 4–5 years of experience in backend development with complex project experience

Technical Skills

  • Strong understanding of Raw SQL, Query Optimization, Indexing Strategies, ACID Properties, and Transaction Isolation Levels

  • Experience handling Race Conditions and Distributed Locks

  • Experience designing RESTful APIs, GraphQL, or gRPC

  • Understanding of Monolith, Modular Monolith, and Microservices architectures

  • Experience using Message Brokers (RabbitMQ, Kafka, Redis Pub/Sub)

  • Familiar with caching strategies using Redis or Memcached

  • Familiar with Docker, Kubernetes, and backend monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana)

  • Understanding authentication and security mechanisms (JWT / OAuth2, Rate Limiting)

  • Familiar with Unit Testing, Integration Testing, Git, and Agile/Scrum

Soft Skills

  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

  • Good communication and collaboration across teams

  • Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies

🧩 Responsibilities

  • Design scalable and maintainable backend architecture and systems

  • Optimize database queries and schema design

  • Implement asynchronous processing and caching strategies

  • Conduct code reviews and mentor junior engineers

  • Participate in Agile development processes

  • Monitor system performance and resolve bottlenecks

  • Improve performance and maintain application reliability

  • Maintain confidentiality of company projects
title: Senior Back End Engineer

description: About CompanyAt Ennovi we harness the power of two megatrends - electrification and AI - to help industries innovate at speed, operate smarter, and achieve sustainable growth. jobDescriptionHtml:
About Company

At Ennovi we harness the power of two megatrends - electrification and AI - to help industries innovate at speed, operate smarter, and achieve sustainable growth. By combining these transformative forces with our global reach and best talent, we empower our customers to lead their markets and drive sustainable progress.

From automotive to aerospace, consumer electronics, data storage, industrial, and medical markets, we help our customers achieve these megatrends by creating smarter, safer, and more sustainable solutions.

We excel in developing high-performance, custom solutions that meet diverse technical needs, solve unique challenges, optimize performance, and adapt to evolving market demands.

Our mission is to get customers to the future faster, from anywhere. Headquartered in Singapore, ENNOVI has a global presence across North America, Europe, SEA and China, where all its activities are socially responsible, with minimal environmental impact. Learn more at www.ennovi.com


Why Join Us

At Ennovi, we envision a future of electrification and innovation and strive to create an inspiring workplace where our employees are integral to shaping that future. We offer a dynamic, collaborative and inclusive culture that encourages continuous learning, professional growth, and a sense of purpose. As a part of the Ennovi team, employees experience the excitement of being at the forefront of cutting-edge technologies and contributing to a sustainable future.

Our commitment to the transformation is epitomized by our five pillars: Speed, Innovation, Best Talent, Global Reach, and Sustainability. This entails navigating exponential market changes through agile structures, fostering innovation across all aspects of our business, strategically expanding our global footprint, championing sustainability initiatives and nurturing a winning team.


Privacy Policy

Ennovi is an equal opportunity employer in conformance with all applicable laws and regulations to individuals who are qualified to perform job requirements. The Company administers its personnel policies, programs, and practices in a non-discriminatory manner in all aspects of the employment relationship, including recruitment, hiring, work assignment, promotion, transfer, termination, wage and salary administration, and selection for training.

By applying to this job posting, you agree with and acknowledge our privacy policy.


Job Summary

We are seeking a Quality Engineer to join our team in the Industrial Business Segment.

This role will be responsible for monitoring and ensuring product quality during the manufacturing outgoing process.


About the Business Segment

Ennovi’s Industrial segment powers automation, robotics, and energy storage systems enabling OEMs to achieve AI-powered manufacturing for Industry 4.0.


Main Responsibilities

  • Running the Outgoing Quality Assurance to ensure the products are meeting customer requirements before delivering to customers.

  • Ensure the OQA buy-off operation is meeting the Production needs to support requirements made by Planning Dept and work together with Production and Logistic dept to achieve common cross function dept KPI target (productivity, quality, delivery, etc).

  • Responsible to all of measuring machines, equipment, and other supporting measuring tools and ensure all are working and maintain properly.

  • Responsible for managing the feedback from internal and external customers and working with related process owners for part quality resolution.

  • Responsible for tracking and driving field returns units with process owners related to customer return and or secondary process quality issues.

  • Responsible for conducting internal regular PIA and SCA (Internal Process and Contamination Audit) follow the audit schedule and follow up closure items.

  • Responsible for Daily support to run operational and support for delivery preparation and ensure reporting to customers meets the requirements.

  • Responsible for providing Weekly and Monthly report submission to management and drive for corrective action of Top 3 defects for quality issues and work with process owner for continuous improvement.

  • Responsible for managing the buy-off final PP parts of Plating and drive for improvement together with process owners.

  • Support for Customer regular visit / audit preparation following the customer window’s information


Qualifications & Skills

  • Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering or Equivalent.

  • At least 3 years of relevant working experience in quality roles with overseeing the big groups and experience in QMS responsibility is added advantage.

  • Knowledge and certification as an Auditor for IATF 16949/ISO 9001/14001 is added advantage.

  • Experience on how to manage Quality System and internal Process Audit.

  • Experience in Plating/Coating industrial company is added advantage.

  • Possess strong analytical and report writing skills.

  • Knowledge of 8D methodology; statistical tools such as cause-and-effect analysis, SPC, MSA/GRR, FMEA & QC tools and six sigma trained will be added advantage.

  • Able to interpret technical drawings and knowledge in GDT is added advantage.

  • Possess good interpersonal and communication skills.

  • Able to interpret technical drawings and knowledge in GDT is added advantage.

  • Possess good interpersonal and communication skills

description: About CompanyAt Ennovi we harness the power of two megatrends - electrification and AI - to help industries innovate at speed, operate smarter, and achieve sustainable growth. By combining these transformative forces with our global reach and best talent, we empower our customers to lead their marke...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About Company

At Ennovi we harness the power of two megatrends - electrification and AI - to help industries innovate at speed, operate smarter, and achieve sustainable growth. By combining these transformative forces with our global reach and best talent, we empower our customers to lead their markets and drive sustainable progress.

From automotive to aerospace, consumer electronics, data storage, industrial, and medical markets, we help our customers achieve these megatrends by creating smarter, safer, and more sustainable solutions.

We excel in developing high-performance, custom solutions that meet diverse technical needs, solve unique challenges, optimize performance, and adapt to evolving market demands.

Our mission is to get customers to the future faster, from anywhere. Headquartered in Singapore, ENNOVI has a global presence across North America, Europe, SEA and China, where all its activities are socially responsible, with minimal environmental impact. Learn more at www.ennovi.com


Why Join Us

At Ennovi, we envision a future of electrification and innovation and strive to create an inspiring workplace where our employees are integral to shaping that future. We offer a dynamic, collaborative and inclusive culture that encourages continuous learning, professional growth, and a sense of purpose. As a part of the Ennovi team, employees experience the excitement of being at the forefront of cutting-edge technologies and contributing to a sustainable future.

Our commitment to the transformation is epitomized by our five pillars: Speed, Innovation, Best Talent, Global Reach, and Sustainability. This entails navigating exponential market changes through agile structures, fostering innovation across all aspects of our business, strategically expanding our global footprint, championing sustainability initiatives and nurturing a winning team.


Privacy Policy

Ennovi is an equal opportunity employer in conformance with all applicable laws and regulations to individuals who are qualified to perform job requirements. The Company administers its personnel policies, programs, and practices in a non-discriminatory manner in all aspects of the employment relationship, including recruitment, hiring, work assignment, promotion, transfer, termination, wage and salary administration, and selection for training.

By applying to this job posting, you agree with and acknowledge our privacy policy.
