description: About the roleAs a Mechanical Design Engineer at Formulatrix Indonesia, you will play a crucial role in the design, development, and prototyping of innovative automation lab equipment. This is a full-time position based in Central Java, where you will be responsible for designing, prototyping, testi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role
As a Mechanical Design Engineer at Formulatrix Indonesia, you will play a crucial role in the design, development, and prototyping of innovative automation lab equipment. This is a full-time position based in Central Java, where you will be responsible for designing, prototyping, testing, and optimizing mechanical components and systems to meet the objectives.

What you'll be doing

  • Conducting research and analysis to create the concept of new products.

  • Designing and prototyping mechanical components and systems.

  • Evaluating the test and design result, and redesigning until the product is ready to be manufactured.

  • Analyzing design requirements, constraints, and specifications to ensure optimal performance and functionality.

  • Preparing detailed engineering drawings, specifications, and documentation to support manufacturing and assembly.

  • Working and collaborating with other professionals within and outside the engineering sector.

What we're looking for

  • Minimum diploma degree in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering or a related field.

  • Has experience in mechanical design and manufacturing (machining and fabrication).

  • Has experience in mechanism design, automation, or special purpose machines.

  • Have the ability of using CAD/CAM (SolidWorks or Onshape is a plus).

  • Have the ability to participate in DFMEAs and support PFMEAs.

  • Willing to work in Salatiga or Semarang according to the project needs.

  • Good communication skills in English, both oral and written.

Soft skills

  • Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and analytical skills.

  • Effective communication and teamwork skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams.

  • Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

What we offer
At Formulatrix Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. We offer a competitive salary, comprehensive benefits package, and opportunities for professional development and career growth. Our company culture values innovation, collaboration, and work-life balance, making us an attractive employer for talented individuals like yourself.

Apply now!

jobDescriptionHtml:
Are you a creative Graphic Designer Intern with a strong portfolio in video editing, impressive achievements in multimedia, and always up-to-date with the latest design trends, tools, and software?


Gratyo® Practical Business Coaching is a world-class business and management consulting company with over 14 years of experience. We’ve been ranked as the No. 1 Business Coaching Company in the World and nominated as Indonesia Consulting Company of the Year by Frost & Sullivan. Headquartered in Jakarta, we also have branch offices in major cities across Indonesia.

We believe in working with FUN yet serious dedication, allowing us to make a greater impact for our entrepreneur clients.


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Visual Communication Design (DKV), Multimedia, Advertising, or related fields. Fresh graduates with internship experience and final-year students (thesis stage) are welcome to apply.

  • Strong portfolio with excellent visuals, sense of color, typography, or other creative visuals.

  • Proficient in design software and video editing such as Adobe photoshop, Adobe ilustrator, Adobe Premiere, Adobe After Effect & Capcut

  • Up-to-date with current design and content trends. Familiarity with Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools is a plus.

  • Familiar with various digital platforms, including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

  • This role is based at the Gratyo® Headquarters – North Jakarta.


Responsibilities:

  • Build effective brand communication across all company social media platforms.

  • Responsible for video editing content for social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, etc.).

  • Create high-quality and visually engaging content in video editing formats.


Benefits:

  • Daily Allowance.

  • Hard Skill & Soft Skill Training.

  • Gain valuable work experience and learn new things.


This Graphic Designer Intern role is also suitable for those looking for positions such as Multimedia Designer Intern, Content Creator Intern, Visual Communication Designer Intern, Digital Content Intern, Creative Content Intern, Communication Design Intern, Creative Media Intern, Marketing Design Intern.


If you're not just looking for a job but also want to grow together with the company and in life, send your latest CV now, before May, 2 2026!

All CVs will be handled strictly confidentially, and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Job Requirement :

  • Freshgraduate dengan pengalaman magang dipersilakan melamar, terutama dalam bidang tambang/pengalaman menghandle dashcam

  • Mampu melakukan administrasi data, menggunakan Microsoft Excel dan Microsoft Word

  • Pemeliharaan rutin dan preventif terhadap perangkat dashcam dan sistem monitoring

  • Troubleshooting dan perbaikan kerusakan hardware/software dashcam dan sensor lainnya

  • Mengunduh dan menganalisis data rekaman untuk keperluan investigasi insiden

description: Excelitas® is a leading provider of advanced, life-enriching technologies that make a difference, serving global market leaders in the life sciences, advanced industrial, next-generation semiconductor and avionics end markets. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA, USA, Excelitas is an essential partner i...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Excelitas® is a leading provider of advanced, life-enriching technologies that make a difference, serving global market leaders in the life sciences, advanced industrial, next-generation semiconductor and avionics end markets. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA, USA, Excelitas is an essential partner in the design, development and manufacture of advanced technologies, offering leading-edge innovation in sensing, detection, imaging, optics and specialty illumination for customers worldwide.


Excelitas is at the forefront of addressing many of the relevant megatrends impacting the world today, including precision medicine, industrial automation, artificial intelligence, and connected devices (IoT).


Our facility in Batam, Indonesia specializes in the production of lighting and detection product technologies including our Specialty Lamps for industrial and photonics applications, IPL Lamps and Trigger Coils, as well as Infra-Red Detectors (IRD), Sensor Modules and Pyro-electric Ceramic Wafers. Operating since September 1994, this site is also responsible for manufacturing of our Thermopile Sensors (TPS), Thermopile modules (TPM), CCD Sensors and Printed Circuit Board Assemblies.


We are presently seeking a Facilities Engineer who will be responsible for planning, implementing, and improving facility maintenance activities to ensure that buildings and infrastructure are safe, compliant, and fully functional to support business operations effectively.


Key Responsibilities

  • Plan and manage maintenance of building equipment and infrastructure.

  • Design equipment specifications to meet building and operational requirements.

  • Coordinate with suppliers/vendors for maintenance, construction, repairs, and related activities.

  • Supervise construction progress and contractor work, ensuring compliance with safety, environmental standards, timelines, costs, and contractual obligations.

  • Assess utilities and operational setups to optimize efficiency.

  • Develop and implement action plans for continuous improvement and resource efficiency.

  • Prepare facility reports and maintain compliance documentation.

  • Lead and implement building safety and environmental programs and initiatives.

  • Provide training to junior staff on facility operations and compliance requirements.

  • Coordinate and conduct preventive maintenance for facility equipment on a regular basis.

  • Investigate equipment failures, perform repairs, and recommend improvements.

  • Manage Building Management System (BMS) implementation.

  • Monitor and report utilities and energy consumption regularly.

  • Ensure adherence to quality, environmental, health, and safety management systems within the area of responsibility.


Qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or Industrial Engineering (or related field).

  • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in facility engineering or maintenance management.

  • Strong knowledge of HVAC, utilities management, and preventive maintenance practices.

  • Familiarity with Building Management Systems (BMS) and energy efficiency programs.

  • Strong leadership, problem-solving and analytical skills.

  • Good English communication skill (Written and Spoken)

  • Skilled in Project Management and trained QMS and EHSMS related standard will be an added advantage.
title: Facility Engineer

Headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA, USA, Excelitas is an essential partner i...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Excelitas® is a leading provider of advanced, life-enriching technologies that make a difference, serving global market leaders in the life sciences, advanced industrial, next-generation semiconductor and avionics end markets. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA, USA, Excelitas is an essential partner in the design, development and manufacture of advanced technologies, offering leading-edge innovation in sensing, detection, imaging, optics and specialty illumination for customers worldwide.


Excelitas is at the forefront of addressing many of the relevant megatrends impacting the world today, including precision medicine, industrial automation, artificial intelligence, and connected devices (IoT).


Our facility in Batam, Indonesia specializes in the production of lighting and detection product technologies including our Specialty Lamps for industrial and photonics applications, IPL Lamps and Trigger Coils, as well as Infra-Red Detectors (IRD), Sensor Modules and Pyro-electric Ceramic Wafers. Operating since September 1994, this site is also responsible for manufacturing of our Thermopile Sensors (TPS), Thermopile modules (TPM), CCD Sensors and Printed Circuit Board Assemblies.


We are currently seeking an Equipment Project Engineer who will be responsible for ensuring the reliability, availability, and performance of production equipment while also collaborates closely with NPI/R&D teams in equipment design and tester development.


Key Responsibilities

  • Ensure equipment reliability, uptime, and performance through preventive and corrective maintenance programs.

  • Lead root cause analysis and implement effective corrective and preventive actions to minimize equipment downtime.

  • Support equipment design, specification development, and selection of OEM machines or suppliers.

  • Manage vendor and supplier relationships, including evaluation, coordination, and performance monitoring.

  • Collaborate with NPI/R&D teams on in‑house tester design, covering hardware, electronics, software, and user interface requirements.

  • Develop and maintain equipment procedures, documentation, work instructions, and technical reports.

  • Apply data analytics to monitor equipment trends, optimize performance, and drive continuous improvement.

  • Execute structured problem‑solving methodologies to address equipment failures and process deviations.

  • Initiate and support improvement projects aimed at enhancing reliability, throughput, and cost efficiency.

  • Provide technical guidance and training to technicians and junior engineering staff.

  • Support project management activities, including planning, scheduling, and execution of engineering tasks for equipment setup, upgrades, and commissioning.

  • Ensure compliance with quality management, occupational safety, environmental, and health procedures in all equipment‑related activities.


Qualifications

  • Applied Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, Robotics, Software Engineering, or related field.

  • Experiences in similar roles within the electronics manufacturing industry. Fresh graduates with demonstrated technical project achievements are welcome to apply.

  • Knowledge in PLCs, LabView/C#, microcontrollers, or robotic programming is preferred.

  • Strong mechanical and electrical fundamentals with exposure to preventive and corrective maintenance.

  • Skilled in root cause analysis, structured problem‑solving tools, and data‑driven decision‑making.

  • Familiarity with equipment reliability, safety, and compliance requirements.

  • Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and adaptability.

  • Good communication skills and proficiency in English (spoken and written).

  • Experience or knowledge in Project Management and Lean Six Sigma is an added advantage.
title: Equipment Project Engineer

Operating since September 1994, this site is also responsible for manufacturing of our Thermopile Sensors (TPS), Thermopile modules (TPM), CCD Sensors and Printed Circuit Board Assemblies.


We are currently seeking an Equipment Project Engineer who will be responsible for ensuring the reliability, availability, and performance of production equipment while also collaborates closely with NPI/R&D teams in equipment design and tester development.


Key Responsibilities

  • Ensure equipment reliability, uptime, and performance through preventive and corrective maintenance programs.

  • Lead root cause analysis and implement effective corrective and preventive actions to minimize equipment downtime.

  • Support equipment design, specification development, and selection of OEM machines or suppliers.

  • Manage vendor and supplier relationships, including evaluation, coordination, and performance monitoring.

  • Collaborate with NPI/R&D teams on in‑house tester design, covering hardware, electronics, software, and user interface requirements.

  • Develop and maintain equipment procedures, documentation, work instructions, and technical reports.

  • Apply data analytics to monitor equipment trends, optimize performance, and drive continuous improvement.

  • Execute structured problem‑solving methodologies to address equipment failures and process deviations.

  • Initiate and support improvement projects aimed at enhancing reliability, throughput, and cost efficiency.

  • Provide technical guidance and training to technicians and junior engineering staff.

  • Support project management activities, including planning, scheduling, and execution of engineering tasks for equipment setup, upgrades, and commissioning.

  • Ensure compliance with quality management, occupational safety, environmental, and health procedures in all equipment‑related activities.


Qualifications

  • Applied Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, Robotics, Software Engineering, or related field.

  • Experiences in similar roles within the electronics manufacturing industry. Fresh graduates with demonstrated technical project achievements are welcome to apply.

  • Knowledge in PLCs, LabView/C#, microcontrollers, or robotic programming is preferred.

  • Strong mechanical and electrical fundamentals with exposure to preventive and corrective maintenance.

  • Skilled in root cause analysis, structured problem‑solving tools, and data‑driven decision‑making.

  • Familiarity with equipment reliability, safety, and compliance requirements.

  • Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and adaptability.

  • Good communication skills and proficiency in English (spoken and written).

  • Experience or knowledge in Project Management and Lean Six Sigma is an added advantage.
title: Equipment Project Engineer

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

1. Business Needs Assessment (30%)

• Identify AI opportunities across departments (commercials, production, QC, QA, supply chain, and enablers)

• Conduct stakeholder interviews to understand pain points and requirements

• Translate business needs into technical requirements

• Prioritize AI initiatives based on ROI / ROV and feasibility

2. UL UniData Coordination & Alignment (25%)

• Collaborate with UL UniData team on AI strategy and initiatives

• Align local AI solution selection with group-level standards and roadmap

• Participate in UL UniData AI governance forums and knowledge sharing

• Leverage group-negotiated AI tools and enterprise agreements

• Report local AI needs and implementation progress to UniData

3. Solution Sourcing & Evaluation (20%)

• Research and evaluate ready-to-use AI tools/SaaS platforms in the market

• Coordinate with UniData on approved vendor lists and preferred solutions

• Conduct vendor demos and proof-of-concept trials

• Perform cost-benefit analysis and vendor comparison

• Recommend AI solutions aligned with both local needs and group strategy

4. Vendor & Partnership Management (20%)

• Negotiate contracts and licensing with AI vendors (in coordination with UL UniData)

• Manage relationships with 3rd party AI providers

• Ensure vendor compliance with company security and regulatory standards

• Coordinate local implementation support from vendors

5. Implementation & Adoption (5%)

• Work with IT infrastructure team for system integration

• Coordinate user training and change management

• Monitor adoption and gather user feedback

• Report implementation progress to local management and UniData


Job Requirements

  1. Min. Bachelor's Degree of Information Technology or related majors.

  2. Microsoft: Excel, Words, Powerpoint.

  3. Fluent in English; both writing and speaking.

  4. Minimum 2 years of experience in AI, data analytics, or digital transformation roles.

  5. Proven experience conducting business or AI needs assessments and aligning solutions with strategy

  6. Hands-on experience in evaluating and managing vendors (local and/or global)

  7. Demonstrated experience in implementing or deploying AI/data-driven solutions end-to-end

description: PT. NOYA SUKSES SELALU' sedang mencari seorang IT Engineer yang berpengalaman dan berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di area PIK 2, kab. Tangerang. Sebagai IT Engineer, Anda akan memiliki peran strategis dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional sistem dan jaringan teknologi informasi di peru...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT. NOYA SUKSES SELALU' sedang mencari seorang IT Engineer yang berpengalaman dan berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di area PIK 2, kab. Tangerang. Sebagai IT Engineer, Anda akan memiliki peran strategis dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional sistem dan jaringan teknologi informasi di perusahaan kami.

Job Summary:

IT Engineer bertanggung jawab untuk memastikan seluruh sistem teknologi dalam bisnis perusahaan berjalan lancar, stabil, dan mampu mendukung pengalaman pengguna (user experience) yang optimal, termasuk sistem ticketing, event system, platform digital, dll.

Tanggung Jawab Utama:

  • Mengkonfigurasi, memelihara, dan memantau sistem, perangkat, dan jaringan komputer perusahaan untuk menjamin kinerja yang optimal, dan menjamin kelancaran sistem saat high traffic.

  • Mengantisipasi, mendiagnosa, mengidentifikasi, dan menyelesaikan masalah-masalah teknis (seperti downtime saat event, dan masalah lainnya) yang terkait dengan infrastruktur IT.

  • Mengimplementasikan dan memperbarui solusi keamanan untuk melindungi sistem dan data dari ancaman siber.

  • Memberikan dukungan dan pelatihan teknis kepada divisi terkait.

  • Mengembangkan dan menerapkan prosedur, kebijakan, dokumentasi, dan pengembangan teknologi bisnis perusahaan.

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim kreatif, marketing, dan operasional event


Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan:

  • Gelar diploma atau sarjana dalam bidang Teknologi Informasi, Teknik Komputer/Computer Science, atau disiplin ilmu yang terkait.

  • Memahami Artificial Intelligence (Kecerdasan Buatan) dan perkembangannya, dan wajib memiliki AI Certificate (IT Specialist-AI) dari institusi yang kredibel, serta memiliki sertifikasi IT lainnya yang relevan.

  • Berpengalaman sedikitnya 8 tahun sebagai IT Engineer, IT Specialist atau peran teknis IT yang setara, dengan tambahan pengalaman di industri digital/entertainment lebih disukai.

  • Memahami Cybersecurity awareness, Ticketing system dan Payment integration.

  • Menguasai pengelolaan Network dan Server, dan infrastruktur dari Web dan App.

  • Memiliki kemampuan problem-solving yang kuat, dan berpengalaman menangani sistem dengan traffic tinggi (high concurrency).

  • Kemampuan yang mahir dalam konfigurasi, pemeliharaan, dan troubleshooting perangkat keras dan perangkat lunak komputer.

  • Pengetahuan yang mendalam tentang jaringan, keamanan siber, dan manajemen sistem informasi.

  • Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, baik tertulis maupun lisan.


Jika Anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang!
title: IT Engineer

  • Collect and analyse information on business needs, operational gaps, and opportunities across functions in CKB for Transformative Digital Technologies adoption

  • Work with cross-functional teams and process owners at CKB to gather requirements, gather data, validate needs, and develop Project Charter 

  • Develop Transformative Digital Technology solutions (such as but not limited to Predictive/ Prescriptive Analytics, AI, and robotics) together with relevant CKB functions, process owners, and/or external vendors 

  • Support Go-Live implementation, change management, and benefit realization monitoring for Transformative Digital Technology adoption together with Business Technology and Business Process Improvement team

  • Participate in CKB digital literacy initiatives such as trainings, workshops, webinars, and competitions as attendant or facilitator/ organizer, in collaboration with Human Capital team 

 

Qualification:

  • Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or Statistics

  • Minimum 3 years experience in Data Science (predictive/ prescriptive analytics), Artificial Intelligence, or Business Intelligence

  • Proficient in at least 2 data modelling or AI tools

  • Proficient in at least 1 data visualization tool

  • Experience/ knowledge in 6Sigma and/or Project Management methodology is a plus

We are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. Our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Summary:

Datalec Precision Installations (DPI) is a leading provider of data centre design, supply, build, and managed services. We are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. Our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and excellence in every project we undertake.

We are seeking a Project Engineer to join our Team.  This role will oversee the engineering execution and site coordination of structured cabling infrastructure for hyperscale and enterprise data center projects across the APAC region. This role bridges engineering design and field implementation, ensuring quality, schedule, and cost targets are met—while promoting the use of AI-enabled construction platforms to optimize design validation, material tracking, and installation workflows.

 Core Duties & Responsibilities

·       Manage end-to-end project engineering activities including review of IFC drawings, site coordination, and as-built documentation.

·       Provide technical guidance on copper/fiber cabling systems, containment routing, patch panel layouts, and rack configurations.

·       Review shop drawings, cable schedules, and RFIs to ensure alignment with project requirements and industry standards (TIA/EIA, BICSI).

·       Utilize AI-based site capture tools (e.g., OpenSpace, Buildots, Disperse) for real-time installation tracking, deviation detection, and QA verification.

·       Support AI-assisted cable routing validation and digital twin modeling using BIM platforms with structured cabling plugins.

·       Apply AI analytics and dashboards to monitor productivity, forecast risks, and identify performance issues across projects.

·       Coordinate with general contractors, MEP trades, and ICT vendors to align structured cabling scope with overall project timeline and milestones.

·       Support site supervisors in managing cable pulling, termination, testing, and labeling activities in accordance with method statements.

·       Conduct site walks, inspections, and technical meetings to drive issue resolution and maintain construction quality.

·       Material & Progress Management

·       Oversee materials take-off, procurement tracking, and inventory management using digital tools.

·       Ensure timely submission and approval of documentation, including test reports, handover packages, and redlines.

·       Update project trackers and contribute to client reports on engineering and site progress.

·       Represent the business, upholding our core values and behaviours with all internal and external customers, clients and third parties,

·       Maintain business and client confidentiality, adhering to applicable Data Protection regulations and Information Security Standards in line with company, and group policies and procedures.

 Qualifications: Skills and Experience

·       Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Telecommunications, or related field.

·       3–6 years of experience in structured cabling system implementation, preferably in data center or mission-critical environments.

·       Strong understanding of TIA, ISO/IEC cabling standards, and hands-on knowledge of fiber optics, copper systems, and cable testing procedures.

·       Proficient in AutoCAD; familiarity with Revit, BIM 360, and construction analytics platforms is a plus.

·       Experience or interest in AI tools for construction monitoring, routing optimization, or material forecasting.

·       Excellent problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder coordination skills.

·       Willingness to travel regionally within APAC.

Preferred certifications:

·       BICSI RCDD or Technician Certification

·       PMP or equivalent project coordination training

·       Training in AI/digital tools for construction (e.g., OpenSpace, Autodesk AI, Disperse)

Values & Behaviours:

 DPI Values

                                          Dedication                Precision                   Integrity

 Behaviours

 ·      Inspiration - Has a clear vision of where to go and the ability to articulate it. Empowers people to implement our vision and strategy. Great communicator who captures the imagination, generating trust and commitment.

 ·      Team Spirit - Thinks about "we" not "me"; we do this together. Brings purpose to the team to make it a cohesive unit. Knows when to seek help and when to give it. Prepared to take action to address issues for the good of the team and celebrate others' successes.

 ·      Self-Awareness - Emotionally intelligent; has empathy for others and gets the best out of people by meeting them on their terms. Great at building rapport with colleagues and customers; knows that their behavior impacts on the performance of others and adapts approach to achieve the best results.

 ·      Achievement - Always striving to be the best and consistently delivers. High performer: bringing high energy, competence and making the right decisions to get things done.

 ·      Tenacity - Relentless in the pursuit of their goals. Excellent at solving problems and overcoming obstacles; seeing the challenges before others see them and taking action, to avoid them becoming problems. Sees setbacks as opportunities and becomes stronger in adversity.

 ·      Influence - Highly skilled at getting others committed to the goal. Confident, enthusiastic and encourages creativity. Understands the needs of stakeholders and as a result, engages them.

 Our Vision

 ·      To compete at the highest standards in data centre fit-out, MEP construction and managed services throughout Europe and beyond.

 Our Mission

·      Continue to develop and deliver products and services unparalleled in terms of quality.

·      Retain our clients, broaden our breadth of service identifying closely with their changing requirements.

·      Execute a robust H&S and Wellbeing strategy.  Consider and implement wherever possible initiatives that relate to environmental improvements.

 Our Strategy

 ·      People - Build an organisation capable of managing the business we will become.  Recruit and retain and develop the best industry professionals.  Health, Safety and Wellbeing remain paramount, for our employees and clients.

·      Products - must address an industry need. We must have differentiators such as assured quality, modularisation, and off-site construction techniques. Datalec’s commitment to quality is unsurpassed in the industry, we seek perfection.  New products and services must be delivered to the same exacting standards.

·      Purpose - relates both to our clients and our organisation. We need to understand both how to be able to confidently present our solutions and product strategy to the market. Separately, we create a working environment that promotes and rewards employees fairly, actively supporting a culture of transparency and mutual respect.
title: Project Engineer

description: Company Background:Banwibu starts as a software company in JapanDoing Internet of Things, Artificial Intelligence (Computer Vision), and Industrial SystemPrototyping, 3DPrinting, PCB, RFID, Wireless, and other IoT / IT projectsBefore applying:This is recruitment for the first generation engineerMust...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Background:

  1. Banwibu starts as a software company in Japan

  2. Doing Internet of Things, Artificial Intelligence (Computer Vision), and Industrial System

  3. Prototyping, 3DPrinting, PCB, RFID, Wireless, and other IoT / IT projects


Before applying:

  1. This is recruitment for the first generation engineer

  2. Must be able to make decisions and manage projects

  3. Must be able to work alone in site or factory

  4. Willingness to learn and improve is way more appreciated than experience

  5. Probation is a 3 month period and Rp 4,500,000.-/month (minimum 1 month)

  6. Probation ends anytime when Banwibu decides to hire or not

  7. The work’s result always comes first then wages accordingly

  8. Wage includes overtime pay and work environment allowance

  9. Minimum work colleagues in order to maximize skills and rewards

  10. Flexible work (time) hour as long as the result is good and on schedule

  11. Annual bonus is decided by that year performances

  12. Duty trip allowance and other allowances


Do not apply if you:

  1. Dislike challenges, pressure, and learning new things to improve yourself

  2. Are easily distracted and can not focus fully while working

  3. Dislike project based jobs and prefer a monotonous (same and repetitive) job

  4. Dislike or having problems working alone or with a small team

  5. Unwilling to be dispatched on duty trip alone wherever needed

  6. Have low self-esteem and dependent on colleagues

  7. Don’t believe in the technology and only works for money

  8. Are a sensitive person that is easily offended

  9. Do not have active (at least) valid SIM C (motorcycle)


Only apply if you:

  1. Loyal and have a vision and mission that are aligned to the company

  2. Honest with high work ethics while responsible and highly discipline

  3. Able to put the company interest or work above personal needs

  4. Always believe in yourself to adapt, evolve, and exert growth

  5. Willingly self-learn to master the technology to stay ahead

  6. Interested in IoT, AI (CV), industrial, wireless, and IT technology

  7. High leadership skill with good communication skill

  8. Thinks and speak logically with sharp good-quality questions

  9. Can work under pressure while strictly protecting deadlines

  10. Have strong positive mind-set that pushes through hardship

  11. Earn an electronic or IT university degree with excellent marks

  12. Casually uses Linux and other open-source softwares

  13. Good electrical knowledge and able to draw / read electrical drawings

  14. Adept in prototyping with high (de)solder and wiring skills

  15. Skillful in using multimeter, oscilloscope, and function generator

  16. Understand microprocessor and microcontroller system / architecture

  17. Fluent in low level (C/C++) and trending new programming (Python)

  18. Can design and operate 3D printer or create PCB for embedded device

  19. High wire(less)d networking skill and able to setup L(W)AN by yourself

  20. Understand PID control, DCS / PLC, HMI, SCADA, MQTT, Modbus, RS232/485, TCP/UDP, EtherNet, DeviceNet, ProfiNet, CC-Link, bluetooth, WiFi, LoRa(WAN), Zigbee, Thread, ESP-Now, G(L)PS, RFID / NFC, CVision, etc.


Job Description:

  1. Designing, prototyping, and manufacture IoT machines

  2. Maintaining, Upgrading, and Integrating IoT / industrial machines

  3. Install new / replace old IoT, AI (CV), IPC, and industrial systems

  4. Design and develop software for I(T)PC as FA Controller

  5. Design, develop, prototype, and manufacture IoT / robotics machine

  6. Design, develop, and implement AI (CV) / RFID / wireless technology

  7. Support and substitute frontend and backend IT jobs if needed

  8. And other jobs in correlation to above
title: Industrial / IoT / AI (CV) / IT Engineer for Fresh Graduate (flexibel w/hour)

Falah Inovasi Teknologi is an Indonesian company specializing in VR, AR, and software solutions for professional training, military simulation, interactive education, and smart campus systems — delivering immersive technologies across multiple sectors.We are currently looking for a skilled and e...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT. Falah Inovasi Teknologi is an Indonesian company specializing in VR, AR, and software solutions for professional training, military simulation, interactive education, and smart campus systems — delivering immersive technologies across multiple sectors.

We are currently looking for a skilled and experienced:

🎯 Senior Back End Engineer
📍 Placement: Jakarta Selatan
📝 Contract / Temporary

🔍 Requirements

Education & Experience

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree (S1/S2) in Computer Science, Informatics Engineering, or related fields

  • Minimum 4–5 years of experience in backend development with complex project experience

Technical Skills

  • Strong understanding of Raw SQL, Query Optimization, Indexing Strategies, ACID Properties, and Transaction Isolation Levels

  • Experience handling Race Conditions and Distributed Locks

  • Experience designing RESTful APIs, GraphQL, or gRPC

  • Understanding of Monolith, Modular Monolith, and Microservices architectures

  • Experience using Message Brokers (RabbitMQ, Kafka, Redis Pub/Sub)

  • Familiar with caching strategies using Redis or Memcached

  • Familiar with Docker, Kubernetes, and backend monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana)

  • Understanding authentication and security mechanisms (JWT / OAuth2, Rate Limiting)

  • Familiar with Unit Testing, Integration Testing, Git, and Agile/Scrum

Soft Skills

  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

  • Good communication and collaboration across teams

  • Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies

🧩 Responsibilities

  • Design scalable and maintainable backend architecture and systems

  • Optimize database queries and schema design

  • Implement asynchronous processing and caching strategies

  • Conduct code reviews and mentor junior engineers

  • Participate in Agile development processes

  • Monitor system performance and resolve bottlenecks

  • Improve performance and maintain application reliability

  • Maintain confidentiality of company projects
title: Senior Back End Engineer

jobDescriptionHtml:
About Elitech Technology, Inc

Elitech Technology, Inc (Stock Code: 920035) is a state-level "Little Giant" enterprise specializing in the R&D and manufacturing of high-precision instruments and control systems. We are a global leader in temperature measurement and control, industrial leak detection, vacuum technology, and atmospheric monitoring.

Leveraging our advanced digital cloud platforms and AI services, we provide comprehensive energy management, fault diagnosis, and smart maintenance solutions. Our technologies are widely applied in HVACR Tools(Instruments), Food & Pharma Cold Chain, Industrial/Commercial Refrigeration, and Environmental Monitoring sectors. As we accelerate our global expansion, we are looking for a dynamic professional to lead our growth in the Indonesian market.

Job Title: Regional Sales Representative (HVACR Tools or Temperature Controller )

1. Job Responsibilities

• Develop designated Indonesia markets, acquire new clients, and achieve individual & team sales targets.

• Proactively visit potential clients, promote products/services, and facilitate cooperation and signing.

• Maintain existing client relationships through regular visits, handle after-sales needs, and improve customer satisfaction.

• Collect and update client information, record sales logs, and submit sales reports on time.

• Participate in overseas marketing activities and follow up with clients afterwards.

• Feedback market dynamics, competitor info and client needs, and cooperate with company strategy adjustments.

• Comply with company rules and local laws, and maintain the company's brand image.

2. Requirements

• At least 3 years of sales experience in the HVACR Tools industry; or Temperature Controller in Commercial Refrigerator industry; client resources and social connections are preferred.

• Local citizen or permanent resident of the target country, familiar with local language, culture and business environment.

• Fluent in local official language and mainstream business languages; basic English communication skills are must.

• High school or above; majors in marketing, HVAC Tools or Temperature Controller in Commercial Refrigerator industry background are preferred.

• Strong sales motivation, target-oriented, good communication, negotiation and customer development abilities; responsible and trustworthy.

• Proficient in basic office software and mobile office tools; valid driver's license, familiar with local traffic, able to adapt to frequent business trips.

• No bad professional records; able to work independently and cooperate with the team.
title: Regional Sales Manager

jobDescriptionHtml:
TOP MANAGER - BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT (POWER BANK RENTAL STATIONS)


Location: Bali, Indonesia

Industry: Technology / Sharing Economy / Rental Services


───


JOB DESCRIPTION:


We are seeking an experienced Top Manager - Business Development to scale our power bank rental business across Bali. You will lead the expansion of our network of battery charging stations placed in high-traffic locations including hotels, restaurants, retail stores, airports, and beach clubs.


Business Model: Partner businesses receive monthly revenue share percentage from transactions. Our goal: Expand to 20,000+ active stations across Bali in the next 12 months.


───


🎯 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:


• Develop and execute business expansion strategy for power bank station network

• Identify, negotiate, and manage B2B partnerships with hotels, restaurants, retail, airports, beach clubs

• Build strong relationships with key decision-makers and business owners

• Lead and manage team of 3-5 direct reports (sales, operations, field technicians)

• Monitor station performance, inventory, and revenue metrics

• Ensure compliance with local laws, regulations, and tax requirements

• Analyze data to optimize placement and battery rotation efficiency

• Report performance metrics and growth to executive leadership


───


✅ REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS:


Hard Skills:


• 5+ years experience in business development, sales, and partnership management

• Proven B2B sales track record with contract negotiation experience

• Scaling experience - grew business from hundreds to thousands of units/locations

• Proficiency with CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar platforms)

• Data analysis skills - ability to interpret metrics and make data-driven decisions


Soft Skills:


• Strong leadership qualities with ability to inspire and motivate teams

• Excellent communication skills in English (C1/C2 level REQUIRED)

• Highly active, goal-oriented, and results-driven

• Problem-solving abilities with strategic thinking

• Entrepreneurial mindset with passion for growth


Local & Cultural Requirements:


• Minimum 3 years experience working in Indonesia/Bali (required)

• Deep knowledge of Bali market - local businesses, tourism, customer behavior

• Understanding of Balinese culture and mentality - essential for partnerships

• Established local business network and contacts (strong advantage)

• Knowledge of Indonesian local laws and taxation requirements

• Fluency in Bahasa Indonesia - highly preferred

• Fluency in Russian - highly preferred

• Willingness to relocate/live in Bali


───


💰 COMPENSATION & BENEFITS:


Base Salary:


• IDR 22,000,000 - 30,000,000 per month ($1,400 - $1,900 USD)


Performance Bonus:


• IDR 8,000,000 - 15,000,000 per month ($500 - $950 USD)

• Based on quarterly KPI achievement


Allowances:


• Housing: IDR 5,000,000/month ($320)

• Insurance & Visa Processing: IDR 2,000,000/month ($130)


Total Monthly Compensation:


• IDR 37,000,000 - 52,000,000 ($2,350 - $3,300 USD)


Additional Benefits:


• Work visa sponsorship

• Health insurance coverage


Start Date: Immediately (within 30 days)


───


📍 WHAT YOU'LL GET:


• Opportunity to build and scale a 20,000+ station network

• Work in dynamic sharing economy/tech rental market

• Direct reporting to CEO with strategic decision-making authority

• Competitive compensation above market average

• Full visa and relocation support for expats

• Professional growth in Southeast Asian market


───


🚀 HOW TO APPLY:


Submit your application via JobStreet: Click "Apply Now"
title: Top manager business development (Power banks rental station)

• Deep knowledge of Bali market - local businesses, tourism, customer behavior

• Fluency in Bahasa Indonesia - highly preferred

• Based on quarterly KPI achievement


Allowances:

• IDR 37,000,000 - 52,000,000 ($2,350 - $3,300 USD)

• Work visa sponsorship

Start Date: Immediately (within 30 days)

description: Business UnitCloud & Smart Industries Group (CSIG) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry Internet strategy. CSIG explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, AI, and ne...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Business Unit
Cloud & Smart Industries Group (CSIG) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry Internet strategy. CSIG explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, AI, and network security. While driving the digitalization of retail, medical, education, transportation and other industries, CSIG helps companies serve users in smarter ways, building a new ecosystem of intelligent industries that connect users and businesses. What the Role Entails

1. Migration Architecture Design & Hands-on Implementation:

Design architecture migration solutions for public cloud customers. Focus on deep technical implementation for migrating overseas mainstream stacks (BigQuery, Databricks, Snowflake, etc.) to Tencent Cloud WeData + DLC/EMR (storage-compute separation architecture). Deploy migration environments, execute data synchronization, and perform business cutovers on the front line.

2. End-to-End Project Management & Delivery: Take ownership of the overall project schedule, risk control, and technical solution governance. Coordinate internal and external resources to overcome organizational and technical barriers, ensuring the successful final delivery of the migration project.

3. Process Assurance & Technical Support: Act as the primary technical point of contact for troubleshooting and resolving complex issues during migration. Ensure a fast and smooth transition to the cloud by managing data consistency, business continuity, and providing comprehensive technical guidance.

4. Deep Technical Optimization: Provide full-stack technical support, including but not limited to SQL syntax automated conversion/rewriting, Spark/Flink operator tuning, and post-migration performance benchmarking. Ensure that business performance on Tencent Cloud meets or exceeds expectations.

5. Product-Research Collaboration & Best Practices: Work closely with Solution Architects (SA) to professionally summarize and feed back real-world customer requirements, pain points, and tool defects. Assist SAs in refining migration roadmaps and co-authoring "Best Practice Manuals" for migrating from overseas cloud platforms to Tencent Cloud.

Who We Look For

1. Hardcore Technical Background: Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science or related fields; 5+ years of experience in Big Data. Proficient in at least one programming language (Java, Scala, or Python) with strong coding skills and logic conversion capabilities.

2. Overseas Stack Expertise: Familiar with the architecture and use cases of at least one major product: BigQuery, Databricks, or Snowflake. Understand the differences between these and open-source ecosystems (Spark, Hive); cross-cloud migration experience is a plus.

3. System Analysis & Large-scale Management: Strong capability in system problem analysis and resolving complex architectural issues. Proven experience in cluster performance tuning, troubleshooting, source code optimization, and version upgrades; experience managing large-scale clusters (1000+ nodes) is preferred.

4. Migration Delivery Experience: Extensive experience in Big Data migration implementation and management. Master common migration workflows and methodologies for big data components. Familiar with mainstream vendor platforms and a proven track record of delivering large-scale cloud migration projects (PB-level).

5. Core Component Principles: Deep understanding of the Hadoop ecosystem, with source-code level or deep tuning experience in HDFS, Yarn, Spark, Hive, Flink, Doris, Iceberg/Hudi, etc. Capable of handling underlying compatibility issues in heterogeneous environments.

6. Soft Skills & Professionalism: Excellent customer service awareness, communication, and resource coordination skills. Proactive, self-driven, and highly responsible. Able to thrive under pressure in cross-cloud and overseas migration scenarios.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent

As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
title: Tencent Cloud- Big Data Migration Architect (Indonesia)

About the role
As a Business Development, you will play a crucial role as the bridge between raw retail performance metrics and high-level decision-making, ensuring our business are optimized for both the customer experience and long-term profitability.


What you'll be doing

  1. Ability to lead effective conversations, identify gaps, and gather key objectives

  2. Analyze internal sales and foot traffic data to pinpoint strategic growth opportunities and areas for performance optimization

  4. Translate complex data findings into clear strategic recommendations

  5. Collaborate with cross-functional internal teams to plan and implement effective solutions, while maintaining strong relationships with external partners

What we're looking for

  1. Bachelor’s degree from a reputable university

  2. Minimum 2 years of experience in retail business development or a similar strategic role

  3. Proven analytical and problem-solving capabilities with a focus on data-driven decision-making

  4. Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills to manage internal and external stakeholder relationships

  5. A self-driven, innovative mindset with the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively in a fast-paced retail environment

jobDescriptionHtml:
PT IDX Solusi Teknologi Informasi (IDXSTI) was established in November 2018 as a subsidiary of the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) and other Self-Regulatory Organizations (SROs), including KPEI/IDClear and KSEI. IDXSTI focuses on providing Information Technology (IT) services for the Indonesian capital market and other financial industries. Our objective is to deliver the best IT solutions to support the growth and development of Indonesia’s capital market.

At IDXSTI, we are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of innovation in our industry. We are looking for a results-driven and integrated team player to join our Team.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage the entire sales cycle (prospecting-discovery-solution proposing-presentation-negotiating-closing).

  • Able to follow up on customer business requirements post-implementation to identify additional potential opportunities.

  • Negotiate and close agreements with clients.

  • Create Quotation for customers.

  • Create Sales Orders and Profit & Loss Calculation.

  • Work closely with the product and service teams to deliver tailored solutions to customers.

  • Monitor customer satisfaction levels and address any concerns or issues.

  • Proactively engage with customers to ensure their ongoing success and loyalty.

  • Build and maintain strong relationships with Customer and Principles.

  • Conduct and organize routine events in collaboration with the principal, partner and customers.


Requirements:

  1. Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Marketing, Information Technology, or a related field.

  2. Min. 2 years of experience in sales, preferably in IT solutions or B2B environment.

  3. Proven track record in managing end-to-end sales cycle and achieving sales targets.

  4. Strong understanding of sales processes including prospecting, negotiation, and closing.

  5. Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

  6. Strong relationship-building skills with customers, partners, and principals.

  7. Ability to understand customer needs and translate them into business solutions.

  8. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and commercial thinking skills.

  9. Able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

  10. Proactive, self-motivated, and results-driven.

  11. Fluent in English, both written and spoken (mandatory).

  12. Knowledge of capital market industry will be an advantage.

description: The Full Stack Developer & IT Manager is a senior, hands-on role responsible for owning and operating the entire technology function of Pacific High Indonesia. This is a one-person department; you will not manage a team, but you will have full authority over all digital, technical, and IT decisions ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Full Stack Developer & IT Manager is a senior, hands-on role responsible for owning and operating the entire technology function of Pacific High Indonesia. This is a one-person department; you will not manage a team, but you will have full authority over all digital, technical, and IT decisions within the business, with a direct line to the owner.

This is not a management role for someone who delegates. It is a builder's role  for a senior professional who is equally comfortable writing a line of code, restructuring a cloud filing system, shipping a new website, and documenting an IT policy for non-technical staff. All in the same week.

You will be the focal point of ownership for our public-facing digital presence, our internal systems and tools, our data organisation, and the IT practices and standards that govern how the whole company operates. You will set the direction, make the calls, and deliver the outcomes.

If you have thrived in a startup or small business environment, love solving problems independently, and take genuine pride in building things that work cleanly and last; this role was designed for you.
title: Senior Full‑Stack & IT Manager

Performance Marketing Specialist will support end-to-end campaign execution by ensuring accurate lead tracking, CRM data synchronization, also monitors funnel performance and improve overall leads quality and lead-to-sale conversion

  1. Create campaign briefs and coordinate campaign launches with the PH team

  2. Maintain lead trackers while ensuring accurate synchronization with the CRM system and up-to-date lead status tracking by coordinating with relevant teams (e.g., Sales team, agents, etc.)

  4. Continuously monitor and present performance reports

  5. Analyze campaign and funnel performance to provide actionable recommendations for process and conversion improvement

  3. Familiar with lead funnel management, attribution, and campaign performance tracking

  4. Detail-oriented and strong analytical skills

  5. Proficient in Google Sheets, dashboards, and data interpretation

  6. Comfortable working in English, both written and verbal

  7. Able to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment

  8. Experience with CRM systems, chatbot platforms (e.g., Chatfuel), and Meta lead generation workflows is a plus

jobDescriptionHtml:
TIAR AI provides the end-to-end digital infrastructure Charging Point Operators (CPOs) need to succeed—whether powering EVs, eScooters, eBikes, or electric buses. Our white-label, AI-powered platform helps you maximize profits and keep operational costs lean, all under your own brand. Built for global reach, we are ready to scale with you. Discover the future of charging management: www.tiar.ai

PARKING+ is a leading Indonesian EV Charging Operator. We are actively partnering with property managers and strategic landowners. Whether you oversee apartments, shopping malls, offices, campuses, or enterprise fleets, we help you turn your parking spaces into profitable assets. Our platform delivers complete transparency, smart automation, and AI-driven functionalities designed to minimize your operational costs while maximizing profitability. Explore partnership opportunities with us: www.parkingplus.xyz

As we prepare for an upcoming project, we’re expanding our development team. If you’re passionate about technology and the future of mobility, we’d love to meet you!
Location : Kemang, Jakarta

QUALIFICATIONS

  • Experienced Developer at backend and frontend

  • Develop and maintain backend services using GO and JavaScript.

  • Develop Mobile Application using Flutter

  • Design, implement, and optimize RESTful APIs.

  • Experienced with Payment Gateways: Xendit, Midtrans, Paypal, Stripe

  • Architect scalable microservices for our infrastructure.

  • Collaborate with our IT Team

  • Ensure high performance, security, and availability of backend systems.

  • Troubleshoot and debug issues across the full stack.

  • Stay updated with industry trends and best practices in backend development.

  • Maximum 29yrs

  • Graduate from UI, UGM, ITB, ITS, or reputable overseas universities

Role Overview
We are opening experienced developer (graduate from computer science or information system) as a Full Stack Developer to build user-friendly interfaces or scalable systems. The role involves clean coding, API integration, and supporting performance, testing, and team collaboration.


What We Offer

  • Qualified candidate will be given attractive monthly income, daily and meal package

  • THR on Hari Raya

  • Performance bonus upon milestone achievement

jobDescriptionHtml:
TIAR AI provides the end-to-end digital infrastructure Charging Point Operators (CPOs) need to succeed—whether powering EVs, eScooters, eBikes, or electric buses. Our white-label, AI-powered platform helps you maximize profits and keep operational costs lean, all under your own brand. Built for global reach, we are ready to scale with you. Discover the future of charging management: www.tiar.ai

PARKING+ is a leading Indonesian EV Charging Operator. We are actively partnering with property managers and strategic landowners. Whether you oversee apartments, shopping malls, offices, campuses, or enterprise fleets, we help you turn your parking spaces into profitable assets. Our platform delivers complete transparency, smart automation, and AI-driven functionalities designed to minimize your operational costs while maximizing profitability. Explore partnership opportunities with us: www.parkingplus.xyz

As we prepare for an upcoming project, we’re expanding our development team. If you’re passionate about technology and the future of mobility, we’d love to meet you!
Location : Kemang, Jakarta

QUALIFICATIONS

  • Experienced Developer at backend and frontend

  • Develop and maintain backend services using GO and JavaScript.

  • Develop Mobile Application using Flutter

  • Design, implement, and optimize RESTful APIs.

  • Experienced with Payment Gateways: Xendit, Midtrans, Paypal, Stripe

  • Architect scalable microservices for our infrastructure.

  • Collaborate with our IT Team

  • Ensure high performance, security, and availability of backend systems.

  • Troubleshoot and debug issues across the full stack.

  • Stay updated with industry trends and best practices in backend development.

  • Maximum 29yrs

  • Graduate from UI, UGM, ITB, ITS, or reputable overseas universities

Role Overview
We are opening experienced developer (graduate from computer science or information system) as a Full Stack Developer to build user-friendly interfaces or scalable systems. The role involves clean coding, API integration, and supporting performance, testing, and team collaboration.


What We Offer

  • Qualified candidate will be given attractive monthly income, daily and meal package

  • THR on Hari Raya

  • Performance bonus upon milestone achievement

Interested candidates are encouraged to apply before end of April 20th, 2026

  5. Familiar with TMS and WMS systems; knowledge of Power BI or Tableau is a plus.

Typical duties includeReceiving, processing, and unpacking goods, signing for packages, preparing computer kits for distribution, updating inventory records, counting box...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Asset Management Specialist will work in the warehouse/distribution center in IDC and handle computer assets and peripherals. Typical duties include

  • Receiving, processing, and unpacking goods, signing for packages, preparing computer kits for distribution, updating inventory records, counting boxes, and reporting on basic troubleshooting of defective goods.

  • Uses and operates manual and electronic documents, files, and records (shipping accounts, bar-coding, inventory, monthly inventory reporting, electronic delivery logs, incoming shipments, etc.) to properly document activities, and provide material and reliable resources information.

  • Utilizes asset management tools such as bar code scanners to perform inventories.

  • Provides outstanding customer service by maintaining attention to detail, completing assigned work in a timely manner, and maintaining an efficient and effective work environment.

  • Performs other related duties as assigned to ensure the efficient and effective functioning of the Asset Management Team.

  • Maintains a detailed and accurate log of all items shipped, received, or moved within the area of responsibility.

  • Receive goods at the datacenter

Requirements:

  • Good communication skills and strong learning skills.

  • Proficient with Microsoft Excel

  • Education: Associate Degree and above.

description: The OpportunityA foreign businessman is building something ambitious and the leadership needs a sharp, resourceful partner to help make it happen. Not someone who waits for instructions. Someone who sees the bigger picture, digs into the details, and brings solutions to the table before being asked....
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Opportunity

A foreign businessman is building something ambitious and the leadership needs a sharp, resourceful partner to help make it happen. Not someone who waits for instructions. Someone who sees the bigger picture, digs into the details, and brings solutions to the table before being asked.

This role is part strategist, part operator, part researcher. One day you might be mapping competitors for a new venture in Turkey. Next, you could be evaluating Swiss banking options and presenting your top two picks with a clear recommendation. And yes, you will also make sure the calendar is airtight, the travel is seamless, and nothing slips through the cracks.

If you are someone who is equal parts curious and organized, who can go from “big picture” thinking to “small detail” execution without missing a beat; keep reading.

What You’ll Do

Think & Advise

  • Research new markets, competitors, and business opportunities across international geographies then distill your findings into sharp, decision-ready briefs.

  • When leadership says “I need to open a business account in Dubai,” you don’t just Google it. You research the top options, compare them, assess the risks, and present 2 lean choices with a clear “why.”

  • Stay ahead of trends in business, technology, and relevant industries. Leadership wants a partner who can teach them something new, not just follow orders.

  • Evaluate vendors, partners, and service providers with structured frameworks not just gut feeling.

Organize & Execute

  • Own the calendar across multiple time zones, protect leadership’s time, resolve conflicts, and ensure every day is intentionally structured.

  • Manage email and communication flow: filter, prioritize, respond when appropriate, and surface what matters.

  • Prepare briefing materials, agendas, and meeting notes. Attend key meetings to capture action items and ensure follow-through.

  • Coordinate complex international travel with contingency plans for when things inevitably change.

  • Track projects, deadlines, and deliverables using Notion, Trello, Asana, or whatever tool gets the job done.



Support & Anticipate

  • Manage personal logistics appointments, reservations, household coordination, vendor management with the same rigor you bring to business tasks.

  • Handle the unexpected: personal shopping, gift sourcing, family arrangements, last-minute pivots.

  • Anticipate needs before they are articulated. The best person in this role will solve problems that haven’t been noticed yet.

Who You Are

  • You have 5+ years of experience working closely with a founder, CEO, or senior executive ideally across multiple industries or geographies.

  • You are an excellent researcher and communicator. You can take a messy, undefined question and return a clear, structured answer.

  • You write and speak English fluently. Your emails, reports, and presentations are polished and professional.

  • You are genuinely tech-savvy: you live in tools like Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, Notion, Trello, and you pick up new platforms fast including AI-powered tools.

  • You handle confidential information with absolute discretion. Trust is non-negotiable.

  • You have international awareness and are comfortable navigating different cultures, time zones, and regulatory landscapes.

  • You are proactive, not reactive. You do not wait to be told what to do. You think ahead, flag risks, and bring options.

  • You are comfortable with flexible hours. This is a role that matches the pace of an entrepreneur, not a 9-to-5 office.

Tools You Should Be Comfortable With

  • Productivity: Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar, Drive), Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams).

  • Communication: Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp Business, Zoom/Google Meet.

  • Project & Task Management: Notion, Trello, etc, or similar.

  • Research & AI: Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.) to accelerate research and analysis.

  • Travel & Logistics: Familiarity with travel booking platforms, visa processing, and expense management tools.

Why You’ll Love This

You will not be stuck in a cubicle managing someone’s inbox. You will be at the center of an entrepreneur’s world shaping how decisions get made, how new ventures launch, and how a growing international business operates day to day. Every week will look different. If that excites you, we should talk.

description: We are seeking a visionary and commercially astute Chief Technology Officer to join our senior leadership team. In this pivotal role, you will drive the technology strategy that underpins our consulting services, accelerates digital transformation for our clients, and builds scalable internal capabi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are seeking a visionary and commercially astute Chief Technology Officer to join our senior leadership team. In this pivotal role, you will drive the technology strategy that underpins our consulting services, accelerates digital transformation for our clients, and builds scalable internal capabilities that keep us at the forefront of the industry.

As CTO, you will bridge the gap between business strategy and technology execution — both within our firm and in the advisory work we deliver to clients across industries

Key Responsibilities:

Technology Strategy & Vision

▸     Define and own the firm-wide technology roadmap, aligning it with business growth objectives and client service delivery.

▸     Identify emerging technologies (AI/ML, cloud, automation) and assess their impact on consulting service lines.

▸     Champion digital innovation, positioning the firm as a technology-forward advisory partner.

Client Engagement & Delivery

▸     Serve as the senior technology advisor on high-value client engagements, providing strategic guidance on digital transformation, architecture, and tech due diligence.

▸     Lead or oversee technology workstreams within complex, multi-disciplinary consulting projects.

▸     Build trusted relationships with C-suite client stakeholders, translating business challenges into technology solutions.

Internal Technology & Operations

▸     Oversee the firm's internal technology infrastructure, tools, and data platforms.

▸     Drive adoption of AI-powered tools and automation to enhance internal productivity and knowledge management.

▸     Ensure cybersecurity, data governance, and compliance with relevant regulations (ISO 27001, GDPR, etc.).

People & Organizational Leadership

▸     Build, mentor, and lead a high-performing technology team across engineering, architecture, and data functions.

▸     Foster a culture of continuous learning, innovation, and engineering excellence.

▸     Collaborate cross-functionally with practice leads, HR, and operations to embed technology capabilities across the firm.

Commercial & Financial Accountability

▸     Own the technology budget and drive cost-effective vendor and partner management.

▸     Contribute to business development — including proposals, pitches, and thought leadership — to grow the firm's technology advisory revenue.

▸     Support the development of new technology-driven service offerings and go-to-market strategies.


Qualifications & Experience

Required

▸     15+ years of progressive technology leadership experience, with at least 5 years in a CTO, VP Engineering, or equivalent executive role.

▸     Proven experience in a management consulting, professional services, or advisory environment.

▸     Deep expertise in digital transformation, enterprise architecture, and emerging technologies.

▸     Strong track record of engaging C-suite stakeholders and translating strategy into execution.

▸     Demonstrated ability to build and lead cross-functional technology teams in a fast-paced environment.

▸     Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or related field.

Preferred

▸     MBA or advanced degree in a technical or business discipline.

▸     Experience working with private equity, investment banks, or large-scale enterprise clients.

▸     Published thought leadership, speaking engagements, or industry recognitions.

▸     Certifications in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) or enterprise architecture frameworks (TOGAF).


Core Competencies:

Technical

• Cloud & Infrastructure (AWS / Azure / GCP)

• Enterprise Architecture & Systems Design

• AI, ML & Data Engineering

• Cybersecurity & Risk Management

• Agile, DevOps & Product Delivery

Leadership &  Business

• Executive Communication & Stakeholder Influence

• Strategic Thinking & Business Acumen

• Team Building & Talent Development

• Commercial Development & Proposal Writing

• Change Management & Transformation
title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)

description: Strategy and Account ManagementEnsure that account plans are implemented and aligned with client objectives.Be accountable for the profit, loss and growth of the assigned portfolio of accounts.Work with the Account Management Enablement organization to implement the agreed account management practic...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Strategy and Account Management

  • Ensure that account plans are implemented and aligned with client objectives.

  • Be accountable for the profit, loss and growth of the assigned portfolio of accounts.

  • Work with the Account Management Enablement organization to implement the agreed account management practices.

  • Be accountable for operational risk management and mitigation on the DC accounts in the portfolio.

  • Work in tandem with DC Operations Vertical to ensure best engineering practices are implemented on the accounts and risk management support extended to the accounts

  • Client Relationship Management

  • Proactively drive teams to prepare for all client renewals – striving for off market renewals all the time.

  • Unlock opportunities for account growth and work with the account team and/or Sales organization to convert these opportunities.

  • Work with the Sales team on new bids and presentations to achieve the Sales targets. Provide strategic guidance as well as support for bids, presentations and other similar support activities.

  • Leverage external networks to further sales and business development efforts. Talent Management

  • Create a high-performing, integrated team who are committed to delivering exceptional client results.

  • Ensure all accounts have a clear skill management plan particularly for personnel deployed directly in managing and operating critical spaces

  • Critically analyze account managers’ performance (account based staff and “hosted” account staff) and build feedback into actionable development plans.


Account Operations:

  • Ensure Operational risk for all DC accounts in portfolio is effectively managed and mitigation measure reported out

  • Work with the HR Business Partners on talent management programs

  • Work with the Delivery Organization to drive operational excellence, efficiency initiatives, risk management and compliance

  • Work towards best in class delivery keeping in view rapidly changing environment around work, workplace and technology.

  • Maintain visibility over the operational compliances and certifications for all client sites; ensuring that appropriate actions are taken by account teams.

  • Initiate strategies to achieve measurable improvements in energy consumption, in conjunction with the Engineering Manager.

  • Develop and implement innovative programs and processes that reduce short- and long-term operating costs, increase productivity and increase revenue.

  • Work together with site team, support a variety of critical business functions including financial, procurement, vendor management, contract management, transportation programs and general office services. Find innovative ways to streamline and enhance service delivery, while keeping an eye on the bottom line.

  • As a project manager (medium level – data center), planning, organizing, and executing projects within the defined scope, timeline, and budget. Able to identify and managing project risks, resolving any issues or conflicts that may arise, and ensuring effective communication and collaboration among team members and stakeholders.

Market Knowledge:

  • Stay informed about the latest developments, trends, and regulations in the Indonesian data center market.

  • Conduct regular market research to identify potential opportunities, emerging technologies, and best practices.

  • Analyze competitor strategies and market dynamics to inform decision-making and maintain a competitive edge.

Vendor Management:

  • Develop and maintain relationships with local vendors specific to data center operations, such as power suppliers, HVAC contractors, security providers, and maintenance service companies.

  • Negotiate service agreements, pricing, and contracts with vendors to ensure optimal service levels are maintained within budget.

  • Manage vendor performance, conduct regular audits, and resolve any escalations or disputes.

Compliance and Risk Management:

  • Ensure compliance with all applicable regulations, standards, and certifications related to data center operations.

  • Implement and maintain robust operation processes, security protocols, including access control, surveillance systems Emergency Operation procedures, and disaster recovery procedures.

  • Conduct regular risk assessments, develop mitigation plans, and ensure business continuity in the event of emergencies or disruptions.

Stakeholder Communication:

  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders, such as IT teams, engineering teams, and business unit leaders, to align data center operations with organizational goals and strategies.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Strategy and Account Management

  • Ensure that account plans are implemented and aligned with client objectives.

  • Be accountable for the profit, loss and growth of the assigned portfolio of accounts.

  • Work with the Account Management Enablement organization to implement the agreed account management practices.

  • Be accountable for operational risk management and mitigation on the DC accounts in the portfolio.

  • Work in tandem with DC Operations Vertical to ensure best engineering practices are implemented on the accounts and risk management support extended to the accounts

  • Client Relationship Management

  • Proactively drive teams to prepare for all client renewals – striving for off market renewals all the time.

  • Unlock opportunities for account growth and work with the account team and/or Sales organization to convert these opportunities.

  • Work with the Sales team on new bids and presentations to achieve the Sales targets. Provide strategic guidance as well as support for bids, presentations and other similar support activities.

  • Leverage external networks to further sales and business development efforts. Talent Management

  • Create a high-performing, integrated team who are committed to delivering exceptional client results.

  • Ensure all accounts have a clear skill management plan particularly for personnel deployed directly in managing and operating critical spaces

  • Critically analyze account managers’ performance (account based staff and “hosted” account staff) and build feedback into actionable development plans.


Account Operations:

  • Ensure Operational risk for all DC accounts in portfolio is effectively managed and mitigation measure reported out

  • Work with the HR Business Partners on talent management programs

  • Work with the Delivery Organization to drive operational excellence, efficiency initiatives, risk management and compliance

  • Work towards best in class delivery keeping in view rapidly changing environment around work, workplace and technology.

  • Maintain visibility over the operational compliances and certifications for all client sites; ensuring that appropriate actions are taken by account teams.

  • Initiate strategies to achieve measurable improvements in energy consumption, in conjunction with the Engineering Manager.

  • Develop and implement innovative programs and processes that reduce short- and long-term operating costs, increase productivity and increase revenue.

  • Work together with site team, support a variety of critical business functions including financial, procurement, vendor management, contract management, transportation programs and general office services. Find innovative ways to streamline and enhance service delivery, while keeping an eye on the bottom line.

  • As a project manager (medium level – data center), planning, organizing, and executing projects within the defined scope, timeline, and budget. Able to identify and managing project risks, resolving any issues or conflicts that may arise, and ensuring effective communication and collaboration among team members and stakeholders.

Market Knowledge:

  • Stay informed about the latest developments, trends, and regulations in the Indonesian data center market.

  • Conduct regular market research to identify potential opportunities, emerging technologies, and best practices.

  • Analyze competitor strategies and market dynamics to inform decision-making and maintain a competitive edge.

Vendor Management:

  • Develop and maintain relationships with local vendors specific to data center operations, such as power suppliers, HVAC contractors, security providers, and maintenance service companies.

  • Negotiate service agreements, pricing, and contracts with vendors to ensure optimal service levels are maintained within budget.

  • Manage vendor performance, conduct regular audits, and resolve any escalations or disputes.

Compliance and Risk Management:

  • Ensure compliance with all applicable regulations, standards, and certifications related to data center operations.

  • Implement and maintain robust operation processes, security protocols, including access control, surveillance systems Emergency Operation procedures, and disaster recovery procedures.

  • Conduct regular risk assessments, develop mitigation plans, and ensure business continuity in the event of emergencies or disruptions.

Stakeholder Communication:

  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders, such as IT teams, engineering teams, and business unit leaders, to align data center operations with organizational goals and strategies.

  • Communicate effectively with senior management by providing regular updates on data center performance, key metrics, and any significant issues or developments.
title: Data Center Lead (Facilities Management, Jakarta)
