We are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. Our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Summary:

Datalec Precision Installations (DPI) is a leading provider of data centre design, supply, build, and managed services. We are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. Our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and excellence in every project we undertake.

We are seeking a PMO Administrator to join our team.  This role supports the Senior Project Manager and project teams, you will play a crucial role in providing coordination and support to operational teams. Your responsibilities will encompass various aspects, including documentation management, system administration, stakeholder relations, and organisational support.

 Core Duties & Responsibilities

 Collaborate with the management team to fulfil internal reporting requirements, ensuring accuracy and quality of data, within the dedicated deadlines.

  • Assist the Senior Project Lead to maintain and monitor Business as Usual (BAU) project schedules. Track work hours, budgets, and expenditures. Facilitate customer invoicing processes.

  • Support management teams with administration tasks as and when required, including organising training, maintaining project records, timesheet collation. Communicating with project stakeholders to ensure the project needs are met.

  • Assist with purchase order processing and tender activities and bid-operational tenders.

  • Coordinate system file structures and permissions within SharePoint. Provide support on systems such as Salesforce, Eque2, and SharePoint to navigate management system environments.

  • Ensure that health and safety documentation, project records and training are up to date.

  • Record meeting minutes and follow up on action items.

  • Contribute towards identifying and helping drive performance, implementation of savings opportunities, and efficiencies, maximising customer and Company revenue.

  • Assist with office/site duties and any other ad-hoc tasks as required to ensure the smooth running of the project.

  • Represent the business, upholding our core values and behaviours with all internal and external customers, clients and third parties 

  • Maintain business and client confidentiality, adhering to applicable Data Protection regulations and Information Security Standards in line with company, and group policies and procedures. 

 Qualifications: Skills and Experience

 ·         Experience of working on bids, tenders and project delivery.

·         Strong Organisational and time management skills.

·         Analytical abilities and problem-solving aptitude.

·         Excellent communicator and customer focused approach.

·         A high attention to detail with excellent literacy and numeracy skills.

·         Thrive in a busy environment.

·         Ability to remain calm and professional under pressure to meet deadlines.

·         Have excellent skills on CRM (sales force) or similar operating systems, including Microsoft 365 applications such as Excel, Word and Powerpoint.

 Values & Behaviours:

 DPI Values

                                          Dedication                Precision                   Integrity

 Behaviours

 ·      Inspiration - Has a clear vision of where to go and the ability to articulate it. Empowers people to implement our vision and strategy. Great communicator who captures the imagination, generating trust and commitment.

 ·      Team Spirit - Thinks about "we" not "me"; we do this together. Brings purpose to the team to make it a cohesive unit. Knows when to seek help and when to give it. Prepared to take action to address issues for the good of the team and celebrate others' successes.

 ·      Self-Awareness - Emotionally intelligent; has empathy for others and gets the best out of people by meeting them on their terms. Great at building rapport with colleagues and customers; knows that their behavior impacts on the performance of others and adapts approach to achieve the best results.

 ·      Achievement - Always striving to be the best and consistently delivers. High performer: bringing high energy, competence and making the right decisions to get things done.

 ·      Tenacity - Relentless in the pursuit of their goals. Excellent at solving problems and overcoming obstacles; seeing the challenges before others see them and taking action, to avoid them becoming problems. Sees setbacks as opportunities and becomes stronger in adversity.

 ·      Influence - Highly skilled at getting others committed to the goal. Confident, enthusiastic and encourages creativity. Understands the needs of stakeholders and as a result, engages them.

Our Vision

 ·      To compete at the highest standards in data centre fit-out, MEP construction and managed services throughout Europe and beyond.

 Our Mission

·      Continue to develop and deliver products and services unparalleled in terms of quality.

·      Retain our clients, broaden our breadth of service identifying closely with their changing requirements.

·      Execute a robust H&S and Wellbeing strategy.  Consider and implement wherever possible initiatives that relate to environmental improvements.

 Our Strategy

 ·      People - Build an organisation capable of managing the business we will become.  Recruit and retain and develop the best industry professionals.  Health, Safety and Wellbeing remain paramount, for our employees and clients.

·      Products - must address an industry need. We must have differentiators such as assured quality, modularisation, and off-site construction techniques. Datalec’s commitment to quality is unsurpassed in the industry, we seek perfection.  New products and services must be delivered to the same exacting standards.

·      Purpose - relates both to our clients and our organisation. We need to understand both how to be able to confidently present our solutions and product strategy to the market. Separately, we create a working environment that promotes and rewards employees fairly, actively supporting a culture of transparency and mutual respect.
title: PMO Administrator

jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role
We are seeking a talented Junior Project Manager to join our dynamic team at PT Perangkat Lunak Indonesia. As a Junior Project Manager, you will play a crucial role in overseeing the successful delivery of IT projects across our organization. This is a full-time position based in North Jakarta, Jakarta.

What you'll be doing

  1. Assist in the planning, scheduling, and execution of IT projects to ensure they are completed on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards

  2. Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including developers, business analysts, and stakeholders, to coordinate project activities and ensure effective communication

  3. Monitor project progress, identify and mitigate risks, and provide regular status reports to project stakeholders

  4. Assist in the development and implementation of project management processes and best practices

  5. Provide support and guidance to project team members, helping them to overcome challenges and achieve their objectives

  6. Contribute to the continuous improvement of project management practices within the organization

What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 1-2 years of experience in project management / product management, preferably in the software development / consulting industry

  2. Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to juggle multiple tasks and priorities

  3. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams

  4. Experienced in the use of project management tools (Trello, Jira, Microsoft Project) and methodologies (agile, waterfall)

  5. Problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically to identify and resolve project-related issues

  6. A team player with a positive, proactive attitude and a willingness to learn and grow

  7. Experience in software engineering related role is an advantage

What we offer

  1. Competitive salary and benefits package

  2. Supportive and collaborative work environment

  3. Flexible work arrangements and work-life balance initiatives

About us
PT Perangkat Lunak Indonesia is a leading IT solutions provider dedicated to delivering innovative and tailored solutions to our clients. Our mission is to empower businesses with cutting-edge technology and drive digital transformation. With a talented team of IT professionals and a strong track record of success, we are committed to creating a positive impact in the industry.

If you're excited about this opportunity and believe you have the skills and experience to succeed in this role, we encourage you to apply now.

Company Description


About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excel...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description

About Grab and Our Workplace

Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.

Job Description

Get to Know the Team

GrabMart is Grab's on-demand daily essentials and grocery delivery service. We bring products from various stores to our customers' doorsteps. As part of Grab's ecosystem, we focus on speed, convenience, and reliability for millions of customers across Indonesia.

Get to Know the Role

You will lead the end-to-end planning processes for GrabMart Indonesia. You will build statistical forecasting models to predict demand for product categories, manage inventory levels across our dark stores and partner network, and ensure supply availability while minimizing waste and operational costs. This role supports scaling GrabMart in Indonesia.

This role reports to the Head of Supply Chain and will be fully onsite at our South Quarter office in Jakarta.

The Critical Tasks You will Perform

  • You will build and maintain statistical forecasting models for product categories and regions within GrabMart Indonesia, incorporating market intelligence and promotional plans.
  • You will lead the Sales and Operations Planning (S&OP) process, facilitating alignment between Commercial, Marketing, and Operations teams on demand and capacity plans.
  • You will translate demand forecasts into supply plans and purchase orders, working with sourcing teams to account for capacity constraints and lead times.
  • You will set inventory policies including safety stock levels and reorder points to maintain target service levels while minimizing carrying costs and obsolescence.
  • You will monitor inventory health across dark stores and warehouses, identifying stock-out risks and excess inventory situations for resolution.
  • You will analyze forecast accuracy metrics to identify root causes of variance and implement corrective actions to improve planning performance.

Qualifications

What Essential Skills You will Need

  • 5+ years of experience in demand planning, supply planning, or inventory management within e-commerce, retail, or FMCG sectors. You will apply this background to manage GrabMart Indonesia's planning operations and stakeholder relationships.
  • Experience building statistical forecasting models (such as time-series analysis, regression, or causal methods) for product categories. You will use these models to predict demand across geographies and product types.
  • Experience facilitating Sales and Operations Planning (S&OP) processes with commercial and operations stakeholders. You will lead monthly planning cycles to align teams on consensus forecasts.
  • Experience converting demand forecasts into supply plans and purchase orders within planning systems or ERP platforms. You will create feasible plans that respect supplier capacity and lead time constraints.
  • Experience calculating safety stock parameters and reorder points based on demand variability and service level targets. You will set these parameters to balance product availability against inventory carrying costs.
  • Experience monitoring inventory health across multiple fulfillment nodes (such as warehouses or dark stores) to identify stock-out or excess risks. You will track inventory metrics to ensure operational readiness.
  • Experience measuring forecast accuracy using metrics (such as MAPE, RMSE, or bias) and implementing improvement actions. You will use these measurements to refine forecasting processes.
  • Fluency in Bahasa Indonesia and English. You will use Bahasa Indonesia to coordinate with local store operations and suppliers in Indonesia, and English to collaborate with regional supply chain teams and document planning processes.
  • Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain Management, Engineering, Statistics, or a related quantitative field. You will apply supply chain principles and analytical methods to build forecasting models and optimize inventory policies.

Additional Information

Life at Grab

We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:

  • We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
  • With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
  • Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
  • We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
  • Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours

What We Stand For At Grab

We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.
title: Demand & Supply Planning Manager

jobDescriptionHtml:
About Elitech Technology, Inc

Elitech Technology, Inc (Stock Code: 920035) is a state-level "Little Giant" enterprise specializing in the R&D and manufacturing of high-precision instruments and control systems. We are a global leader in temperature measurement and control, industrial leak detection, vacuum technology, and atmospheric monitoring.

Leveraging our advanced digital cloud platforms and AI services, we provide comprehensive energy management, fault diagnosis, and smart maintenance solutions. Our technologies are widely applied in HVACR Tools(Instruments), Food & Pharma Cold Chain, Industrial/Commercial Refrigeration, and Environmental Monitoring sectors. As we accelerate our global expansion, we are looking for a dynamic professional to lead our growth in the Indonesian market.

Job Title: Regional Sales Representative (HVACR Tools or Temperature Controller )

1. Job Responsibilities

• Develop designated Indonesia markets, acquire new clients, and achieve individual & team sales targets.

• Proactively visit potential clients, promote products/services, and facilitate cooperation and signing.

• Maintain existing client relationships through regular visits, handle after-sales needs, and improve customer satisfaction.

• Collect and update client information, record sales logs, and submit sales reports on time.

• Participate in overseas marketing activities and follow up with clients afterwards.

• Feedback market dynamics, competitor info and client needs, and cooperate with company strategy adjustments.

• Comply with company rules and local laws, and maintain the company's brand image.

2. Requirements

• At least 3 years of sales experience in the HVACR Tools industry; or Temperature Controller in Commercial Refrigerator industry; client resources and social connections are preferred.

• Local citizen or permanent resident of the target country, familiar with local language, culture and business environment.

• Fluent in local official language and mainstream business languages; basic English communication skills are must.

• High school or above; majors in marketing, HVAC Tools or Temperature Controller in Commercial Refrigerator industry background are preferred.

• Strong sales motivation, target-oriented, good communication, negotiation and customer development abilities; responsible and trustworthy.

• Proficient in basic office software and mobile office tools; valid driver's license, familiar with local traffic, able to adapt to frequent business trips.

• No bad professional records; able to work independently and cooperate with the team.
title: Regional Sales Manager

  • Fresh graduate or 1-2 years of experience in IT application support or a related area.

  • Good communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to support users and resolve basic IT issues

title: Junior IT Application Staff

description: QualificationEducation minimum Bachelor Degree (S1) in Information Technology/Information System/Accounting/or Equivalent.Experience minimum 2 years in ERP Support or simillar role.ERP knowledge strong understanding of ERP System Concept and Business process (Finance/Purchasing/Inventory/Logistic).R...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Qualification

  • Education minimum Bachelor Degree (S1) in Information Technology/Information System/Accounting/or Equivalent.

  • Experience minimum 2 years in ERP Support or simillar role.

  • ERP knowledge strong understanding of ERP System Concept and Business process (Finance/Purchasing/Inventory/Logistic).

  • Required system experience must have experience working with the Odoo ERP System.

  • Prefered experience in manufacturing environment is a plus.

  • SQL provience working knowledge of SQL for database querying, reporting, and data validation.

Core Responsibilities

User Support

  • handle and resolve troubleshooting request from ERP users.

  • Provide basic training and orientation to new user or those experiencing difficulties.

  • Create and maintain user documentation and system guides.

System Maintenance

  • Monitor ERP system performance and report any detected issues promptly

  • Perform data input, updates and validation within the system as required by operational needs.

  • Assist in data backup and restoration processes (if necessary)

Issue Analysis and Resulation

  • Analyze errors or bugs reported by users and relay them to the relevant parties (developers/vendors)

  • Prepare reports detailings incidents, system issues, and their corresponding solutions.

Internal & Vendor Coordination

  • Coordinate with internal teams or the ERP vendor for system adjustments or new module development

  • Perform comprehensive testing of new system or modules before implementation.

Master Data Management

  • Ensure the consistency and integrity of master data across all ERP modules.

  • Perform updates, export, and import of master data as needed.

Reporting and Documentation

  • Compile regular reports on system issues, system usage, and improvement suggestion.

  • Extract and submit analytical data reports to stakeholders who require them.

  • Create and update both technical and procedural documentation for the ERP system.
title: IT ERP Odoo Specialist

  • System Administration : Manage user accounts, permissions, and access rights for various IT systems and tools.

If you are passionate about providing excellent IT support and are ready to contribute to the success of our organisation, we encourage you to apply now.

In this role, you will be responsible for providing technical support and maintenance for our IT infrastructure and systems.What you'll be doingManage IT assets, procurement, and inventoryInsta...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking an experienced IT Technician to join our team at PT Tjong Chun International. In this role, you will be responsible for providing technical support and maintenance for our IT infrastructure and systems.

What you'll be doing

  • Manage IT assets, procurement, and inventory

  • Install, configure, and maintain hardware & software

  • Provide end-user support (setup, troubleshooting, issue resolution)

  • Maintain network (LAN/WiFi), servers, DHCP & Active Directory

  • Monitor system performance, security, firewall & backups

  • Handle network issues, cabling, and connectivity

  • Support video conference & VoIP systems

  • Maintain server room environment

  • Document IT activities and prepare reports

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or related field

  • Minimum 3-5 years of experience as an IT Technician or in a similar role

  • Strong knowledge of hardware and software systems, network administration, computer networks, and server installation and configuration (including DHCP, Access Points, and Network Security)

  • Proficient in System Administration, including server management and configuration, as well as SaaS management

  • Experience with troubleshooting and resolving of IT issues

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team

  • Adaptability to learn new technologies and continuously improve your skills

  • Able to communicate in English

  • Willing to be placed in Citra Raya Tangerang (Temporary) and Kawasan Modern Industrial Cikande, Serang


About us

PT Tjong Chun International is a specialized textile manufacturing company focused on providing high-performance materials for the footwear industry. The company operates with a commitment to quality, efficiency, and compliance with international standards.

Our core operations include textile manufacturing, dyeing, finishing, and product development. We implement strict quality control procedures to ensure all products meet client specifications and industry regulations.

With a professional management team and a customer-oriented approach, we aim to provide reliable and competitive textile solutions for global markets.

Apply now to join our dynamic team and be a part of our continued success!

  • Experience working with enterprise Java web applications

  • Familiarity with JSP / Servlet-based development

  • Experience with Maven or Gradle build tools

  • Familiarity with WebLogic or other enterprise application servers

  • Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills

description: Job Descriptions·       Provide technical support for hardware, software, and network-related issues.·       Install, configure, and maintain computers, operating systems, and applications.·       Troubleshoot problems related to desktops, laptops, printers, and other IT equipment.·       Monitor an...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Descriptions

·       Provide technical support for hardware, software, and network-related issues.

·       Install, configure, and maintain computers, operating systems, and applications.

·       Troubleshoot problems related to desktops, laptops, printers, and other IT equipment.

·       Monitor and maintain IT systems to ensure optimal performance and reliability.

·       Perform routine maintenance such as system updates, patches, antivirus checks, and data backups.

·       Assist users in resolving technical issues via onsite or remote support.

·       Set up and manage user accounts, email, and access permissions.

·       Support network connectivity including LAN, WAN, Wi-Fi, and VPN.

·       Document technical issues, solutions, and system configurations.

·       Coordinate with vendors or third-party providers for IT-related services and repairs.

·       Ensure IT security standards are implemented and maintained.

·       Provide basic training or guidance to users on IT systems and applications.

Job Requirements

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.

  • Proven experience as an IT Support or similar technical support role is preferred.

  • Strong understanding of computer hardware, software, and operating systems (Windows, Linux, macOS).

  • Basic knowledge of networking concepts such as LAN, WAN, TCP/IP, DNS, and VPN.

  • Experience with installation, configuration, and troubleshooting of IT equipment (PC, laptop, printer, scanner).

  • Ability to perform system maintenance, updates, and data backups.

  • Knowledge of IT security practices (antivirus, firewall, data protection) is a plus.

  • Experience using remote support tools (AnyDesk, TeamViewer, Remote Desktop).

  • Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.

  • Good communication skills to assist non-technical users effectively.

  • Able to work independently as well as part of a team.

  • Willing to learn new technologies and adapt to changing environments.

  • Applicant must be willing to work in Graha Adhi Cakra.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Kami, PT. Nuansa Citra Ramantha adalah perusahaan IT yang berfokus pada layanan IT Consulting dan System Integrator.

Visi kami adalah menjadi yang terbaik dalam memberikan layanan teknologi , yang dapat membantu klien kami dalam meningkatkan efisensi proses sehingga lebih tepat sasaran dan efektif .

Misi kami adalah :

  • Memastikan solusi yang kami berikan dapat digunakan oleh klien kami, secara mudah dan tepat;

  • Memastikan setiap anggota memiliki kesempatan untuk belajar, bertumbuh serta berkontribusi sesuai dengan bidangnya masing-masing;

  • Meningkatkan kesejahteraan seluruh anggota perusahaan.


Saat ini kami mencari anggota tim untuk membantu kami dalam Web Programmer dengan kriteria sebagai berikut:

  • Memiliki kemampuan logika Pemrograman yang baik

  • Memiliki kemampuan menganalisan code

  • Memiliki kemampuan menganalisa bisnis proses

  • Memiliki kemampuan menganalisa database

  • Memiliki kemampuan bahasa (Inggris, Bahasa Indonesia) pada tingkat (dasar/fasih)

  • Memiliki pengalaman dalam (PHP Framework, Codeigniter, Jquery, CSS, HTML, Bootstrap, MSSQL, Typescript, Javascript) pada tingkat (dasar/terampil)

  • Memiliki kemampuan pengaturan dan pembagian waktu serta komunikasi yang baik.

  • Menguasai UI, cross-browser compatibility, general web functions and standards.

  • Baik dalam berkomunikasi dan mudah beradaptasi

  • Mampu memperbaiki dan mengoptimalkan halaman web yang aman dan responsif

  • Menguasai network diagnostic dan analytical tools

description: About UsWe’ve got an incredible brand -- now we’re busy creating the legend behind it.  At hosting.com, we’ve set out to redefine the new standard for what web hosting should be — one that is authentically human, deeply trusted, and built on shared success.Our aim and promise is bold: to become the ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About Us

We’ve got an incredible brand -- now we’re busy creating the legend behind it.  At hosting.com, we’ve set out to redefine the new standard for what web hosting should be — one that is authentically human, deeply trusted, and built on shared success.

Our aim and promise is bold: to become the world’s most trusted hosting company. If you’re eager to contribute your time and talent to something bigger that people will talk about long after your work is done -- hosting.com is your place.  If you want to do that work with and alongside incredible humans who care about each other, our customers and the work we do -- it’s at hosting.com.  If you believe the best success is always shared success, with your teammates, for your customers -- hosting.com is your next work home.

At hosting.com, we’re not just hosting websites. Although we do a great job of that for millions of websites.  We’re helping our customers tell their stories and connect with their people. Creating product experiences that helps them do that. Being there when they need us. And earning trust, day by day, by showing up and giving our best.

All because we care ... about each other’s success.  Our team is 750+ strong and growing, spread across the globe. We can’t do this alone.  Come join the journey. And help us build something better, together.

About the Role

What You'll Do

In this role, you should be a keen problem solver and have a good level of written and spoken English. The role primarily involves helping clients and prospective clients use our hosting service, answering technical queries mainly through support tickets and live chat. 

We use a standard hosting stack comprising cPanel, Linux, Apache, MySQL, and PHP so experience with these technologies is crucial. The majority of the sites we host will run a CMS like WordPress, so experience from a user or management perspective of WordPress is also desirable. 

What You'll Bring

  • Accessing a Linux server with SSH 

  • Minimal D3/S1 

  • 1 year experience 

  • Using common command line tools, like grep, vi/nano, chmod/chown. htaccess files, rewrite rules, IP blocking 

  • Basic PHP scripting and syntax, php.ini configuration variables 

  • MySQL connection strings, basic SQL syntax, and common error messages 

  • Identifying and diagnosing server performance problems (CPU, iowait, swap) 

  • Migrating websites manually between servers 

  • Managing DNS and nameservers. 

Why You’ll Love It Here

  • Be part of a global, purpose-driven team building one of the world’s most trusted hosting companies.

  • Is a fast moving, agile company. We are energetic, and we hustle. You should be able to move at pace and be self-motivated.

Our Values 

Be Pragmatic. Be Trusted. Be Energetic. Be Accountable. Be Respectful.

At Hosting.com, success is always shared — with our people, our customers, and our communities.

description: Merancang & Membangun Infrastruktur: Mengonfigurasi server, jaringan, dan layanan penyimpanan berbasis cloud (cloud computing).Migrasi Sistem: Memindahkan data dan aplikasi dari server lokal (on-premise) ke lingkungan cloud.Pemeliharaan & Optimasi: Memantau kinerja cloud agar tetap berjalan lancar (...
jobDescriptionHtml:
1. Merancang & Membangun Infrastruktur: Mengonfigurasi server, jaringan, dan layanan penyimpanan berbasis cloud (cloud computing).

  2. Migrasi Sistem: Memindahkan data dan aplikasi dari server lokal (on-premise) ke lingkungan cloud.

  3. Pemeliharaan & Optimasi: Memantau kinerja cloud agar tetap berjalan lancar (maintenance) dan meningkatkan efisiensi biaya (cost optimization).

  4. Keamanan Cloud: Menerapkan langkah-langkah keamanan (security) untuk melindungi data dan aplikasi dari ancaman siber.

  5. Otomatisasi: Mengembangkan skrip untuk mengotomatiskan tugas-tugas administratif dan operasional.

  6. Troubleshooting: Memecahkan masalah teknis (debugging) yang terjadi pada layanan cloud


Kualifikasi Jabatan :

  1. Gelar Sarjana/Diploma dalam bidang Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau disiplin ilmu terkait .

  2. Minimum 1-2 tahun pengalaman sebagai system administrator maupun magang di bidang dukungan teknis cloud, hosting atau infrastruktur IT.

  3. Memiliki Pengetahuan mendalam tentang arsitektur layanan hosting dan cloud.

  4. Memiliki pengalaman dalam membangun infrastruktur hosting dan cloud

  5. ⁠Memiliki Kemampuan troubleshooting yang kuat dan pemecahan masalah analitis.

  6. Memiliki pemahaman yang baik tentang layanan dan solusi cloud utama, seperti Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, atau Google Cloud Platform menjadi nilai tambah.

  7. Memahami Linux dan Windows Server dan virtualization

  8. Memahami konsep Backup dan Recovery

  9. Memiliki sertifikat RHCSA nilai tambah
title: Cloud Engineer

description: About the roleAs an IT Support professional at PT Asuransi Wahana Tata, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of the company's technology infrastructure. Working in our South Jakarta, Jakarta office, you will be responsible for providing technical assistance and...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

As an IT Support professional at PT Asuransi Wahana Tata, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of the company's technology infrastructure. Working in our South Jakarta, Jakarta office, you will be responsible for providing technical assistance and support to our employees, troubleshooting issues, and maintaining our IT systems.

What you'll be doing

  • Provide timely and effective IT support to users, addressing a wide range of technical issues

  • Monitor and maintain the company's IT infrastructure, including networks, servers, and end-user devices

  • Respond to and resolve incidents and service requests in a professional and customer-focused manner

  • Perform software installations, upgrades, and configurations as needed

  • Assist with the implementation and maintenance of IT security measures

  • Collaborate with the IT team to identify and implement process improvements

  • Provide training and guidance to users on the effective use of IT systems and applications

What we're looking for

  • Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar IT support role

  • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

  • Good understanding of computer hardware, software, and networking concepts

  • Ability to work effectively in a team and provide excellent customer service

  • Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written

  • Familiarity with common IT support tools and software

  • Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies

What we offer

  • Competitive salary and benefits package

  • Opportunities for professional development and career growth

  • Supportive and collaborative work environment

  • Health and wellness initiatives to promote employee wellbeing

About us

PT Asuransi Wahana Tata is a leading insurance company in Indonesia, providing a wide range of insurance products and services to individuals and businesses. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, we are committed to delivering exceptional service and creating value for our clients. Join our dynamic team and be a part of our continued success.

Apply now to become our next IT Support professional!

title: IT Oracle EBS Staff

description: Tasks & Responsibilities:Support s Collaboration• Provide first-level technical support to employees via phone, email, in-person or remotely.• Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues in a timely manner.• Install, configure, and maintain computer systems, software, and periphe...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tasks & Responsibilities:

Support s Collaboration

• Provide first-level technical support to employees via phone, email, in-person or remotely.

• Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues in a timely manner.

• Install, configure, and maintain computer systems, software, and peripherals.

• Work closely with vendors, ISPs, and service providers to resolve technical issues and perform upgrades.

• Participate in IT projects involving system migration, cybersecurity training, and infrastructure expansion.

• Collaborate with IT team members to identify and implement improvements to IT processes and systems.

• Provide training and guidance to users on IT-related topics and best practices.


Server Administration

• Manage, maintain, and support Windows Server environments (2016/2016/2022) and VM

• Perform administration of Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, and DFS services.

• Support virtualization platforms including provisioning, resource optimization, and performance tuning.

• Implement and manage patching, backups and restore process.

• Monitor system health, uptime, and performance using enterprise monitoring tools.

• Familiar with M365 Administration especially on Entra, Exchange, Intune and SharePoint.


Network Administration

• Configure, and maintain LAN/WAN infrastructure including switches, routers, firewalls, VPNs, and wireless.

• Troubleshoot and resolve complex network issues related to routing, switching, VLANs, and connectivity.

• Ensure network security through firewall rules, intrusion detection/prevention (IDS/IPS), and ACL policies.

• Familiar with network devices from vendors such as Huawei, Fortinet, or HPE.

• Conduct network capacity planning, performance tuning, and regular audits.

• Familiar with network protocol and services such as DHCP, DNS, VPN and routing protocols.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, or any IT related field.

  • Strong knowledge of Windows operating systems, as well as common software applications.

  • Strong Experience in Microsoft AD, domain management, Microsoft 365 (M365), and Entra SaaS model.

  • Familiar with network protocols, hardware, and troubleshooting techniques.

  • Knowledge of cybersecurity and data protection regulations.

  • Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team

  • Minimum 5 years of working experience as IT Engineer

  • Ability to communicate effectively in English

  • Candidate with proficiency in Mandarin and Cantonese will be an added advantage

  • Good level of troubleshooting skill and ability to work independently

description: Tasks & Responsibilities:Support s Collaboration• Provide first-level technical support to employees via phone, email, in-person or remotely.• Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues in a timely manner.• Install, configure, and maintain computer systems, software, and periphe...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tasks & Responsibilities:

Support s Collaboration

• Provide first-level technical support to employees via phone, email, in-person or remotely.

• Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues in a timely manner.

• Install, configure, and maintain computer systems, software, and peripherals.

• Work closely with vendors, ISPs, and service providers to resolve technical issues and perform upgrades.

• Participate in IT projects involving system migration, cybersecurity training, and infrastructure expansion.

• Collaborate with IT team members to identify and implement improvements to IT processes and systems.

• Provide training and guidance to users on IT-related topics and best practices.


Server Administration

• Manage, maintain, and support Windows Server environments (2016/2016/2022) and VM

• Perform administration of Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, and DFS services.

• Support virtualization platforms including provisioning, resource optimization, and performance tuning.

• Implement and manage patching, backups and restore process.

• Monitor system health, uptime, and performance using enterprise monitoring tools.

• Familiar with M365 Administration especially on Entra, Exchange, Intune and SharePoint.


Network Administration

• Configure, and maintain LAN/WAN infrastructure including switches, routers, firewalls, VPNs, and wireless.

• Troubleshoot and resolve complex network issues related to routing, switching, VLANs, and connectivity.

• Ensure network security through firewall rules, intrusion detection/prevention (IDS/IPS), and ACL policies.

• Familiar with network devices from vendors such as Huawei, Fortinet, or HPE.

• Conduct network capacity planning, performance tuning, and regular audits.

• Familiar with network protocol and services such as DHCP, DNS, VPN and routing protocols.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, or any IT related field.

  • Strong knowledge of Windows operating systems, as well as common software applications.

  • Strong Experience in Microsoft AD, domain management, Microsoft 365 (M365), and Entra SaaS model.

  • Familiar with network protocols, hardware, and troubleshooting techniques.

  • Knowledge of cybersecurity and data protection regulations.

  • Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team

  • Minimum 5 years of working experience as IT Engineer

  • Ability to communicate effectively in English

  • Candidate with proficiency in Mandarin and Cantonese will be an added advantage

  • Good level of troubleshooting skill and ability to work independently
title: IT Engineer

description: Key Responsibilities:Windows Active Directory (AD) Management – Maintain and administer AD, including user provisioning, group policies, and security configurations.Windows Administration – Oversee Windows server environments, patch management, and troubleshooting.Advanced Linux Administration – Man...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Windows Active Directory (AD) Management – Maintain and administer AD, including user provisioning, group policies, and security configurations.

  • Windows Administration – Oversee Windows server environments, patch management, and troubleshooting.

  • Advanced Linux Administration – Manage and optimize Linux servers, automate system tasks, and ensure high availability.

  • Networking (VPN, Routing, Firewall) – Configure and troubleshoot site-to-site VPNs, routing protocols, VLANs, and network security policies.

  • Fortinet Administration – Manage and maintain Fortinet firewalls, implement security policies, and monitor firewall logs.

  • Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/OCI) – Deploy and manage workloads on AWS or Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), including networking, security, and automation.


Requirements:

  • Minimum 3-5 years of hands-on experience in IT infrastructure roles.

  • Strong expertise in Windows Server administration, including Active Directory, GPOs, and security hardening.

  • Proficiency in Linux administration (RHEL, Ubuntu, or similar) with advanced scripting skills (Bash, Python, or Ansible).

  • Solid networking knowledge, including VPN (IPSec, SSL), routing protocols, VLANs, and firewall configurations.

  • Hands-on experience with Fortinet firewalls (FortiGate) for security policy management and troubleshooting.

  • Experience with AWS and/or Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) for cloud networking, EC2/Compute instances, and IAM roles.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Ability to work independently and collaborate with cross-functional teams.

  • Ability to travel to Singapore on a regular basis for projects


Preferred (Good to Have):

  • Experience with SIEM solutions, IDS/IPS, or security monitoring tools.

  • Knowledge of DevOps tools (Docker, Kubernetes).

  • Understanding of financial industry security requirements and best practices.

Placement:

The selected candidate will be placed at PT Artajasa Pembayaran Elektronis, located in BSD, South Tangerang.


Tentang Artajasa

PT Artajasa Pembayaran Elektronis merupakan salah satu penyedia infrastruktur sistem pembayaran nasional terkemuka di Indonesia. Artajasa menghadirkan layanan switching dan transaksi elektronik yang aman, andal, dan beroperasi 24/7 untuk mendukung perbankan serta institusi keuangan di seluruh Indonesia. Dengan komitmen pada keandalan sistem dan keunggulan operasional, Artajasa berperan penting dalam menjaga stabilitas ekosistem pembayaran digital nasional.

Tentang Posisi

Kami mencari IT Monitoring Officer yang bertanggung jawab untuk melakukan pemantauan sistem dan infrastruktur TI secara real-time guna memastikan seluruh layanan berjalan stabil, aman, dan sesuai SLA. Posisi ini berperan penting dalam mendeteksi potensi gangguan lebih awal serta melakukan eskalasi cepat untuk menjaga kontinuitas layanan operasional 24/7.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Melakukan monitoring terhadap sistem aplikasi, server, jaringan, dan infrastruktur TI secara real-time.

  • Mengidentifikasi potensi gangguan, anomali, atau penurunan performa sistem.

  • Melakukan eskalasi insiden kepada tim terkait sesuai prosedur yang berlaku.

  • Mencatat dan mendokumentasikan setiap insiden serta tindakan penanganannya.

  • Memastikan pemantauan berjalan sesuai SLA dan standar operasional.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim IT, Network, dan Application Support dalam proses penanganan gangguan.

  • Menyusun laporan monitoring dan insiden secara berkala.

Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Teknologi Informasi, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau bidang terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman di bidang IT Monitoring, NOC, atau operasional TI menjadi nilai tambah; fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar.

  • Memahami dasar-dasar jaringan, server, dan aplikasi menjadi keunggulan.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis dan problem-solving yang baik.

  • Teliti, responsif, dan mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan.

  • Bersedia bekerja dalam sistem shift untuk mendukung operasional 24/7.

  • Memiliki integritas tinggi dan mampu menjaga kerahasiaan informasi perusahaan.

description: PeluangPT Bajau Escorindo sedang mencari System Engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim teknologi informasi kami di Jakarta Selatan. Sebagai System Engineer, Anda akan berperan penting dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional dan keamanan infrastruktur teknologi informasi di perusahaan...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Peluang
PT Bajau Escorindo sedang mencari System Engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim teknologi informasi kami di Jakarta Selatan. Sebagai System Engineer, Anda akan berperan penting dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional dan keamanan infrastruktur teknologi informasi di perusahaan kami. Kandidat yang ideal memiliki pengetahuan teknis yang kuat, kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang baik, dan pengalaman dalam mengelola sistem kompleks.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Melakukan implementasi dan deployment infrastruktur IT untuk kebutuhan customer (on-premise, cloud, atau hybrid), termasuk instalasi, konfigurasi, dan migrasi sistem

  • Menangani operational support melalui ticketing system serta melakukan troubleshooting pada environment production

  • Mengelola dan memastikan availability serta performance layanan seperti sistem, database (RDBMS), dan container platform

  • Melakukan upgrade, patching, dan maintenance secara berkala untuk menjaga stabilitas dan keamanan sistem

  • Mengelola dan mengimplementasikan database infrastructure serta monitoring untuk memastikan performa dan reliability layanan

  • Menerapkan automation dan infrastructure as code (IaC) untuk provisioning dan configuration management

  • Mendukung pengelolaan container platform berbasis container orchestration

  • Mendukung dan berkontribusi dalam implementasi CI/CD pipeline untuk proses deployment dan delivery aplikasi

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim internal maupun customer dalam proses implementasi, integrasi, dan problem solving

  • Mendokumentasikan konfigurasi, prosedur operasional, serta perubahan sistem secara terstruktur

  • Memberikan dukungan support termasuk troubleshooting lanjutan dan standby support (on-call) sesuai kebutuhan layanan

Kualifikasi

  • Kualifikasi

    • Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Teknologi Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau bidang terkait

    • Pengalaman 1–3 tahun sebagai System Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer, atau role serupa

    • Memiliki pemahaman yang baik terhadap sistem operasi Linux (terutama environment server)

    • Memahami konsep dan administrasi database relasional (RDBMS), termasuk instalasi, konfigurasi, dan basic performance tuning

    • Memahami konsep container dan orchestration (seperti container runtime dan container orchestration platform)

    • Memiliki pemahaman dasar terkait infrastructure as code (IaC) dan automation dalam pengelolaan infrastruktur

    • Familiar dengan konsep CI/CD serta proses deployment aplikasi secara modern

    • Memiliki kemampuan troubleshooting yang baik pada environment production

    • Memahami dasar networking dan sistem infrastructure secara umum

    • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, terutama dalam berinteraksi dengan customer

    • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim di environment yang dinamis

Manfaat

  • Gaji kompetitif dan tunjangan menarik

  • Perlengkapan kerja yang memadai dan fasilitas kantor yang nyaman

  • Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif, mendukung inovasi dan kreativitas

Tentang Kami
PT Bajau Escorindo adalah perusahaan teknologi informasi terkemuka di Indonesia yang berkomitmen untuk menyediakan solusi inovatif bagi klien kami. Kami memiliki tim yang berdedikasi dan beragam, yang bekerja sama untuk mencapai visi kami: menjadi mitra terpercaya dalam transformasi digital. Sebagai bagian dari tim kami, Anda akan memiliki kesempatan untuk berkembang dalam lingkungan yang mendukung dan menghargai kontribusi Anda.


Tertarik untuk bergabung dengan kami? Lamar sekarang dan jadikan karier Anda di PT Bajau Escorindo yang penuh tantangan dan menarik!

Kami mencari IT Monitoring Officer yang bertanggung jawab untuk melakukan pemantauan sistem dan infrastruktur TI secara real-time guna memastikan seluruh layanan berjalan stabil, aman, dan sesuai SLA. Posisi ini berperan penting dalam mendeteksi potensi gangguan lebih awal serta melakukan eskalasi cepat untuk menjaga kontinuitas layanan operasional 24/7.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Melakukan monitoring terhadap sistem aplikasi, server, jaringan, dan infrastruktur TI secara real-time.

  • Mengidentifikasi potensi gangguan, anomali, atau penurunan performa sistem.

  • Melakukan eskalasi insiden kepada tim terkait sesuai prosedur yang berlaku.

  • Mencatat dan mendokumentasikan setiap insiden serta tindakan penanganannya.

  • Memastikan pemantauan berjalan sesuai SLA dan standar operasional.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim IT, Network, dan Application Support dalam proses penanganan gangguan.

  • Menyusun laporan monitoring dan insiden secara berkala.

Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Teknologi Informasi, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau bidang terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman di bidang IT Monitoring, NOC, atau operasional TI menjadi nilai tambah; fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar.

  • Memahami dasar-dasar jaringan, server, dan aplikasi menjadi keunggulan.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis dan problem-solving yang baik.

  • Teliti, responsif, dan mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan.

  • Bersedia bekerja dalam sistem shift untuk mendukung operasional 24/7.

  • Memiliki integritas tinggi dan mampu menjaga kerahasiaan informasi perusahaan.

description: PeluangPT Bajau Escorindo sedang mencari System Engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim teknologi informasi kami di Jakarta Selatan. Sebagai System Engineer, Anda akan berperan penting dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional dan keamanan infrastruktur teknologi informasi di perusahaan...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Peluang
PT Bajau Escorindo sedang mencari System Engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim teknologi informasi kami di Jakarta Selatan. Sebagai System Engineer, Anda akan berperan penting dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional dan keamanan infrastruktur teknologi informasi di perusahaan kami. Kandidat yang ideal memiliki pengetahuan teknis yang kuat, kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang baik, dan pengalaman dalam mengelola sistem kompleks.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Melakukan implementasi dan deployment infrastruktur IT untuk kebutuhan customer (on-premise, cloud, atau hybrid), termasuk instalasi, konfigurasi, dan migrasi sistem

  • Menangani operational support melalui ticketing system serta melakukan troubleshooting pada environment production

  • Mengelola dan memastikan availability serta performance layanan seperti sistem, database (RDBMS), dan container platform

  • Melakukan upgrade, patching, dan maintenance secara berkala untuk menjaga stabilitas dan keamanan sistem

  • Mengelola dan mengimplementasikan database infrastructure serta monitoring untuk memastikan performa dan reliability layanan

  • Menerapkan automation dan infrastructure as code (IaC) untuk provisioning dan configuration management

  • Mendukung pengelolaan container platform berbasis container orchestration

  • Mendukung dan berkontribusi dalam implementasi CI/CD pipeline untuk proses deployment dan delivery aplikasi

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim internal maupun customer dalam proses implementasi, integrasi, dan problem solving

  • Mendokumentasikan konfigurasi, prosedur operasional, serta perubahan sistem secara terstruktur

  • Memberikan dukungan support termasuk troubleshooting lanjutan dan standby support (on-call) sesuai kebutuhan layanan

Kualifikasi

  • Kualifikasi

    • Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Teknologi Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau bidang terkait

    • Pengalaman 1–3 tahun sebagai System Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer, atau role serupa

    • Memiliki pemahaman yang baik terhadap sistem operasi Linux (terutama environment server)

    • Memahami konsep dan administrasi database relasional (RDBMS), termasuk instalasi, konfigurasi, dan basic performance tuning

    • Memahami konsep container dan orchestration (seperti container runtime dan container orchestration platform)

    • Memiliki pemahaman dasar terkait infrastructure as code (IaC) dan automation dalam pengelolaan infrastruktur

    • Familiar dengan konsep CI/CD serta proses deployment aplikasi secara modern

    • Memiliki kemampuan troubleshooting yang baik pada environment production

    • Memahami dasar networking dan sistem infrastructure secara umum

    • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, terutama dalam berinteraksi dengan customer

    • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim di environment yang dinamis

Manfaat

  • Gaji kompetitif dan tunjangan menarik

  • Perlengkapan kerja yang memadai dan fasilitas kantor yang nyaman

  • Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif, mendukung inovasi dan kreativitas

Tentang Kami
PT Bajau Escorindo adalah perusahaan teknologi informasi terkemuka di Indonesia yang berkomitmen untuk menyediakan solusi inovatif bagi klien kami. Kami memiliki tim yang berdedikasi dan beragam, yang bekerja sama untuk mencapai visi kami: menjadi mitra terpercaya dalam transformasi digital. Sebagai bagian dari tim kami, Anda akan memiliki kesempatan untuk berkembang dalam lingkungan yang mendukung dan menghargai kontribusi Anda.


Tertarik untuk bergabung dengan kami? Lamar sekarang dan jadikan karier Anda di PT Bajau Escorindo yang penuh tantangan dan menarik!

description: Ringkasan Pekerjaan:Kami sedang mencari seorang IT Staff yang berdedikasi dan berorientasi pada detail untuk mengelola, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan infrastruktur TI di lingkungan kerja kami. Posisi ini bertanggung jawab untuk memberikan dukungan teknis langsung, merawat sistem perangkat keras dan...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Ringkasan Pekerjaan:

Kami sedang mencari seorang IT Staff yang berdedikasi dan berorientasi pada detail untuk mengelola, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan infrastruktur TI di lingkungan kerja kami. Posisi ini bertanggung jawab untuk memberikan dukungan teknis langsung, merawat sistem perangkat keras dan perangkat lunak, mengelola jaringan serta ruang server, serta memberikan pelatihan dan bantuan teknis kepada pengguna internal. Kandidat ideal akan memastikan stabilitas, keamanan, dan efisiensi sistem TI organisasi, sambil memberikan layanan yang responsif dan profesional.

Tanggung Jawab Utama:

1. Manajemen Perangkat Keras

  • Melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, pemeliharaan, dan perbaikan komputer, laptop, monitor, dan printer.

  • Memantau kinerja perangkat keras dan melakukan upgrade atau perbaikan yang diperlukan.

  • Menangani permintaan bantuan terkait perbaikan perangkat keras

2. Administrasi Jaringan

  • Mengelola dan memelihara infrastruktur jaringan, baik jaringan kabel maupun nirkabel (Wi-Fi).

  • Mendiagnosis dan menyelesaikan masalah koneksi internet dan jaringan.

  • Menyusun dan menerapkan pengaturan serta kebijakan keamanan jaringan.

3. Pengelolaan Server dan Data

  • Melakukan instalasi, pemeliharaan, dan pemantauan server fisik atau virtual.

  • Menjamin keamanan server, termasuk proses backup dan pemulihan data secara berkala.

  • Mengoptimalkan kinerja server dan melakukan pembaruan sistem secara berkala.

4. Manajemen Perangkat Lunak

  • Menginstal dan memberikan dukungan untuk perangkat lunak penting seperti Microsoft Office dan aplikasi lainnya.

  • Mengelola lisensi perangkat lunak, termasuk pembaruan dan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan IT.

  • Menjaga agar perangkat lunak yang digunakan sesuai dengan kebutuhan dan standar organisasi.

5. Dukungan TI & Pelatihan Pengguna

  • Memberikan dukungan teknis tingkat pertama kepada staf terkait berbagai isu TI.

  • Mendokumentasikan dan menyelesaikan permintaan bantuan teknis dengan cepat dan efektif.

  • Memberikan pelatihan dan panduan dasar kepada pengguna untuk meningkatkan pemahaman dan keterampilan digital.

  • Melaksanakan tugas teknisi lainnya sesuai kebutuhan departemen General Affairs dan arahan dari direktur.

Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal SMK atau S1 di bidang Teknologi Informasi, Ilmu Komputer, atau bidang terkait.

  • Pengalaman kerja minimal 2–3 tahun di bidang dukungan TI, administrasi sistem, atau pengelolaan infrastruktur TI.

  • Menguasai perangkat keras komputer, jaringan, sistem operasi Windows, dan manajemen server.

  • Memahami prinsip-prinsip keamanan jaringan, sistem backup, dan manajemen lisensi.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis dan pemecahan masalah yang baik.

  • Komunikatif, proaktif, dan mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim.

Lingkungan Kerja:

  • Penugasan dilakukan secara on-site (langsung di lokasi kerja).

  • Kemungkinan diperlukan kerja di luar jam kerja reguler (malam atau akhir pekan) untuk keperluan pemeliharaan sistem.
title: IT Staff

description: EIGER Adventure Land sedang mencari kandidat yang berpotensi untuk mengisi posisi Network Engineer. Posisi ini nantinya akan bertanggung jawab untuk merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan memelihara infrastruktur jaringan yang aman, handal, dan berkinerja tinggi guna mendukung kelancaran operasional pe...
jobDescriptionHtml:
EIGER Adventure Land sedang mencari kandidat yang berpotensi untuk mengisi posisi Network Engineer. Posisi ini nantinya akan bertanggung jawab untuk merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan memelihara infrastruktur jaringan yang aman, handal, dan berkinerja tinggi guna mendukung kelancaran operasional perusahaan. Peran ini memastikan seluruh sistem, aplikasi, dan layanan digital dapat terhubung secara stabil, efisien, serta terlindungi dari gangguan maupun ancaman jaringan, sehingga mendukung keberlangsungan dan efektivitas operasional bisnis.


Role Summary:

1. Desain & Implementasi Infrastruktur Jaringan

  • Mendesain, mengonfigurasi, dan memelihara jaringan LAN, WAN, WiFi, VPN, firewall, switching, dan routing.

  • Mengimplementasikan konfigurasi jaringan sesuai kebutuhan operasional dan standar keamanan.

2. Monitoring & Troubleshooting Jaringan

  • Memantau performa jaringan dan mengidentifikasi potensi gangguan.

  • Melakukan troubleshooting terhadap latency, konektivitas, dan penurunan kinerja jaringan.

3. Manajemen Perangkat Jaringan

  • Mengelola router, switch, firewall, load balancer, dan access point.

  • Melakukan patching, upgrade firmware, dan pemeliharaan perangkat jaringan.

4. Keamanan Jaringan

  • Mengimplementasikan kontrol keamanan jaringan seperti ACL, VLAN segmentation, firewall rules, IDS/IPS, dan network policies.

  • Melakukan evaluasi dan perbaikan konfigurasi keamanan jaringan secara berkala.

5. Capacity Planning & Dokumentasi

  • Melakukan capacity planning berdasarkan analisis trafik jaringan.

  • Menyusun dan memelihara dokumentasi topologi serta konfigurasi jaringan.

6. Dukungan Proyek & Integrasi Jaringan

  • Mendukung kebutuhan proyek ICT yang memerlukan integrasi atau konfigurasi jaringan baru.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan vendor dan ISP terkait implementasi dan pemeliharaan jaringan.

7. Incident Response & Continuous Improvement

  • Menangani insiden jaringan kritikal dan memastikan pemulihan layanan berjalan optimal.

  • Melakukan root cause analysis serta tindak lanjut untuk mencegah insiden berulang.


Requirements:

1. Education & Experience

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknologi Informasi / Teknik Informatika atau setara.

  • Pengalaman minimal 2–4 tahun sebagai Network Engineer atau posisi sejenis.

2. Technical Competency

  • Menguasai konsep dan implementasi LAN, WAN, routing, switching, dan VPN.

  • Berpengalaman dengan firewall, network security, dan monitoring tools.

  • Memahami TCP/IP, subnetting, dan network performance tuning.

3. Personal & Professional Skills

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis dan troubleshooting yang kuat.

  • Mampu menyusun dokumentasi teknis secara rapi dan sistematis.

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun kolaboratif dalam tim.


About Company

EIGER Adventure Land is an ecotourism resort blending natural beauty with engaging activities and thrilling adventures.

Built to international standards, it offers immersive, sustainable experiences that celebrate harmony between generations and nature.

At EIGER Adventure Land, we believe people are the heartbeat of our mission: “To inspire generations through meaningful experiences in nature.” As part of our vision “To be a blessing company in sustainable ecotourism development”, we are building a team that grows together while caring for nature.
title: Network Engineer

description: We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy professional to support our IT Executive in both technical and operational aspects and landscape maintenance, with a strong focus on maintaining and optimizing Smart Home systems at the executive’s property in Bali. Responsibilities Over...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy professional to support our IT Executive in both technical and operational aspects and landscape maintenance, with a strong focus on maintaining and optimizing Smart Home systems at the executive’s property in Bali. 

Responsibilities 

  • Oversee, maintain, and troubleshoot Smart Home systems, including CCTV, lighting, HVAC, smart locks, and audio/video devices. 

  • Oversee landscape and outdoor maintenance, ensuring gardens, lighting, and irrigation systems are well-kept and functional. 

  • Manage home and office network systems, ensuring stable and secure connectivity (Wi-Fi, routers, VPNs, basic firewalls). 

  • Coordinate with Smart Home vendors, maintenance providers, and contractors for installations, repairs, and upgrades. 

  • Manage landscape and facility maintenance, ensuring the villa grounds remain clean, safe, and fully functional. 

  • Develop and maintain technical documentation of all configurations, devices, and systems for transparency and continuity. 

  • Create and maintain simple automation scripts to optimize daily technical or operational tasks. 

  • Handle administrative and logistical tasks such as communicating with local authorities, managing permissions, and liaising with neighbors when needed. 

  • Provide occasional driving support and assistance for villa residents, family members, or guests when required. 

  • Ensure a discreet, reliable, and proactive service to the IT Executive and household, maintaining high standards of confidentiality and integrity. 

  • Organizing and overseeing other maintainance related topics to the villas with 3rd party vendors: Pools, Sauna, Jacuzzi, Landscaping 

 Requirements 

  • Minimum 4 years of professional experience managing technical systems for modern properties or facilities. 

  • Proven hands-on experience with Smart Home systems (Home Assistant, Control4, KNX, or similar) is a strong plus. 

  • Basic to intermediate understanding of networking (LAN/WAN, VPN, VLAN, Wi-Fi optimization, firewall setup). 

  • Basic to intermediate experience in electrical installation and maintenance

  • Familiarity with scripting or automation would be helpful 

  • Strong organizational, problem-solving, and multitasking skills with the ability to work independently. 

  • High integrity, confidentiality, and professionalism in managing sensitive systems and personal environments. 

  • A well-organized, motivated, and dependable personality who enjoys a dynamic, hands-on

2. Monitoring & Troubleshooting Jaringan

  • Memantau performa jaringan dan mengidentifikasi potensi gangguan.

  • Melakukan troubleshooting terhadap latency, konektivitas, dan penurunan kinerja jaringan.

3. Manajemen Perangkat Jaringan

  • Mengelola router, switch, firewall, load balancer, dan access point.

  • Melakukan patching, upgrade firmware, dan pemeliharaan perangkat jaringan.

4. Keamanan Jaringan

  • Mengimplementasikan kontrol keamanan jaringan seperti ACL, VLAN segmentation, firewall rules, IDS/IPS, dan network policies.

  • Melakukan evaluasi dan perbaikan konfigurasi keamanan jaringan secara berkala.

5. Capacity Planning & Dokumentasi

  • Melakukan capacity planning berdasarkan analisis trafik jaringan.

  • Menyusun dan memelihara dokumentasi topologi serta konfigurasi jaringan.

6. Dukungan Proyek & Integrasi Jaringan

  • Mendukung kebutuhan proyek ICT yang memerlukan integrasi atau konfigurasi jaringan baru.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan vendor dan ISP terkait implementasi dan pemeliharaan jaringan.

7. Incident Response & Continuous Improvement

  • Menangani insiden jaringan kritikal dan memastikan pemulihan layanan berjalan optimal.

  • Melakukan root cause analysis serta tindak lanjut untuk mencegah insiden berulang.


Requirements:

1. Education & Experience

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknologi Informasi / Teknik Informatika atau setara.

  • Pengalaman minimal 2–4 tahun sebagai Network Engineer atau posisi sejenis.

2. Technical Competency

  • Menguasai konsep dan implementasi LAN, WAN, routing, switching, dan VPN.

  • Berpengalaman dengan firewall, network security, dan monitoring tools.

  • Memahami TCP/IP, subnetting, dan network performance tuning.

3. Personal & Professional Skills

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis dan troubleshooting yang kuat.

  • Mampu menyusun dokumentasi teknis secara rapi dan sistematis.

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun kolaboratif dalam tim.


About Company

EIGER Adventure Land is an ecotourism resort blending natural beauty with engaging activities and thrilling adventures.

Built to international standards, it offers immersive, sustainable experiences that celebrate harmony between generations and nature.

At EIGER Adventure Land, we believe people are the heartbeat of our mission: “To inspire generations through meaningful experiences in nature.” As part of our vision “To be a blessing company in sustainable ecotourism development”, we are building a team that grows together while caring for nature.
title: Network Engineer

description: Ringkasan Pekerjaan:Kami sedang mencari seorang IT Staff yang berdedikasi dan berorientasi pada detail untuk mengelola, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan infrastruktur TI di lingkungan kerja kami. Posisi ini bertanggung jawab untuk memberikan dukungan teknis langsung, merawat sistem perangkat keras dan...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Ringkasan Pekerjaan:

Kami sedang mencari seorang IT Staff yang berdedikasi dan berorientasi pada detail untuk mengelola, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan infrastruktur TI di lingkungan kerja kami. Posisi ini bertanggung jawab untuk memberikan dukungan teknis langsung, merawat sistem perangkat keras dan perangkat lunak, mengelola jaringan serta ruang server, serta memberikan pelatihan dan bantuan teknis kepada pengguna internal. Kandidat ideal akan memastikan stabilitas, keamanan, dan efisiensi sistem TI organisasi, sambil memberikan layanan yang responsif dan profesional.

Tanggung Jawab Utama:

1. Manajemen Perangkat Keras

  • Melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, pemeliharaan, dan perbaikan komputer, laptop, monitor, dan printer.

  • Memantau kinerja perangkat keras dan melakukan upgrade atau perbaikan yang diperlukan.

  • Menangani permintaan bantuan terkait perbaikan perangkat keras

2. Administrasi Jaringan

  • Mengelola dan memelihara infrastruktur jaringan, baik jaringan kabel maupun nirkabel (Wi-Fi).

  • Mendiagnosis dan menyelesaikan masalah koneksi internet dan jaringan.

  • Menyusun dan menerapkan pengaturan serta kebijakan keamanan jaringan.

3. Pengelolaan Server dan Data

  • Melakukan instalasi, pemeliharaan, dan pemantauan server fisik atau virtual.

  • Menjamin keamanan server, termasuk proses backup dan pemulihan data secara berkala.

  • Mengoptimalkan kinerja server dan melakukan pembaruan sistem secara berkala.

4. Manajemen Perangkat Lunak

  • Menginstal dan memberikan dukungan untuk perangkat lunak penting seperti Microsoft Office dan aplikasi lainnya.

  • Mengelola lisensi perangkat lunak, termasuk pembaruan dan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan IT.

  • Menjaga agar perangkat lunak yang digunakan sesuai dengan kebutuhan dan standar organisasi.

5. Dukungan TI & Pelatihan Pengguna

  • Memberikan dukungan teknis tingkat pertama kepada staf terkait berbagai isu TI.

  • Mendokumentasikan dan menyelesaikan permintaan bantuan teknis dengan cepat dan efektif.

  • Memberikan pelatihan dan panduan dasar kepada pengguna untuk meningkatkan pemahaman dan keterampilan digital.

  • Melaksanakan tugas teknisi lainnya sesuai kebutuhan departemen General Affairs dan arahan dari direktur.

Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal SMK atau S1 di bidang Teknologi Informasi, Ilmu Komputer, atau bidang terkait.

  • Pengalaman kerja minimal 2–3 tahun di bidang dukungan TI, administrasi sistem, atau pengelolaan infrastruktur TI.

  • Menguasai perangkat keras komputer, jaringan, sistem operasi Windows, dan manajemen server.

  • Memahami prinsip-prinsip keamanan jaringan, sistem backup, dan manajemen lisensi.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis dan pemecahan masalah yang baik.

  • Komunikatif, proaktif, dan mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim.

Lingkungan Kerja:

  • Penugasan dilakukan secara on-site (langsung di lokasi kerja).

  • Kemungkinan diperlukan kerja di luar jam kerja reguler (malam atau akhir pekan) untuk keperluan pemeliharaan sistem.

description: We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy professional to support our IT Executive in both technical and operational aspects and landscape maintenance, with a strong focus on maintaining and optimizing Smart Home systems at the executive’s property in Bali. Responsibilities Over...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy professional to support our IT Executive in both technical and operational aspects and landscape maintenance, with a strong focus on maintaining and optimizing Smart Home systems at the executive’s property in Bali. 

Responsibilities 

  • Oversee, maintain, and troubleshoot Smart Home systems, including CCTV, lighting, HVAC, smart locks, and audio/video devices. 

  • Oversee landscape and outdoor maintenance, ensuring gardens, lighting, and irrigation systems are well-kept and functional. 

  • Manage home and office network systems, ensuring stable and secure connectivity (Wi-Fi, routers, VPNs, basic firewalls). 

  • Coordinate with Smart Home vendors, maintenance providers, and contractors for installations, repairs, and upgrades. 

  • Manage landscape and facility maintenance, ensuring the villa grounds remain clean, safe, and fully functional. 

  • Develop and maintain technical documentation of all configurations, devices, and systems for transparency and continuity. 

  • Create and maintain simple automation scripts to optimize daily technical or operational tasks. 

  • Handle administrative and logistical tasks such as communicating with local authorities, managing permissions, and liaising with neighbors when needed. 

  • Provide occasional driving support and assistance for villa residents, family members, or guests when required. 

  • Ensure a discreet, reliable, and proactive service to the IT Executive and household, maintaining high standards of confidentiality and integrity. 

  • Organizing and overseeing other maintainance related topics to the villas with 3rd party vendors: Pools, Sauna, Jacuzzi, Landscaping 

 Requirements 

  • Minimum 4 years of professional experience managing technical systems for modern properties or facilities. 

  • Proven hands-on experience with Smart Home systems (Home Assistant, Control4, KNX, or similar) is a strong plus. 

  • Basic to intermediate understanding of networking (LAN/WAN, VPN, VLAN, Wi-Fi optimization, firewall setup). 

  • Basic to intermediate experience in electrical installation and maintenance

  • Familiarity with scripting or automation would be helpful 

  • Strong organizational, problem-solving, and multitasking skills with the ability to work independently. 

  • High integrity, confidentiality, and professionalism in managing sensitive systems and personal environments. 

  • A well-organized, motivated, and dependable personality who enjoys a dynamic, hands-on
title: IT Support

description: About the roleAs an IT Support professional at PT Asuransi Wahana Tata, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of the company's technology infrastructure. Working in our South Jakarta, Jakarta office, you will be responsible for providing technical assistance and...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

As an IT Support professional at PT Asuransi Wahana Tata, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of the company's technology infrastructure. Working in our South Jakarta, Jakarta office, you will be responsible for providing technical assistance and support to our employees, troubleshooting issues, and maintaining our IT systems.

What you'll be doing

  • Provide timely and effective IT support to users, addressing a wide range of technical issues

  • Monitor and maintain the company's IT infrastructure, including networks, servers, and end-user devices

  • Respond to and resolve incidents and service requests in a professional and customer-focused manner

  • Perform software installations, upgrades, and configurations as needed

  • Assist with the implementation and maintenance of IT security measures

  • Collaborate with the IT team to identify and implement process improvements

  • Provide training and guidance to users on the effective use of IT systems and applications

What we're looking for

  • Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar IT support role

  • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

  • Good understanding of computer hardware, software, and networking concepts

  • Ability to work effectively in a team and provide excellent customer service

  • Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written

  • Familiarity with common IT support tools and software

  • Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies

What we offer

  • Competitive salary and benefits package

  • Opportunities for professional development and career growth

  • Supportive and collaborative work environment

  • Health and wellness initiatives to promote employee wellbeing

About us

PT Asuransi Wahana Tata is a leading insurance company in Indonesia, providing a wide range of insurance products and services to individuals and businesses. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, we are committed to delivering exceptional service and creating value for our clients. Join our dynamic team and be a part of our continued success.

Apply now to become our next IT Support professional!
