description: IT Website & Digital Systems LeadMurzal & Partners (MNP)Position Overview:The IT Website & Digital Systems Officer is responsible for managing, developing, optimizing, and ensuring the security and performance of the firm’s website, landing pages, tracking systems, digital forms, and automation tool...
jobDescriptionHtml:
IT Website & Digital Systems Lead
Murzal & Partners (MNP)


Position Overview:

The IT Website & Digital Systems Officer is responsible for managing, developing, optimizing, and ensuring the security and performance of the firm’s website, landing pages, tracking systems, digital forms, and automation tools used by Murzal & Partners. This position also plays an important role in supporting digital marketing needs, technical SEO, campaign support, regular website maintenance, as well as the management of internal digital work platforms to ensure that all of the firm’s digital assets operate effectively, efficiently, securely, and professionally.


Main Responsibilities:

1. Website Development & Maintenance

  • Manage the development, improvement, and updating of the firm’s website.

  • Create and develop landing pages for campaign and marketing purposes.

  • Perform regular website maintenance, including troubleshooting and bug fixing.

  • Manage and ensure proper setup of domains and hosting.

  • Ensure that the website remains stable, responsive, user-friendly, and professionally maintained.

2. WordPress, Plugin, & Performance Optimization

  • Conduct audits of active plugins from both security and performance perspectives.

  • Remove, replace, or adjust inefficient plugins.

  • Optimize cache plugins and overall website performance.

  • Implement defer and delay strategies for non-critical JavaScript.

  • Optimize render-blocking CSS.

  • Maintain optimal website loading speed across both desktop and mobile platforms.

3. Image Optimization

  • Optimize website images into more efficient formats such as WebP.

  • Compress images based on website needs, particularly for hero images, banners, and key pages.

  • Resize images in accordance with layout requirements.

  • Implement lazy loading for below-the-fold images.

  • Ensure that website visuals remain high quality without compromising page performance.

4. Tracking & Analytics

  • Set up and manage tracking tools such as Google Analytics, Meta/Facebook Pixel, and similar platforms.

  • Implement tag management systems such as Google Tag Manager.

  • Set up conversion tracking, including form submissions and other key user actions.

  • Ensure that all tracking data is accurate and reliable for monitoring and campaign evaluation purposes.

5. Technical SEO

  • Optimize the website structure from a technical SEO perspective, including URLs, sitemap, robots.txt, and indexing.

  • Identify and resolve technical SEO issues, such as crawl errors and indexing problems.

  • Ensure strong mobile responsiveness across the website.

  • Coordinate with the marketing team to support improvements in organic SEO performance.

6. Security & Data Protection

  • Ensure website security through the management of SSL, firewall protection, and other necessary security measures.

  • Safeguard and protect user, lead, and customer data collected through the website.

  • Conduct regular website and digital system backups.

  • Minimize risks relating to system disruption, data leakage, or technical failure.

7. Form & Lead Management

  • Create and manage digital forms, including contact forms, lead forms, and campaign-related forms.

  • Integrate forms with databases or reporting tools such as Google Sheets or other relevant systems.

  • Set up automated email responses following form submissions.

  • Ensure proper validation, recording, and storage of lead data.

8. Automation & Tools

  • Set up marketing automation tools based on campaign or operational needs.

  • Build automated notification systems via email, WhatsApp, or other relevant platforms where necessary.

  • Develop workflow automation across tools to improve efficiency.

  • Provide recommendations on tools or digital systems that may support the firm’s operations.

9. Google Workspace & Microsoft Teams Administration

  • Understand and manage the use of Google Workspace for the firm’s operational needs, including email, Google Drive, Google Meet, Google Calendar, Google Docs, and Google Sheets.

  • Understand and manage Microsoft Teams for internal communication, coordination, meetings, and collaboration.

  • Provide technical support to internal teams regarding the use of Google Workspace and Microsoft Teams.

  • Assist with account setup, access control, permissions, and troubleshooting related to internal digital work platforms.

  • Ensure that internal collaboration platforms are used effectively, securely, and in support of team productivity.

10. Campaign & Digital Support

  • Support the deployment and technical implementation of digital campaigns, including banners, pop-ups, and tracking URLs.

  • Prepare URL tracking structures, including UTM parameters.

  • Assist in troubleshooting errors related to digital campaigns or landing pages.

  • Work closely with the marketing team to ensure campaigns run effectively from a technical perspective.

11. Reporting & Deliverables

  • Prepare before-and-after performance reports for website optimization work.

  • Monitor and report improvements in website performance, including loading speed, stability, and tracking effectiveness.

  • Support efforts to make the website more SEO-friendly and more effective for digital advertising purposes.

  • Provide bug-fixing support during the post-optimization monitoring and maintenance period.


Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field.

  • Proven experience in website management, particularly WordPress.

  • Strong understanding of plugin management, website performance optimization, and technical SEO.

  • Proficiency in Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and other relevant tracking tools.

  • Understanding of website security, backup systems, and data protection principles.

  • Ability to create and manage landing pages, form integrations, and workflow automation.

  • Good understanding of Google Workspace and Microsoft Teams administration.

  • Strong analytical skills in evaluating website and campaign performance.

  • Detail-oriented, responsive, capable of troubleshooting, and able to work under targets and deadlines.

  • Familiarity with UI/UX basics, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and marketing tool integrations will be considered an advantage.


Expected Work Output:

  • The firm’s website operates quickly, securely, stably, and is properly maintained.

  • Campaign landing pages are effectively created and deployed.

  • Tracking and analytics systems function accurately.

  • The website is better optimized for SEO and digital marketing purposes.

  • Form systems, lead capture, and automation processes are organized and efficient.

  • Internal digital collaboration platforms function properly and support team coordination.

  • Regular reports on website performance and improvements are available.
title: IT Website & Digital Systems Lead

  • Campaign landing pages are effectively created and deployed.

  • Tracking and analytics systems function accurately.

  • The website is better optimized for SEO and digital marketing purposes.

  • Form systems, lead capture, and automation processes are organized and efficient.

  • Internal digital collaboration platforms function properly and support team coordination.

  • Regular reports on website performance and improvements are available.

description: About the roleWe are seeking a talented and motivated NOC Intern to join our dynamic team at PT DCI Indonesia, Tbk' in Cibitung, West Java. As a full-time intern role, you will play a crucial part in maintaining and monitoring our robust network infrastructure, ensuring seamless operations and excep...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking a talented and motivated NOC Intern to join our dynamic team at PT DCI Indonesia, Tbk' in Cibitung, West Java. As a full-time intern role, you will play a crucial part in maintaining and monitoring our robust network infrastructure, ensuring seamless operations and exceptional service delivery to our valued customers.

What you'll be doing

  • Providing first-line assistance and troubleshooting for network-related incidents and issues

  • Monitoring network performance, identifying and addressing any potential problems

  • Assisting with the configuration and maintenance of network devices and systems

  • Collaborating with cross-functional teams to resolve complex network-related challenges

  • Documenting network activities, changes, and incident resolutions

  • Participating in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance network reliability and efficiency

What we're looking for

  • Currently pursuing a degree in Information & Communication Technology or a related field

  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

  • Good understanding of network protocols, technologies, and best practices

  • Equipped with basic knowledge of OS (Windows or Linux) and computer-related

  • Exposed with installing or troubleshooting CCTV system and/or monitoring is preferable

  • Exposed with access control system is preferable

  • Understand structured cabling (UTP and Fiber Optic) is a plus

  • Familiar with NMS monitorinig tools (e.g. Zabbix, PRTG, LibreNMS) is a plus

  • Willingness to learn and continuously enhance your technical expertise

About us

PT DCI Indonesia, Tbk' is a leading provider of data centre services, serving a diverse range of clients across Indonesia. With a strong commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction, we are constantly evolving to meet the changing needs of the industry. Join our team and be a part of our exciting journey.

Apply now to become our NOC Intern and contribute to the success of our network operations.
title: NOC Intern

description: Responsibilities:•Monitor, maintain, and troubleshoot IT infrastructure, including servers (on-premises and cloud-based), networks, and end devices.•Automate repetitive tasks using scripting or configuration management tools.•Ensure system security, backups are in place and effective.•Manage inciden...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

•Monitor, maintain, and troubleshoot IT infrastructure, including servers (on-premises and cloud-based), networks, and end devices.

•Automate repetitive tasks using scripting or configuration management tools.

•Ensure system security, backups are in place and effective.

•Manage incidents, service requests, and escalations, ensuring timely resolution.

•Implement updates, patches, and system optimizations to enhance performance.

•Collaborate with vendors and internal teams to improve ICT operations.

•Maintain documentation, standard operating procedures (SOPs), and reports.

•Support users by providing technical assistance and training as needed.

Skill and Qualifications

  • Experienced developing NMS (Network Monitoring System) Zabbix, Grafana, PRTG, STG, WA-Gold, Dude

  • Experienced developing network device :
    - Router, Switch, firewall, Access point : Fortinet (fortigate), Mikrotik, Cisco, Ubiquity, Aruba.

  • Knowledge in architecture design : High level design and Low Level design

  • Knowledge in Basic server & server room knowledge (server room environment, server hardware, OS (windows & linux).  

  • Experienced Automate repetitive tasks using scripting and automation (PowerShell, bash, etc for automation)

  • Familiar with startup or new project

  • Basic DC Electrical 

  • Understanding of IT service management and escalation process.

  • Able to work independently with strong coordination skills.

  • Good documentation and reporting discipline.

    Education and experience

  • Bachelor degree in computer science

  • 2-3 Years experience Experience with network administration, system administration, and IT support.

  • Strong skills in Microsoft Excel, including complex formulas, data processing, and automation

    Certification 

  • CCNA (Preferred)

jobDescriptionHtml:
Qualification

  • Education minimum Bachelor Degree (S1) in Information Technology/Information System/Accounting/or Equivalent.

  • Experience minimum 2 years in ERP Support or simillar role.

  • ERP knowledge strong understanding of ERP System Concept and Business process (Finance/Purchasing/Inventory/Logistic).

  • Required system experience must have experience working with the Odoo ERP System.

  • Prefered experience in manufacturing environment is a plus.

  • SQL provience working knowledge of SQL for database querying, reporting, and data validation.

Core Responsibilities

User Support

  • handle and resolve troubleshooting request from ERP users.

  • Provide basic training and orientation to new user or those experiencing difficulties.

  • Create and maintain user documentation and system guides.

System Maintenance

  • Monitor ERP system performance and report any detected issues promptly

  • Perform data input, updates and validation within the system as required by operational needs.

  • Assist in data backup and restoration processes (if necessary)

Issue Analysis and Resulation

  • Analyze errors or bugs reported by users and relay them to the relevant parties (developers/vendors)

  • Prepare reports detailings incidents, system issues, and their corresponding solutions.

Internal & Vendor Coordination

  • Coordinate with internal teams or the ERP vendor for system adjustments or new module development

  • Perform comprehensive testing of new system or modules before implementation.

Master Data Management

  • Ensure the consistency and integrity of master data across all ERP modules.

  • Perform updates, export, and import of master data as needed.

Reporting and Documentation

  • Compile regular reports on system issues, system usage, and improvement suggestion.

  • Extract and submit analytical data reports to stakeholders who require them.

  • Create and update both technical and procedural documentation for the ERP system.
title: IT ERP Odoo Specialist

description: Deskripsi Pekerjaan (Job Description):Kami mencari individu yang proaktif dan memiliki visi teknis untuk bergabung sebagai IT Staff. Peran ini sangat krusial karena Anda tidak hanya menjaga operasional harian, tetapi juga menjadi penggerak utama (inisiator) dalam implementasi sistem ERP yang sedang ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan (Job Description):

Kami mencari individu yang proaktif dan memiliki visi teknis untuk bergabung sebagai IT Staff. Peran ini sangat krusial karena Anda tidak hanya menjaga operasional harian, tetapi juga menjadi penggerak utama (inisiator) dalam implementasi sistem ERP yang sedang dikembangkan perusahaan.

Tanggung Jawab Utama:

  • Inisiasi & Pengembangan ERP: Menjadi koordinator dalam merancang, menginisiasi, dan mengimplementasikan program ERP baru (seperti Odoo, SAP, atau Custom ERP) agar sesuai dengan proses bisnis perusahaan.

  • Analisis Sistem: Melakukan pemetaan kebutuhan antar departemen (Finance, Warehouse, Purchasing dll) untuk diintegrasikan ke dalam sistem ERP.

  • IT Helpdesk: Menjadi titik kontak pertama (First Line Support) bagi seluruh staf kantor terkait kendala teknis software maupun hardware.

  • Troubleshooting: Melakukan diagnosa dan perbaikan cepat (troubleshooting) pada masalah jaringan, server, database, serta perangkat komputer pendukung.

  • Maintenance: Melakukan pemeliharaan rutin pada infrastruktur IT guna memastikan seluruh sistem berjalan tanpa kendala (zero downtime).

Persyaratan (Requirements):

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait.

  • Pengalaman & Pemahaman ERP: Memiliki pengalaman atau pemahaman mendalam mengenai struktur ERP. Diutamakan bagi yang pernah terlibat dalam proyek implementasi ERP dari nol.

  • Skill Teknis: Menguasai manajemen Database (SQL Server/PostgreSQL/MySQL) dan pemahaman dasar jaringan (Mikrotik/LAN/WAN).

  • Problem Solver: Mampu berpikir logis dan cepat dalam mengatasi masalah teknis (troubleshooting) baik secara remote maupun onsite.

  • Komunikasi: Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk memberikan pelatihan (training) kepada user/pengguna ERP.

  • Sikap Kerja: Jujur, teliti, mandiri, dan memiliki inisiatif tinggi untuk mengembangkan sistem IT perusahaan.
title: IT Staff (ERP Specialist & System Implementation)

jobDescriptionHtml:
We are a multinational chemical manufacturing company based in West Java, Indonesia, delivering high-quality chemical solutions for a wide range of industrial applications. Our products serve both domestic and export markets, supported by strong commitments to safety, innovation, and sustainable manufacturing practices.

As part of a global organization, we offer a professional and collaborative work environment that encourages continuous improvement, learning, and long-term career development.


for Quality area, we are seeking individuals to apply for the Grading & Fiber Analyst position based in Purwakarta, Indonesia.

Your Ideal Profile:

  • Min. Diploma 3 (Science or Chemical Analyst)

  • Able to perform sample preparation and routine maintenance of fiber testing equipment.

  • Strong understanding of laboratory testing standards, quality protocols, and data accuracy requirements.

  • Familiarity with ISO, QA/QC procedures, and Good Laboratory Practices (GLP).

  • Good analytical thinking, attention to detail and teamwork skills to support cross-functional laboratory activities.

Purpose of the job:

The incumbent able to do a job related to fiber testing especially spinning fault, Nonwovens contamination on fiber, commodifier, fiber length, fiber appearance test under UV light and sulphur content on fiber as per Work Instruction in effective, efficient and safe way.


If you are interest with this position, please apply through the link provided. We will contact you for more detail.

  • Eskalasi ke L2

  • Monitoring data systems & health dashboard

  • Log & prioritisasi insiden via ITSM

  • Remote diagnostik

  • Corrective & preventive maintenance

jobDescriptionHtml:
• Diutamakan S1 Teknik Informatika/Sistem Informasi

  • Memiliki pengalaman di bidang IT min. 1 tahun

Ruang lingkup Pekerjaan Layanan Pre-Diagnostic Data Energy Management mencakup :

a. Melakukan pemeriksaan konsistensi data dari sistem yang menjadi sumber data di SIPGAS EM;

b. Memeriksa kebenaran data dan mengidentifikasi data yang tidak valid pada aplikasi tools Gas Management System;

c. Melakukan pemeriksaan kelengkapan data input dan output dari aplikasi tools Gas Management System;

d. Berkoordinasi dengan penanggung jawab entry data ataupun penanggung jawab komunikasi data untuk melakukan verifikasi data penyaluran;

e. Berkoordinasi dengan personel PGN untuk mendukung kegiatan penyediaan data penyaluran gas; dan

f. Melakukan tugas yang diberikan oleh PGN untuk mendukung kegiatan verifikasi dan validasi data penyaluran gas serta adjustment data pengaliran pada aplikasi tools Gas Management System.
title: Pre Diagnostic Data Energi Management
